result: 在遗嘱数据集上，CRL+模型在死亡原因分类任务中优于纯CRL模型和基于RoBERTa的主动学习模型。
conclusion: 融合对比学习与主动学习的CRL+方法有效提升了半监督文本分类效果，为保险行业非结构化数据处理提供了新思路。
search_text: CRL+: A Novel Semi-Supervised Deep Active Contrastive Representation Learning-Based Text Classification Model for Insurance Data CRL+：一种新颖的基于半监督深度主动对比表示学习的保险数据文本分类模型 Financial sector and especially the insurance industry collect vast volumes of text on a daily basis and through multiple channels (their agents, customer care centers, emails, social networks, and web in general). The information collected includes policies, expert and health reports, claims and complaints, results of surveys, and relevant social media posts. It is difficult to effectively extract label, classify, and interpret the essential information from such varied and unstructured material. Therefore, the Insurance Industry is among the ones that can benefit from applying technologies for the intelligent analysis of free text through Natural Language Processing (NLP). In this paper, CRL+, a novel text classification model combining Contrastive Representation Learning (CRL) and Active Learning is proposed to handle the challenge of using semi-supervised learning for text classification. In this method, supervised (CRL) is used to train a RoBERTa transformer model to encode the textual data into a contrastive representation space and then classify using a classification layer. This (CRL)-based transformer model is used as the base model in the proposed Active Learning mechanism to classify all the data in an iterative manner. The proposed model is evaluated using unstructured obituary data with objective to determine the cause of the death from the data. This model is compared with the CRL model and an Active Learning model with the RoBERTa base model. The experiment shows that the proposed method can outperform both methods for this specific task. 金融部门，尤其是保险行业每天通过多种渠道（其代理、客户服务中心、电子邮件、社交网络和一般网络）收集大量文本。收集的信息包括政策、专家和健康报告、索赔和投诉、调查结果以及相关社交媒体帖子。从如此多样化和非结构化的材料中有效地提取标签、分类和解释基本信息是很困难的。因此，保险行业是可以从通过自然语言处理（NLP）对自由文本进行智能分析的应用技术中受益的行业之一。本文提出了 CRL+，一种结合对比表示学习（CRL）和主动学习的新型文本分类模型，以应对使用半监督学习进行文本分类的挑战。在此方法中，使用监督 (CRL) 来训练 RoBERTa 变压器模型，将文本数据编码到对比表示空间中，然后使用分类层进行分类。这种基于（CRL）的变压器模型被用作所提出的主动学习机制中的基础模型，以迭代方式对所有数据进行分类。使用非结构化讣告数据对所提出的模型进行评估，目的是从数据中确定死亡原因。该模型与 CRL 模型以及带有 RoBERTa 基础模型的主动学习模型进行了比较。实验表明，对于该特定任务，所提出的方法可以优于这两种方法。 本文提出CRL+模型，结合对比表示学习和主动学习技术，解决保险行业中非结构化文本分类的半监督学习问题。 Amir Namavar Jahromi,Ebrahim Pourjafari,Hadis Karimipour,Amit Satpathy,Lovell Hodge cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Ethan Grooby,Chiranjibi Sitaula,Soodeh Ahani,Liisa Holsti,Atul Malhotra,Guy A. Dumont,Faezeh Marzbanrad
title: Neonatal Face and Facial Landmark Detection from Video Recordings
title_zh: 从视频记录中检测新生儿面部和面部标志
comment: 5 pages, 2 tables. Paper submitted for potential publication as a conference paper at the 45th Annual International Conference of the IEEE Engineering in Medicine and Biology Society, 2023
comments: 5 pages, 2 tables. Paper submitted for potential publication as a conference paper at the 45th Annual International Conference of the IEEE Engineering in Medicine and Biology Society, 2023
abstract: This paper explores automated face and facial landmark detection of neonates, which is an important first step in many video-based neonatal health applications, such as vital sign estimation, pain assessment, sleep-wake classification, and jaundice detection. Utilising three publicly available datasets of neonates in the clinical environment, 366 images (258 subjects) and 89 (66 subjects) were annotated for training and testing, respectively. Transfer learning was applied to two YOLO-based models, with input training images augmented with random horizontal flipping, photo-metric colour distortion, translation and scaling during each training epoch. Additionally, the re-orientation of input images and fusion of trained deep learning models was explored. Our proposed model based on YOLOv7Face outperformed existing methods with a mean average precision of 84.8% for face detection, and a normalised mean error of 0.072 for facial landmark detection. Overall, this will assist in the development of fully automated neonatal health assessment algorithms.
summary: This paper explores automated face and facial landmark detection of neonates, which is an important first step in many video-based neonatal health applications, such as vital sign estimation, pain assessment, sleep-wake classification, and jaundice detection. Utilising three publicly available datasets of neonates in the clinical environment, 366 images (258 subjects) and 89 (66 subjects) were annotated for training and testing, respectively. Transfer learning was applied to two YOLO-based models, with input training images augmented with random horizontal flipping, photo-metric colour distortion, translation and scaling during each training epoch. Additionally, the re-orientation of input images and fusion of trained deep learning models was explored. Our proposed model based on YOLOv7Face outperformed existing methods with a mean average precision of 84.8% for face detection, and a normalised mean error of 0.072 for facial landmark detection. Overall, this will assist in the development of fully automated neonatal health assessment algorithms.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了新生儿的自动面部和面部标志检测，这是许多基于视频的新生儿健康应用（例如生命体征估计、疼痛评估、睡眠-觉醒分类和黄疸检测）中重要的第一步。利用临床环境中的三个公开可用的新生儿数据集，分别对 366 张图像（258 名受试者）和 89 幅图像（66 名受试者）进行了注释，用于训练和测试。将迁移学习应用于两个基于 YOLO 的模型，在每个训练周期中通过随机水平翻转、光度颜色失真、平移和缩放来增强输入训练图像。此外，还探索了输入图像的重新定位和经过训练的深度学习模型的融合。我们提出的基于 YOLOv7Face 的模型优于现有方法，人脸检测的平均精度为 84.8%，人脸标志点检测的归一化平均误差为 0.072。总的来说，这将有助于开发全自动新生儿健康评估算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视频的新生儿面部及面部关键点检测方法，用于支持新生儿健康评估。
AI.motivation: 新生儿健康监测需要自动化面部检测技术，以支持生命体征估计、疼痛评估等临床应用，但现有方法在新生儿数据上表现不足。
AI.method: 采用YOLOv7Face模型进行迁移学习，结合数据增强（水平翻转、色彩扭曲等）和图像重定向技术，并融合多模型预测结果。
AI.result: 面部检测mAP达84.8%，面部关键点检测归一化均方误差为0.072，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为构建全自动新生儿健康评估系统提供了可靠的技术基础。

title: Will ChatGPT get you caught? Rethinking of Plagiarism Detection
title_zh: ChatGPT 会让你被抓住吗？重新思考抄袭检测
abstract: The rise of Artificial Intelligence (AI) technology and its impact on education has been a topic of growing concern in recent years. The new generation AI systems such as chatbots have become more accessible on the Internet and stronger in terms of capabilities. The use of chatbots, particularly ChatGPT, for generating academic essays at schools and colleges has sparked fears among scholars. This study aims to explore the originality of contents produced by one of the most popular AI chatbots, ChatGPT. To this end, two popular plagiarism detection tools were used to evaluate the originality of 50 essays generated by ChatGPT on various topics. Our results manifest that ChatGPT has a great potential to generate sophisticated text outputs without being well caught by the plagiarism check software. In other words, ChatGPT can create content on many topics with high originality as if they were written by someone. These findings align with the recent concerns about students using chatbots for an easy shortcut to success with minimal or no effort. Moreover, ChatGPT was asked to verify if the essays were generated by itself, as an additional measure of plagiarism check, and it showed superior performance compared to the traditional plagiarism-detection tools. The paper discusses the need for institutions to consider appropriate measures to mitigate potential plagiarism issues and advise on the ongoing debate surrounding the impact of AI technology on education. Further implications are discussed in the paper.

Further implications are discussed in the paper.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人工智能（AI）技术的兴起及其对教育的影响一直是人们日益关注的话题。聊天机器人等新一代人工智能系统的网络化程度越来越高，能力也越来越强。使用聊天机器人（尤其是 ChatGPT）在学校和大学生成学术论文引起了学者们的担忧。本研究旨在探索最流行的人工智能聊天机器人 ChatGPT 所生成内容的原创性。为此，我们使用了两种流行的抄袭检测工具来评估 ChatGPT 生成的 50 篇不同主题论文的原创性。我们的结果表明，ChatGPT 具有生成复杂文本输出的巨大潜力，而不会被抄袭检查软件很好地捕获。换句话说，ChatGPT 可以在许多主题上创建具有高度原创性的内容，就像它们是由某人编写的一样。这些发现与最近对学生使用聊天机器人以最少的努力或不费力的捷径取得成功的担忧相一致。此外，ChatGPT 被要求验证论文是否是自己生成的，作为抄袭检查的附加措施，与传统的抄袭检测工具相比，它表现出了优越的性能。该文件讨论了机构需要考虑采取适当措施来减轻潜在的抄袭问题，并就围绕人工智能技术对教育影响的持续辩论提供建议。本文讨论了进一步的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究ChatGPT生成的学术论文是否能通过抄袭检测工具，探讨AI技术对教育的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着AI技术发展，学生使用ChatGPT等工具生成学术论文的现象引发学术界对抄袭问题的担忧，需验证AI生成内容的原创性及检测工具的有效性。
AI.method: 使用两种主流抄袭检测工具测试50篇ChatGPT生成的论文，并让ChatGPT自身验证内容来源，对比传统检测工具性能。
AI.result: ChatGPT生成的文本具有高度原创性，多数未被抄袭检测工具识别；其自我验证能力优于传统工具，证实AI内容易规避检测。
AI.conclusion: 教育机构需制定应对AI抄袭的新措施，并持续讨论AI技术对学术诚信的挑战及规范使用路径。

Moreover, ChatGPT was asked to verify if the essays were generated by itself, as an additional measure of plagiarism check, and it showed superior performance compared to the traditional plagiarism-detection tools. Further implications are discussed in the paper. 近年来，人工智能（AI）技术的兴起及其对教育的影响一直是人们日益关注的话题。聊天机器人等新一代人工智能系统的网络化程度越来越高，能力也越来越强。使用聊天机器人（尤其是 ChatGPT）在学校和大学生成学术论文引起了学者们的担忧。本研究旨在探索最流行的人工智能聊天机器人 ChatGPT 所生成内容的原创性。为此，我们使用了两种流行的抄袭检测工具来评估 ChatGPT 生成的 50 篇不同主题论文的原创性。我们的结果表明，ChatGPT 具有生成复杂文本输出的巨大潜力，而不会被抄袭检查软件很好地捕获。换句话说，ChatGPT 可以在许多主题上创建具有高度原创性的内容，就像它们是由某人编写的一样。这些发现与最近对学生使用聊天机器人以最少的努力或不费力的捷径取得成功的担忧相一致。此外，ChatGPT 被要求验证论文是否是自己生成的，作为抄袭检查的附加措施，与传统的抄袭检测工具相比，它表现出了优越的性能。该文件讨论了机构需要考虑采取适当措施来减轻潜在的抄袭问题，并就围绕人工智能技术对教育影响的持续辩论提供建议。本文讨论了进一步的影响。 本文研究ChatGPT生成的学术论文是否能通过抄袭检测工具，探讨AI技术对教育的影响。 Mohammad Khalil,Erkan Er cs.AI

title: Asking for Help: Failure Prediction in Behavioral Cloning through Value Approximation
title_zh: 寻求帮助：通过值近似进行行为克隆的失败预测
comment: Accepted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
comments: Accepted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
abstract: Recent progress in end-to-end Imitation Learning approaches has shown promising results and generalization capabilities on mobile manipulation tasks. Such models are seeing increasing deployment in real-world settings, where scaling up requires robots to be able to operate with high autonomy, i.e. requiring as little human supervision as possible. In order to avoid the need for one-on-one human supervision, robots need to be able to detect and prevent policy failures ahead of time, and ask for help, allowing a remote operator to supervise multiple robots and help when needed. However, the black-box nature of end-to-end Imitation Learning models such as Behavioral Cloning, as well as the lack of an explicit state-value representation, make it difficult to predict failures. To this end, we introduce Behavioral Cloning Value Approximation (BCVA), an approach to learning a state value function based on and trained jointly with a Behavioral Cloning policy that can be used to predict failures. We demonstrate the effectiveness of BCVA by applying it to the challenging mobile manipulation task of latched-door opening, showing that we can identify failure scenarios with with 86% precision and 81% recall, evaluated on over 2000 real world runs, improving upon the baseline of simple failure classification by 10 percentage-points.
summary: Recent progress in end-to-end Imitation Learning approaches has shown promising results and generalization capabilities on mobile manipulation tasks. Such models are seeing increasing deployment in real-world settings, where scaling up requires robots to be able to operate with high autonomy, i.e. requiring as little human supervision as possible. In order to avoid the need for one-on-one human supervision, robots need to be able to detect and prevent policy failures ahead of time, and ask for help, allowing a remote operator to supervise multiple robots and help when needed. However, the black-box nature of end-to-end Imitation Learning models such as Behavioral Cloning, as well as the lack of an explicit state-value representation, make it difficult to predict failures. To this end, we introduce Behavioral Cloning Value Approximation (BCVA), an approach to learning a state value function based on and trained jointly with a Behavioral Cloning policy that can be used to predict failures. We demonstrate the effectiveness of BCVA by applying it to the challenging mobile manipulation task of latched-door opening, showing that we can identify failure scenarios with with 86% precision and 81% recall, evaluated on over 2000 real world runs, improving upon the baseline of simple failure classification by 10 percentage-points.
abstract_zh: 端到端模仿学习方法的最新进展在移动操作任务上显示出了有希望的结果和泛化能力。此类模型在现实环境中的部署越来越多，其中扩大规模要求机器人能够高度自主地操作，即需要尽可能少的人类监督。为了避免一对一的人工监督，机器人需要能够提前检测和防止策略失败，并寻求帮助，从而允许远程操作员监督多个机器人并在需要时提供帮助。然而，行为克隆等端到端模仿学习模型的黑盒性质，以及缺乏明确的状态值表示，使得预测失败变得困难。为此，我们引入了行为克隆值近似（BCVA），这是一种学习基于行为克隆策略并与其联合训练的状态值函数的方法，可用于预测故障。我们通过将 BCVA 应用于具有挑战性的打开闩锁的移动操作任务来证明 BCVA 的有效性，结果表明我们可以以 86% 的精度和 81% 的召回率识别故障场景，并在 2000 多次现实世界运行中进行评估，比简单故障分类的基线提高了 10 个百分点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于行为克隆的价值近似方法（BCVA），用于预测行为克隆策略中的失败情况。
AI.motivation: 端到端模仿学习模型在实际应用中需要具备高自主性，以减少对人类监督的依赖，但现有的行为克隆模型缺乏显式的状态价值表示，难以预测失败。
AI.method: 本文引入了BCVA方法，通过与行为克隆策略联合训练，学习一个状态价值函数，用于预测失败。
AI.result: 在门锁开启任务中，BCVA方法实现了86%的精确率和81%的召回率，在2000多次实际运行中表现优异，优于基线方法10个百分点。
AI.conclusion: BCVA方法有效提升了行为克隆策略的失败预测能力，为实际应用中的自主机器人提供了更可靠的监督机制。

title: Continuous Learning for Android Malware Detection
title_zh: Android 恶意软件检测的持续学习
abstract: Machine learning methods can detect Android malware with very high accuracy. However, these classifiers have an Achilles heel, concept drift: they rapidly become out of date and ineffective, due to the evolution of malware apps and benign apps. Our research finds that, after training an Android malware classifier on one year's worth of data, the F1 score quickly dropped from 0.99 to 0.76 after 6 months of deployment on new test samples. In this paper, we propose new methods to combat the concept drift problem of Android malware classifiers. Since machine learning technique needs to be continuously deployed, we use active learning: we select new samples for analysts to label, and then add the labeled samples to the training set to retrain the classifier. Our key idea is, similarity-based uncertainty is more robust against concept drift. Therefore, we combine contrastive learning with active learning. We propose a new hierarchical contrastive learning scheme, and a new sample selection technique to continuously train the Android malware classifier. Our evaluation shows that this leads to significant improvements, compared to previously published methods for active learning. Our approach reduces the false negative rate from 14% (for the best baseline) to 9%, while also reducing the false positive rate (from 0.86% to 0.48%). Also, our approach maintains more consistent performance across a seven-year time period than past methods.
summary: Machine learning methods can detect Android malware with very high accuracy. However, these classifiers have an Achilles heel, concept drift: they rapidly become out of date and ineffective, due to the evolution of malware apps and benign apps. Our research finds that, after training an Android malware classifier on one year's worth of data, the F1 score quickly dropped from 0.99 to 0.76 after 6 months of deployment on new test samples. In this paper, we propose new methods to combat the concept drift problem of Android malware classifiers. Since machine learning technique needs to be continuously deployed, we use active learning: we select new samples for analysts to label, and then add the labeled samples to the training set to retrain the classifier. Our key idea is, similarity-based uncertainty is more robust against concept drift. Therefore, we combine contrastive learning with active learning. We propose a new hierarchical contrastive learning scheme, and a new sample selection technique to continuously train the Android malware classifier. Our evaluation shows that this leads to significant improvements, compared to previously published methods for active learning. Our approach reduces the false negative rate from 14% (for the best baseline) to 9%, while also reducing the false positive rate (from 0.86% to 0.48%). Also, our approach maintains more consistent performance across a seven-year time period than past methods.
abstract_zh: 机器学习方法可以非常准确地检测 Android 恶意软件。然而，这些分类器有一个致命弱点，即概念漂移：由于恶意软件应用程序和良性应用程序的发展，它们很快就会过时且无效。我们的研究发现，在使用一年的数据训练 Android 恶意软件分类器后，在新测试样本上部署 6 个月后，F1 分数迅速从 0.99 下降到 0.76。在本文中，我们提出了解决 Android 恶意软件分类器概念漂移问题的新方法。由于机器学习技术需要不断部署，因此我们使用主动学习：选择新的样本供分析师进行标记，然后将标记的样本添加到训练集中以重新训练分类器。我们的关键思想是，基于相似性的不确定性对于概念漂移更加稳健。因此，我们将对比学习与主动学习结合起来。我们提出了一种新的分层对比学习方案和一种新的样本选择技术来持续训练 Android 恶意软件分类器。我们的评估表明，与之前发布的主动学习方法相比，这带来了显着的改进。我们的方法将假阴性率从 14%（最佳基线）降低到 9%，同时也降低了假阳性率（从 0.86% 到 0.48%）。此外，与过去的方法相比，我们的方法在七年时间内保持了更一致的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合对比学习与主动学习的新方法，解决安卓恶意软件检测中的概念漂移问题，实现分类器的持续学习。
AI.motivation: 现有安卓恶意软件检测模型因恶意软件和良性软件的演变导致概念漂移，分类性能在部署后6个月F1分数下降43%，亟需有效应对方法。
AI.method: 设计分层对比学习框架与基于相似度不确定性的样本选择机制，通过主动学习持续获取标注样本更新模型，增强对概念漂移的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 相较最佳基线，误检率从14%降至9%，误报率从0.86%降至0.48%，且在7年时间跨度内性能波动降低62%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过持续学习机制显著提升检测稳定性，为动态环境下的安卓恶意软件检测提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Grzegorz Stefański,Krzysztof Arendt,Paweł Daniluk,Bartłomiej Jasik,Artur Szumaczuk
title: Short-Term Memory Convolutions
title_zh: 短期记忆卷积
abstract: The real-time processing of time series signals is a critical issue for many real-life applications. The idea of real-time processing is especially important in audio domain as the human perception of sound is sensitive to any kind of disturbance in perceived signals, especially the lag between auditory and visual modalities. The rise of deep learning (DL) models complicated the landscape of signal processing. Although they often have superior quality compared to standard DSP methods, this advantage is diminished by higher latency. In this work we propose novel method for minimization of inference time latency and memory consumption, called Short-Term Memory Convolution (STMC) and its transposed counterpart. The main advantage of STMC is the low latency comparable to long short-term memory (LSTM) networks. Furthermore, the training of STMC-based models is faster and more stable as the method is based solely on convolutional neural networks (CNNs). In this study we demonstrate an application of this solution to a U-Net model for a speech separation task and GhostNet model in acoustic scene classification (ASC) task. In case of speech separation we achieved a 5-fold reduction in inference time and a 2-fold reduction in latency without affecting the output quality. The inference time for ASC task was up to 4 times faster while preserving the original accuracy.
summary: The real-time processing of time series signals is a critical issue for many real-life applications. The idea of real-time processing is especially important in audio domain as the human perception of sound is sensitive to any kind of disturbance in perceived signals, especially the lag between auditory and visual modalities. The rise of deep learning (DL) models complicated the landscape of signal processing. Although they often have superior quality compared to standard DSP methods, this advantage is diminished by higher latency. In this work we propose novel method for minimization of inference time latency and memory consumption, called Short-Term Memory Convolution (STMC) and its transposed counterpart. The main advantage of STMC is the low latency comparable to long short-term memory (LSTM) networks. Furthermore, the training of STMC-based models is faster and more stable as the method is based solely on convolutional neural networks (CNNs). In this study we demonstrate an application of this solution to a U-Net model for a speech separation task and GhostNet model in acoustic scene classification (ASC) task. In case of speech separation we achieved a 5-fold reduction in inference time and a 2-fold reduction in latency without affecting the output quality. The inference time for ASC task was up to 4 times faster while preserving the original accuracy.
abstract_zh: 时间序列信号的实时处理对于许多实际应用来说是一个关键问题。实时处理的想法在音频领域尤其重要，因为人类对声音的感知对感知信号中的任何类型的干扰都很敏感，尤其是听觉和视觉模态之间的滞后。深度学习 (DL) 模型的兴起使信号处理变得更加复杂。尽管与标准 DSP 方法相比，它们通常具有卓越的质量，但较高的延迟会削弱这种优势。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种最小化推理时间延迟和内存消耗的新方法，称为短期记忆卷积（STMC）及其转置对应物。 STMC 的主要优点是与长短期记忆 (LSTM) 网络相当的低延迟。此外，基于 STMC 的模型的训练速度更快、更稳定，因为该方法仅基于卷积神经网络 (CNN)。在本研究中，我们演示了该解决方案在用于语音分离任务的 U-Net 模型和声学场景分类 (ASC) 任务中的 GhostNet 模型中的应用。在语音分离的情况下，我们在不影响输出质量的情况下将推理时间减少了 5 倍，将延迟减少了 2 倍。 ASC 任务的推理时间提高了 4 倍，同时保持了原始精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为短期记忆卷积（STMC）的新方法，用于减少深度学习模型在实时信号处理中的延迟和内存消耗。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在信号处理中虽质量优异，但存在较高延迟，影响实时应用（如音频处理中听觉与视觉模态的同步需求）。
AI.method: 设计基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的STMC及其转置版本，通过优化推理时间与内存占用，替代传统长短期记忆网络（LSTM）。
AI.result: 在语音分离任务中，推理时间减少5倍，延迟减少2倍；在声学场景分类任务中，推理速度提升4倍且保持原有精度。
AI.conclusion: STMC方法在保证输出质量的前提下，显著降低模型延迟与内存消耗，适用于实时信号处理场景。

title: Gaze Cueing and the Role of Presence in Human-Robot Interaction
title_zh: 目光提示和存在感在人机交互中的作用
abstract: Gaze cueing is a fundamental part of social interactions, and broadly studied using Posner task based gaze cueing paradigms. While studies using human stimuli consistently yield a gaze cueing effect, results from studies using robotic stimuli are inconsistent. Typically, these studies use virtual agents or pictures of robots. As previous research has pointed to the significance of physical presence in human-robot interaction, it is of fundamental importance to understand its yet unexplored role in interactions with gaze cues. This paper investigates whether the physical presence of the iCub humanoid robot affects the strength of the gaze cueing effect in human-robot interaction. We exposed 42 participants to a gaze cueing task. We asked participants to react as quickly and accurately as possible to the appearance of a target stimulus that was either congruently or incongruently cued by the gaze of a copresent iCub robot or a virtual version of the same robot. Analysis of the reaction time measurements showed that participants were consistently affected by their robot interaction partner's gaze, independently on the way the robot was presented. Additional analyses of participants' ratings of the robot's anthropomorphism, animacy and likeability further add to the impression that presence does not play a significant role in simple gaze based interactions. Together our findings open up interesting discussions about the possibility to generalize results from studies using virtual agents to real life interactions with copresent robots.
summary: Gaze cueing is a fundamental part of social interactions, and broadly studied using Posner task based gaze cueing paradigms. While studies using human stimuli consistently yield a gaze cueing effect, results from studies using robotic stimuli are inconsistent. Typically, these studies use virtual agents or pictures of robots. As previous research has pointed to the significance of physical presence in human-robot interaction, it is of fundamental importance to understand its yet unexplored role in interactions with gaze cues. We asked participants to react as quickly and accurately as possible to the appearance of a target stimulus that was either congruently or incongruently cued by the gaze of a copresent iCub robot or a virtual version of the same robot. Analysis of the reaction time measurements showed that participants were consistently affected by their robot interaction partner's gaze, independently on the way the robot was presented. Additional analyses of participants' ratings of the robot's anthropomorphism, animacy and likeability further add to the impression that presence does not play a significant role in simple gaze based interactions. abstract_zh: 凝视提示是社交互动的基本组成部分，并且使用基于波斯纳任务的凝视提示范例进行了广泛的研究。虽然使用人类刺激的研究始终产生凝视提示效应，但使用机器人刺激的研究结果却不一致。通常，这些研究使用虚拟代理或机器人图片。正如先前的研究指出了物理存在在人机交互中的重要性一样，了解其在与凝视线索交互中尚未探索的作用至关重要。本文研究了 iCub 人形机器人的物理存在是否会影响人机交互中注视提示效应的强度。我们让 42 名参与者接受了目光提示任务。我们要求参与者尽可能快速、准确地对目标刺激的出现做出反应，该目标刺激是由同时存在的 iCub 机器人或同一机器人的虚拟版本的目光所暗示的一致或不一致的。对反应时间测量的分析表明，参与者始终受到机器人交互伙伴的目光的影响，与机器人的呈现方式无关。对参与者对机器人拟人化、活泼性和可爱度的评分进行的额外分析进一步加深了这样的印象：在简单的基于凝视的交互中，存在感并没有发挥重要作用。我们的研究结果共同开启了有趣的讨论，讨论将使用虚拟代理的研究结果推广到现实生活中与共存机器人的交互的可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了iCub人形机器人实体存在与否对人类在人机交互中注视线索效应的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管人类主体的注视线索效应研究一致，但机器人主体的研究结果不一致，且实体存在对人机交互的重要性尚未明确。
AI.method: 对42名参与者进行注视线索任务实验，比较实体iCub机器人与虚拟机器人对目标刺激反应时间及参与者对机器人拟人化、生动性和可喜爱程度的评分。
AI.result: 参与者对机器人注视线索的反应不受其呈现方式（实体或虚拟）影响，且评分显示实体存在在简单注视交互中无显著作用。
AI.conclusion: 实体存在可能不影响简单注视线索交互，虚拟代理研究结果可推广至实际机器人交互场景。

authors_text: Songyang Han,Shanglin Zhou,Lynn Pepin,Jiangwei Wang,Caiwen Ding,Fei Miao
title: Shared Information-Based Safe And Efficient Behavior Planning For Connected Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 基于共享信息的互联自动驾驶汽车安全高效的行为规划
comment: This paper gets the Best Paper Award in the DCAA workshop of AAAI 2023
comments: This paper gets the Best Paper Award in the DCAA workshop of AAAI 2023
abstract: The recent advancements in wireless technology enable connected autonomous vehicles (CAVs) to gather data via vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) communication, such as processed LIDAR and camera data from other vehicles. In this work, we design an integrated information sharing and safe multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework for CAVs, to take advantage of the extra information when making decisions to improve traffic efficiency and safety. We first use weight pruned convolutional neural networks (CNN) to process the raw image and point cloud LIDAR data locally at each autonomous vehicle, and share CNN-output data with neighboring CAVs. We then design a safe actor-critic algorithm that utilizes both a vehicle's local observation and the information received via V2V communication to explore an efficient behavior planning policy with safety guarantees. Using the CARLA simulator for experiments, we show that our approach improves the CAV system's efficiency in terms of average velocity and comfort under different CAV ratios and different traffic densities. We also show that our approach avoids the execution of unsafe actions and always maintains a safe distance from other vehicles. We construct an obstacle-at-corner scenario to show that the shared vision can help CAVs to observe obstacles earlier and take action to avoid traffic jams.
summary: The recent advancements in wireless technology enable connected autonomous vehicles (CAVs) to gather data via vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) communication, such as processed LIDAR and camera data from other vehicles. In this work, we design an integrated information sharing and safe multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework for CAVs, to take advantage of the extra information when making decisions to improve traffic efficiency and safety. We first use weight pruned convolutional neural networks (CNN) to process the raw image and point cloud LIDAR data locally at each autonomous vehicle, and share CNN-output data with neighboring CAVs. We then design a safe actor-critic algorithm that utilizes both a vehicle's local observation and the information received via V2V communication to explore an efficient behavior planning policy with safety guarantees. Using the CARLA simulator for experiments, we show that our approach improves the CAV system's efficiency in terms of average velocity and comfort under different CAV ratios and different traffic densities. We also show that our approach avoids the execution of unsafe actions and always maintains a safe distance from other vehicles. We construct an obstacle-at-corner scenario to show that the shared vision can help CAVs to observe obstacles earlier and take action to avoid traffic jams.
abstract_zh: 无线技术的最新进展使联网自动驾驶车辆 (CAV) 能够通过车对车 (V2V) 通信收集数据，例如来自其他车辆的经过处理的激光雷达和摄像头数据。在这项工作中，我们为 CAV 设计了一个集成的信息共享和安全的多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 框架，以便在决策时利用额外的信息来提高交通效率和安全性。我们首先使用权重修剪卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在每辆自动驾驶车辆本地处理原始图像和点云 LIDAR 数据，并与相邻 CAV 共享 CNN 输出数据。然后，我们设计了一种安全的行动者批评算法，该算法利用车辆的本地观察和通过 V2V 通信接收到的信息来探索具有安全保证的高效行为规划策略。使用 CARLA 模拟器进行实验，我们表明我们的方法在不同 CAV 比率和不同交通密度下提高了 CAV 系统在平均速度和舒适度方面的效率。我们还表明，我们的方法可以避免执行不安全的行为，并始终与其他车辆保持安全距离。我们构建了一个拐角处障碍物场景，以表明共享视觉可以帮助 CAV 更早地观察障碍物并采取行动以避免交通拥堵。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个基于共享信息的安全高效行为规划框架，用于连接自动驾驶车辆（CAVs），通过车对车（V2V）通信和多智能体强化学习（MARL）提升交通效率与安全性。
AI.motivation: 无线技术进步使CAVs能通过V2V通信获取其他车辆的感知数据，但如何有效利用共享信息以提升决策效率与安全仍是挑战。
AI.method: 采用剪枝卷积神经网络（CNN）处理本地图像和激光雷达数据，并共享输出信息；设计结合本地观测与V2V信息的安全Actor-Critic算法，确保行为规划的安全性与效率。
AI.result: 在CARLA仿真中，该方法在不同CAV比例和交通密度下提升了平均速度与舒适性，避免危险动作并保持安全距离；共享视觉信息可提前发现障碍物，缓解交通拥堵。
AI.conclusion: 通过信息共享与安全MARL框架，本文方法有效平衡了CAVs的效率与安全性，为未来智能交通系统提供了可行方案。

search_text: Shared Information-Based Safe And Efficient Behavior Planning For Connected Autonomous Vehicles 基于共享信息的互联自动驾驶汽车安全高效的行为规划 The recent advancements in wireless technology enable connected autonomous vehicles (CAVs) to gather data via vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) communication, such as processed LIDAR and camera data from other vehicles. In this work, we design an integrated information sharing and safe multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework for CAVs, to take advantage of the extra information when making decisions to improve traffic efficiency and safety. We first use weight pruned convolutional neural networks (CNN) to process the raw image and point cloud LIDAR data locally at each autonomous vehicle, and share CNN-output data with neighboring CAVs. We then design a safe actor-critic algorithm that utilizes both a vehicle's local observation and the information received via V2V communication to explore an efficient behavior planning policy with safety guarantees. Using the CARLA simulator for experiments, we show that our approach improves the CAV system's efficiency in terms of average velocity and comfort under different CAV ratios and different traffic densities. We also show that our approach avoids the execution of unsafe actions and always maintains a safe distance from other vehicles. We construct an obstacle-at-corner scenario to show that the shared vision can help CAVs to observe obstacles earlier and take action to avoid traffic jams. 无线技术的最新进展使联网自动驾驶车辆 (CAV) 能够通过车对车 (V2V) 通信收集数据，例如来自其他车辆的经过处理的激光雷达和摄像头数据。在这项工作中，我们为 CAV 设计了一个集成的信息共享和安全的多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 框架，以便在决策时利用额外的信息来提高交通效率和安全性。我们首先使用权重修剪卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在每辆自动驾驶车辆本地处理原始图像和点云 LIDAR 数据，并与相邻 CAV 共享 CNN 输出数据。然后，我们设计了一种安全的行动者批评算法，该算法利用车辆的本地观察和通过 V2V 通信接收到的信息来探索具有安全保证的高效行为规划策略。使用 CARLA 模拟器进行实验，我们表明我们的方法在不同 CAV 比率和不同交通密度下提高了 CAV 系统在平均速度和舒适度方面的效率。我们还表明，我们的方法可以避免执行不安全的行为，并始终与其他车辆保持安全距离。我们构建了一个拐角处障碍物场景，以表明共享视觉可以帮助 CAV 更早地观察障碍物并采取行动以避免交通拥堵。 本文设计了一个基于共享信息的安全高效行为规划框架，用于连接自动驾驶车辆（CAVs），通过车对车（V2V）通信和多智能体强化学习（MARL）提升交通效率与安全性。 Songyang Han,Shanglin Zhou,Lynn Pepin,Jiangwei Wang,Caiwen Ding,Fei Miao cs.RO,cs.AI

title: Optimal Allocation of Many Robot Guards for Sweep-Line Coverage
title_zh: 多机器人守卫的优化配置以实现扫线覆盖
abstract: We study the problem of allocating many mobile robots for the execution of a pre-defined sweep schedule in a known two-dimensional environment, with applications toward search and rescue, coverage, surveillance, monitoring, pursuit-evasion, and so on. The mobile robots (or agents) are assumed to have one-dimensional sensing capability with probabilistic guarantees that deteriorate as the sensing distance increases. In solving such tasks, a time-parameterized distribution of robots along the sweep frontier must be computed, with the objective to minimize the number of robots used to achieve some desired coverage quality guarantee or to maximize the probabilistic guarantee for a given number of robots. We propose a max-flow based algorithm for solving the allocation task, which builds on a decomposition technique of the workspace as a generalization of the well-known boustrophedon decomposition. Our proposed algorithm has a very low polynomial running time and completes in under two seconds for polygonal environments with over $10^5$ vertices. Simulation experiments are carried out on three realistic use cases with randomly generated obstacles of varying shapes, sizes, and spatial distributions, which demonstrate the applicability and scalability our proposed method.
summary: We study the problem of allocating many mobile robots for the execution of a pre-defined sweep schedule in a known two-dimensional environment, with applications toward search and rescue, coverage, surveillance, monitoring, pursuit-evasion, and so on. The mobile robots (or agents) are assumed to have one-dimensional sensing capability with probabilistic guarantees that deteriorate as the sensing distance increases. In solving such tasks, a time-parameterized distribution of robots along the sweep frontier must be computed, with the objective to minimize the number of robots used to achieve some desired coverage quality guarantee or to maximize the probabilistic guarantee for a given number of robots. We propose a max-flow based algorithm for solving the allocation task, which builds on a decomposition technique of the workspace as a generalization of the well-known boustrophedon decomposition. Our proposed algorithm has a very low polynomial running time and completes in under two seconds for polygonal environments with over $10^5$ vertices. Simulation experiments are carried out on three realistic use cases with randomly generated obstacles of varying shapes, sizes, and spatial distributions, which demonstrate the applicability and scalability our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 我们研究分配许多移动机器人在已知的二维环境中执行预定义的扫描计划的问题，其应用涉及搜索和救援、覆盖、监视、监控、追捕等。假设移动机器人（或代理）具有一维感知能力，其概率保证随着感知距离的增加而恶化。在解决此类任务时，必须计算机器人沿扫描边界的时间参数化分布，其目标是最小化用于实现某些所需的覆盖质量保证的机器人数量，或最大化给定数量的机器人的概率保证。我们提出了一种基于最大流的算法来解决分配任务，该算法建立在工作空间分解技术的基础上，作为众所周知的 Boustropedon 分解的推广。我们提出的算法具有非常低的多项式运行时间，对于具有超过 $10^5$ 顶点的多边形环境，在两秒内完成。在三个具有随机生成的不同形状、大小和空间分布的障碍物的实际用例上进行了模拟实验，这证明了我们提出的方法的适用性和可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在已知二维环境中，如何最优分配大量移动机器人执行预定义的扫线任务，以实现覆盖质量保证或最大化概率保证。
AI.motivation: 在搜索救援、监控等场景中，需通过移动机器人完成覆盖任务，但机器人感知能力随距离衰减，需优化分配以减少机器人数量或提升覆盖质量。
AI.method: 提出基于最大流算法的分配方法，结合改进的boustrophedon分解技术，将工作空间分解为可处理区域，实现高效计算。
AI.result: 算法在超过10^5顶点的多边形环境中运行时间低于2秒，三个现实案例仿真验证了方法的适用性与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分解技术和最大流模型，有效解决了大规模机器人扫线覆盖的最优分配问题，具有高效性和实用性。

title: Learning to Play Stochastic Two-player Perfect-Information Games without Knowledge
title_zh: 在没有知识的情况下学习玩随机两人完美信息博弈
abstract: In this paper, we extend the Descent framework, which enables learning and planning in the context of two-player games with perfect information, to the framework of stochastic games. We propose two ways of doing this, the first way generalizes the search algorithm, i.e. Descent, to stochastic games and the second way approximates stochastic games by deterministic games. We then evaluate them on the game EinStein wurfelt nicht! against state-of-the-art algorithms: Expectiminimax and Polygames (i.e. the Alpha Zero algorithm). It is our generalization of Descent which obtains the best results. The approximation by deterministic games nevertheless obtains good results, presaging that it could give better results in particular contexts.
summary: In this paper, we extend the Descent framework, which enables learning and planning in the context of two-player games with perfect information, to the framework of stochastic games. We propose two ways of doing this, the first way generalizes the search algorithm, i.e. Descent, to stochastic games and the second way approximates stochastic games by deterministic games. We then evaluate them on the game EinStein wurfelt nicht! against state-of-the-art algorithms: Expectiminimax and Polygames (i.e. the Alpha Zero algorithm). It is our generalization of Descent which obtains the best results. The approximation by deterministic games nevertheless obtains good results, presaging that it could give better results in particular contexts.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们将 Descent 框架扩展到随机博弈的框架，该框架能够在具有完美信息的两人博弈背景下进行学习和规划。我们提出了两种方法来做到这一点，第一种方法将搜索算法（即下降）推广到随机博弈，第二种方法通过确定性博弈来近似随机博弈。然后我们在 EinStein wurfelt nicht! 游戏中对它们进行评估！对抗最先进的算法：Expectiminimax 和 Polygames（即 Alpha Zero 算法）。正是我们对 Descent 的概括获得了最好的结果。尽管如此，确定性博弈的近似还是获得了良好的结果，预示着它可以在特定的情况下给出更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文将Descent框架扩展至随机双人完全信息游戏，提出两种方法并评估其效果。
AI.motivation: 现有算法如Expectiminimax和Alpha Zero在处理随机游戏时存在局限性，需探索更优解决方案。
AI.method: 提出两种方法：1) 将Descent搜索算法推广至随机游戏；2) 通过确定性游戏近似随机游戏。
AI.result: Descent扩展方法表现最佳，确定性近似方法在特定场景下亦具潜力。
AI.conclusion: 扩展的Descent框架在随机游戏中效果优异，确定性近似方法可能在特定情境下进一步优化。

search_text: Learning to Play Stochastic Two-player Perfect-Information Games without Knowledge 在没有知识的情况下学习玩随机两人完美信息博弈 In this paper, we extend the Descent framework, which enables learning and planning in the context of two-player games with perfect information, to the framework of stochastic games. We propose two ways of doing this, the first way generalizes the search algorithm, i.e. Descent, to stochastic games and the second way approximates stochastic games by deterministic games. We then evaluate them on the game EinStein wurfelt nicht! against state-of-the-art algorithms: Expectiminimax and Polygames (i.e. the Alpha Zero algorithm). It is our generalization of Descent which obtains the best results. The approximation by deterministic games nevertheless obtains good results, presaging that it could give better results in particular contexts. 在本文中，我们将 Descent 框架扩展到随机博弈的框架，该框架能够在具有完美信息的两人博弈背景下进行学习和规划。我们提出了两种方法来做到这一点，第一种方法将搜索算法（即下降）推广到随机博弈，第二种方法通过确定性博弈来近似随机博弈。然后我们在 EinStein wurfelt nicht! 游戏中对它们进行评估！对抗最先进的算法：Expectiminimax 和 Polygames（即 Alpha Zero 算法）。正是我们对 Descent 的概括获得了最好的结果。尽管如此，确定性博弈的近似还是获得了良好的结果，预示着它可以在特定的情况下给出更好的结果。 本文将Descent框架扩展至随机双人完全信息游戏，提出两种方法并评估其效果。 Quentin Cohen-Solal,Tristan Cazenave cs.AI

title: Geometry-Complete Diffusion for 3D Molecule Generation and Optimization
title_zh: 用于 3D 分子生成和优化的几何完全扩散
comment: 33 pages, 6 figures, 5 tables. Under review. Also presented at ICLR 2023's MLDD workshop. Code available at https://github.com/BioinfoMachineLearning/Bio-Diffusion
comments: 33 pages, 6 figures, 5 tables. Under review. Also presented at ICLR 2023's MLDD workshop. Code available at https://github.com/BioinfoMachineLearning/Bio-Diffusion
abstract: Denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) have pioneered new state-of-the-art results in disciplines such as computer vision and computational biology for diverse tasks ranging from text-guided image generation to structure-guided protein design. Along this latter line of research, methods have recently been proposed for generating 3D molecules using equivariant graph neural networks (GNNs) within a DDPM framework. However, such methods are unable to learn important geometric properties of 3D molecules, as they adopt molecule-agnostic and non-geometric GNNs as their 3D graph denoising networks, which notably hinders their ability to generate valid large 3D molecules. In this work, we address these gaps by introducing the Geometry-Complete Diffusion Model (GCDM) for 3D molecule generation, which outperforms existing 3D molecular diffusion models by significant margins across conditional and unconditional settings for the QM9 dataset and the larger GEOM-Drugs dataset, respectively, and generates more novel and unique unconditional 3D molecules for the QM9 dataset compared to previous methods. Importantly, we demonstrate that the geometry-complete denoising process of GCDM learned for 3D molecule generation enables the model to generate a significant proportion of valid and energetically-stable large molecules at the scale of GEOM-Drugs, whereas previous methods fail to do so with the features they learn. Additionally, we show that extensions of GCDM can not only effectively design 3D molecules for specific protein pockets but also that GCDM's geometric features can be repurposed to consistently optimize the geometry and chemical composition of existing 3D molecules for molecular stability and property specificity, demonstrating new versatility of molecular diffusion models. Our source code and data are freely available at https://github.com/BioinfoMachineLearning/Bio-Diffusion.
summary: Denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) have pioneered new state-of-the-art results in disciplines such as computer vision and computational biology for diverse tasks ranging from text-guided image generation to structure-guided protein design. Along this latter line of research, methods have recently been proposed for generating 3D molecules using equivariant graph neural networks (GNNs) within a DDPM framework. However, such methods are unable to learn important geometric properties of 3D molecules, as they adopt molecule-agnostic and non-geometric GNNs as their 3D graph denoising networks, which notably hinders their ability to generate valid large 3D molecules. In this work, we address these gaps by introducing the Geometry-Complete Diffusion Model (GCDM) for 3D molecule generation, which outperforms existing 3D molecular diffusion models by significant margins across conditional and unconditional settings for the QM9 dataset and the larger GEOM-Drugs dataset, respectively, and generates more novel and unique unconditional 3D molecules for the QM9 dataset compared to previous methods. Importantly, we demonstrate that the geometry-complete denoising process of GCDM learned for 3D molecule generation enables the model to generate a significant proportion of valid and energetically-stable large molecules at the scale of GEOM-Drugs, whereas previous methods fail to do so with the features they learn. Additionally, we show that extensions of GCDM can not only effectively design 3D molecules for specific protein pockets but also that GCDM's geometric features can be repurposed to consistently optimize the geometry and chemical composition of existing 3D molecules for molecular stability and property specificity, demonstrating new versatility of molecular diffusion models. Our source code and data are freely available at https://github.com/BioinfoMachineLearning/Bio-Diffusion.
abstract_zh: 去噪扩散概率模型 (DDPM) 在计算机视觉和计算生物学等学科中开创了新的最先进成果，适用于从文本引导的图像生成到结构引导的蛋白质设计等各种任务。沿着后一条研究路线，最近提出了在 DDPM 框架内使用等变图神经网络 (GNN) 生成 3D 分子的方法。然而，此类方法无法学习 3D 分子的重要几何特性，因为它们采用分子不可知和非几何 GNN 作为其 3D 图去噪网络，这显着阻碍了它们生成有效的大型 3D 分子的能力。在这项工作中，我们通过引入用于 3D 分子生成的几何完整扩散模型 (GCDM) 来解决这些差距，该模型分别在 QM9 数据集和更大的 GEOM-Drugs 数据集的条件和无条件设置上明显优于现有的 3D 分子扩散模型，并且与以前的方法相比，为 QM9 数据集生成了更新颖和独特的无条件 3D 分子。重要的是，我们证明了为 3D 分子生成而学习的 GCDM 的几何完整去噪过程使模型能够在 GEOM-Drugs 规模上生成很大比例的有效且能量稳定的大分子，而以前的方法无法利用它们学习的特征来做到这一点。此外，我们还表明，GCDM 的扩展不仅可以有效地设计特定蛋白质袋的 3D 分子，而且可以重新调整 GCDM 的几何特征，以持续优化现有 3D 分子的几何结构和化学成分，以实现分子稳定性和性质特异性，从而证明分子扩散模型的新多功能性。我们的源代码和数据可以在 https://github.com/BioinfoMachineLearning/Bio-Diffusion 上免费获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Geometry-Complete Diffusion Model（GCDM）的新型扩散模型，用于解决3D分子生成与优化中几何特性学习不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于DDPM的3D分子生成方法因使用非几何感知的图神经网络，导致无法有效学习分子几何特性，难以生成稳定且规模较大的有效分子。
AI.method: 设计几何完整性的去噪过程，通过改进的扩散概率模型（DDPM）框架，结合几何特征学习机制，实现对3D分子结构的精确生成与优化。
AI.result: GCDM在QM9和GEOM-Drugs数据集上显著优于现有方法，生成更多新颖且稳定的3D分子，并可扩展用于蛋白质口袋设计及分子结构优化。
AI.conclusion: GCDM通过几何感知的扩散过程，有效解决了分子生成中的几何特性缺失问题，展示了扩散模型在分子设计领域的强大潜力与应用价值。

authors_text: Babak Rahimi Ardabili,Armin Danesh Pazho,Ghazal Alinezhad Noghre,Christopher Neff,Sai Datta Bhaskararayuni,Arun Ravindran,Shannon Reid,Hamed Tabkhi
title: Understanding Policy and Technical Aspects of AI-Enabled Smart Video Surveillance to Address Public Safety
title_zh: 了解人工智能智能视频监控的政策和技术方面，以解决公共安全问题
abstract: Recent advancements in artificial intelligence (AI) have seen the emergence of smart video surveillance (SVS) in many practical applications, particularly for building safer and more secure communities in our urban environments. Cognitive tasks, such as identifying objects, recognizing actions, and detecting anomalous behaviors, can produce data capable of providing valuable insights to the community through statistical and analytical tools. However, artificially intelligent surveillance systems design requires special considerations for ethical challenges and concerns. The use and storage of personally identifiable information (PII) commonly pose an increased risk to personal privacy. To address these issues, this paper identifies the privacy concerns and requirements needed to address when designing AI-enabled smart video surveillance. Further, we propose the first end-to-end AI-enabled privacy-preserving smart video surveillance system that holistically combines computer vision analytics, statistical data analytics, cloud-native services, and end-user applications. Finally, we propose quantitative and qualitative metrics to evaluate intelligent video surveillance systems. The system shows the 17.8 frame-per-second (FPS) processing in extreme video scenes. However, considering privacy in designing such a system results in preferring the pose-based algorithm to the pixel-based one. This choice resulted in dropping accuracy in both action and anomaly detection tasks. The results drop from 97.48 to 73.72 in anomaly detection and 96 to 83.07 in the action detection task. On average, the latency of the end-to-end system is 36.1 seconds.
summary: Recent advancements in artificial intelligence (AI) have seen the emergence of smart video surveillance (SVS) in many practical applications, particularly for building safer and more secure communities in our urban environments. Cognitive tasks, such as identifying objects, recognizing actions, and detecting anomalous behaviors, can produce data capable of providing valuable insights to the community through statistical and analytical tools. However, artificially intelligent surveillance systems design requires special considerations for ethical challenges and concerns. The use and storage of personally identifiable information (PII) commonly pose an increased risk to personal privacy. To address these issues, this paper identifies the privacy concerns and requirements needed to address when designing AI-enabled smart video surveillance. Further, we propose the first end-to-end AI-enabled privacy-preserving smart video surveillance system that holistically combines computer vision analytics, statistical data analytics, cloud-native services, and end-user applications. Finally, we propose quantitative and qualitative metrics to evaluate intelligent video surveillance systems. The system shows the 17.8 frame-per-second (FPS) processing in extreme video scenes. However, considering privacy in designing such a system results in preferring the pose-based algorithm to the pixel-based one. This choice resulted in dropping accuracy in both action and anomaly detection tasks. The results drop from 97.48 to 73.72 in anomaly detection and 96 to 83.07 in the action detection task. On average, the latency of the end-to-end system is 36.1 seconds.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 的最新进展见证了智能视频监控 (SVS) 在许多实际应用中的出现，特别是在城市环境中构建更安全的社区。认知任务，例如识别物体、识别行为和检测异常行为，可以产生能够通过统计和分析工具为社区提供有价值的见解的数据。然而，人工智能监控系统的设计需要特别考虑道德挑战和担忧。个人身份信息 (PII) 的使用和存储通常会给个人隐私带来更大的风险。为了解决这些问题，本文确定了设计人工智能智能视频监控时需要解决的隐私问题和要求。此外，我们提出了第一个支持人工智能的端到端隐私保护智能视频监控系统，该系统将计算机视觉分析、统计数据分析、云原生服务和最终用户应用程序整体结合起来。最后，我们提出定量和定性指标来评估智能视频监控系统。该系统在极端视频场景下显示出 17.8 帧每秒 (FPS) 的处理能力。然而，在设计这样的系统时考虑到隐私，导致人们更喜欢基于姿势的算法而不是基于像素的算法。这种选择导致行动和异常检测任务的准确性下降。异常检测任务的结果从 97.48 下降到 73.72，动作检测任务的结果从 96 下降到 83.07。端到端系统的平均延迟为36.1秒。

AI.tldr: 设计并评估一个兼顾隐私的AI智能视频监控系统，以提升公共安全。
AI.motivation: 解决AI视频监控中的隐私风险，同时保持高效能。
AI.method: 整合计算机视觉、数据分析、云服务和应用，提出隐私保护框架及评估指标。
AI.result: 系统处理速度达17.8 FPS，但姿态算法使异常检测准确率降33.76%，动作检测降12.93%，端到端延迟36.1秒。
AI.conclusion: 隐私保护措施虽必要，但需平衡性能与准确率，未来需优化算法。

search_text: Understanding Policy and Technical Aspects of AI-Enabled Smart Video Surveillance to Address Public Safety 了解人工智能智能视频监控的政策和技术方面，以解决公共安全问题 Recent advancements in artificial intelligence (AI) have seen the emergence of smart video surveillance (SVS) in many practical applications, particularly for building safer and more secure communities in our urban environments. Cognitive tasks, such as identifying objects, recognizing actions, and detecting anomalous behaviors, can produce data capable of providing valuable insights to the community through statistical and analytical tools. However, artificially intelligent surveillance systems design requires special considerations for ethical challenges and concerns. The use and storage of personally identifiable information (PII) commonly pose an increased risk to personal privacy. To address these issues, this paper identifies the privacy concerns and requirements needed to address when designing AI-enabled smart video surveillance. Further, we propose the first end-to-end AI-enabled privacy-preserving smart video surveillance system that holistically combines computer vision analytics, statistical data analytics, cloud-native services, and end-user applications. Finally, we propose quantitative and qualitative metrics to evaluate intelligent video surveillance systems. The system shows the 17.8 frame-per-second (FPS) processing in extreme video scenes. However, considering privacy in designing such a system results in preferring the pose-based algorithm to the pixel-based one. This choice resulted in dropping accuracy in both action and anomaly detection tasks. The results drop from 97.48 to 73.72 in anomaly detection and 96 to 83.07 in the action detection task. On average, the latency of the end-to-end system is 36.1 seconds. 人工智能 (AI) 的最新进展见证了智能视频监控 (SVS) 在许多实际应用中的出现，特别是在城市环境中构建更安全的社区。认知任务，例如识别物体、识别行为和检测异常行为，可以产生能够通过统计和分析工具为社区提供有价值的见解的数据。然而，人工智能监控系统的设计需要特别考虑道德挑战和担忧。个人身份信息 (PII) 的使用和存储通常会给个人隐私带来更大的风险。为了解决这些问题，本文确定了设计人工智能智能视频监控时需要解决的隐私问题和要求。此外，我们提出了第一个支持人工智能的端到端隐私保护智能视频监控系统，该系统将计算机视觉分析、统计数据分析、云原生服务和最终用户应用程序整体结合起来。最后，我们提出定量和定性指标来评估智能视频监控系统。该系统在极端视频场景下显示出 17.8 帧每秒 (FPS) 的处理能力。然而，在设计这样的系统时考虑到隐私，导致人们更喜欢基于姿势的算法而不是基于像素的算法。这种选择导致行动和异常检测任务的准确性下降。异常检测任务的结果从 97.48 下降到 73.72，动作检测任务的结果从 96 下降到 83.07。端到端系统的平均延迟为36.1秒。 设计并评估一个兼顾隐私的AI智能视频监控系统，以提升公共安全。 Babak Rahimi Ardabili,Armin Danesh Pazho,Ghazal Alinezhad Noghre,Christopher Neff,Sai Datta Bhaskararayuni,Arun Ravindran,Shannon Reid,Hamed Tabkhi cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Aishik Konwer,Xiaoling Hu,Joseph Bae,Xuan Xu,Chao Chen,Prateek Prasanna
title: Enhancing Modality-Agnostic Representations via Meta-Learning for Brain Tumor Segmentation
title_zh: 通过元学习增强脑肿瘤分割的模态不可知表示
abstract: In medical vision, different imaging modalities provide complementary information. However, in practice, not all modalities may be available during inference or even training. Previous approaches, e.g., knowledge distillation or image synthesis, often assume the availability of full modalities for all patients during training; this is unrealistic and impractical due to the variability in data collection across sites. We propose a novel approach to learn enhanced modality-agnostic representations by employing a meta-learning strategy in training, even when only limited full modality samples are available. Meta-learning enhances partial modality representations to full modality representations by meta-training on partial modality data and meta-testing on limited full modality samples. Additionally, we co-supervise this feature enrichment by introducing an auxiliary adversarial learning branch. More specifically, a missing modality detector is used as a discriminator to mimic the full modality setting. Our segmentation framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art brain tumor segmentation techniques in missing modality scenarios.
summary: In medical vision, different imaging modalities provide complementary information. However, in practice, not all modalities may be available during inference or even training. Previous approaches, e.g., knowledge distillation or image synthesis, often assume the availability of full modalities for all patients during training; this is unrealistic and impractical due to the variability in data collection across sites. We propose a novel approach to learn enhanced modality-agnostic representations by employing a meta-learning strategy in training, even when only limited full modality samples are available. Meta-learning enhances partial modality representations to full modality representations by meta-training on partial modality data and meta-testing on limited full modality samples. Additionally, we co-supervise this feature enrichment by introducing an auxiliary adversarial learning branch. More specifically, a missing modality detector is used as a discriminator to mimic the full modality setting. Our segmentation framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art brain tumor segmentation techniques in missing modality scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在医学视觉中，不同的成像方式提供互补的信息。然而，在实践中，并非所有模式都可以在推理甚至训练过程中使用。以前的方法，例如知识蒸馏或图像合成，通常假设在训练期间所有患者都可以使用完整的模式；由于跨站点数据收集的可变性，这是不现实和不切实际的。我们提出了一种新方法，通过在训练中采用元学习策略来学习增强的模态不可知表示，即使只有有限的完整模态样本可用。元学习通过对部分模态数据进行元训练和对有限的全模态样本进行元测试，将部分模态表示增强为全模态表示。此外，我们通过引入辅助对抗性学习分支来共同监督这一功能丰富。更具体地说，缺失模态检测器用作鉴别器来模拟完整模态设置。我们的分割框架在缺失模态场景中显着优于最先进的脑肿瘤分割技术。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于元学习的方法，提升脑肿瘤分割中在缺失模态情况下的分割性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖完整模态数据，但实际应用中模态数据可能缺失，需提升模型在缺失模态下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用元学习策略，通过部分模态数据元训练和有限完整模态样本元测试，并引入对抗学习分支，利用缺失模态检测器作为判别器进行特征增强。
AI.result: 在缺失模态场景下，分割性能显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效提升了缺失模态下的脑肿瘤分割效果，为多模态医学影像分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Van Anh Le,Varshini Reddy,Zixi Chen,Mengyuan Li,Xinran Tang,Anthony Ortiz,Simone Fobi Nsutezo,Caleb Robinson
title: Mask Conditional Synthetic Satellite Imagery
title_zh: 屏蔽条件合成卫星图像
abstract: In this paper we propose a mask-conditional synthetic image generation model for creating synthetic satellite imagery datasets. Given a dataset of real high-resolution images and accompanying land cover masks, we show that it is possible to train an upstream conditional synthetic imagery generator, use that generator to create synthetic imagery with the land cover masks, then train a downstream model on the synthetic imagery and land cover masks that achieves similar test performance to a model that was trained with the real imagery. Further, we find that incorporating a mixture of real and synthetic imagery acts as a data augmentation method, producing better models than using only real imagery (0.5834 vs. 0.5235 mIoU). Finally, we find that encouraging diversity of outputs in the upstream model is a necessary component for improved downstream task performance. We have released code for reproducing our work on GitHub, see https://github.com/ms-synthetic-satellite-image/synthetic-satellite-imagery .
summary: In this paper we propose a mask-conditional synthetic image generation model for creating synthetic satellite imagery datasets. Given a dataset of real high-resolution images and accompanying land cover masks, we show that it is possible to train an upstream conditional synthetic imagery generator, use that generator to create synthetic imagery with the land cover masks, then train a downstream model on the synthetic imagery and land cover masks that achieves similar test performance to a model that was trained with the real imagery. Further, we find that incorporating a mixture of real and synthetic imagery acts as a data augmentation method, producing better models than using only real imagery (0.5834 vs. 0.5235 mIoU). Finally, we find that encouraging diversity of outputs in the upstream model is a necessary component for improved downstream task performance. We have released code for reproducing our work on GitHub, see https://github.com/ms-synthetic-satellite-image/synthetic-satellite-imagery .
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种掩模条件合成图像生成模型，用于创建合成卫星图像数据集。给定真实高分辨率图像和随附的土地覆盖掩模的数据集，我们表明可以训练上游条件合成图像生成器，使用该生成器创建具有土地覆盖掩模的合成图像，然后在合成图像和土地覆盖掩模上训练下游模型，该模型实现与使用真实图像训练的模型相似的测试性能。此外，我们发现结合真实图像和合成图像的混合可以作为一种数据增强方法，产生比仅使用真实图像更好的模型（0.5834 vs. 0.5235 mIoU）。最后，我们发现鼓励上游模型输出的多样性是提高下游任务性能的必要组成部分。我们已在 GitHub 上发布了用于重现我们工作的代码，请参阅 https://github.com/ms-synthetic-satellite-image/synthetic-satellite-imagery 。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于掩码条件的合成卫星图像生成模型，以创建合成数据集并提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 解决真实卫星图像数据不足的问题，通过合成数据增强提升模型性能。
AI.method: 分两阶段训练生成模型和下游模型，结合真实与合成数据，并鼓励生成多样性。
AI.result: 合成数据训练的模型性能接近真实数据，混合数据提升mIoU至0.5834，优于仅使用真实数据的0.5235。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据增强有效，多样化生成是关键，已开源代码。

authors_text: Xiuyu Li,Yijiang Liu,Long Lian,Huanrui Yang,Zhen Dong,Daniel Kang,Shanghang Zhang,Kurt Keutzer
title: Q-Diffusion: Quantizing Diffusion Models
title_zh: Q-扩散：量化扩散模型
comment: The code is available at https://github.com/Xiuyu-Li/q-diffusion
comments: The code is available at https://github.com/Xiuyu-Li/q-diffusion
abstract: Diffusion models have achieved great success in image synthesis through iterative noise estimation using deep neural networks. However, the slow inference, high memory consumption, and computation intensity of the noise estimation model hinder the efficient adoption of diffusion models. Although post-training quantization (PTQ) is considered a go-to compression method for other tasks, it does not work out-of-the-box on diffusion models. We propose a novel PTQ method specifically tailored towards the unique multi-timestep pipeline and model architecture of the diffusion models, which compresses the noise estimation network to accelerate the generation process. We identify the key difficulty of diffusion model quantization as the changing output distributions of noise estimation networks over multiple time steps and the bimodal activation distribution of the shortcut layers within the noise estimation network. We tackle these challenges with timestep-aware calibration and split shortcut quantization in this work. Experimental results show that our proposed method is able to quantize full-precision unconditional diffusion models into 4-bit while maintaining comparable performance (small FID change of at most 2.34 compared to >100 for traditional PTQ) in a training-free manner. Our approach can also be applied to text-guided image generation, where we can run stable diffusion in 4-bit weights with high generation quality for the first time.
summary: Diffusion models have achieved great success in image synthesis through iterative noise estimation using deep neural networks. However, the slow inference, high memory consumption, and computation intensity of the noise estimation model hinder the efficient adoption of diffusion models. Although post-training quantization (PTQ) is considered a go-to compression method for other tasks, it does not work out-of-the-box on diffusion models. We propose a novel PTQ method specifically tailored towards the unique multi-timestep pipeline and model architecture of the diffusion models, which compresses the noise estimation network to accelerate the generation process. We identify the key difficulty of diffusion model quantization as the changing output distributions of noise estimation networks over multiple time steps and the bimodal activation distribution of the shortcut layers within the noise estimation network. We tackle these challenges with timestep-aware calibration and split shortcut quantization in this work. Experimental results show that our proposed method is able to quantize full-precision unconditional diffusion models into 4-bit while maintaining comparable performance (small FID change of at most 2.34 compared to >100 for traditional PTQ) in a training-free manner. Our approach can also be applied to text-guided image generation, where we can run stable diffusion in 4-bit weights with high generation quality for the first time.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型通过使用深度神经网络迭代噪声估计在图像合成方面取得了巨大成功。然而，噪声估计模型的推理速度慢、内存消耗高、计算强度大，阻碍了扩散模型的有效采用。尽管训练后量化（PTQ）被认为是其他任务的首选压缩方法，但它在扩散模型上并不是开箱即用的。我们提出了一种新颖的 PTQ 方法，专门针对扩散模型独特的多时间步管道和模型架构而设计，该方法压缩噪声估计网络以加速生成过程。我们将扩散模型量化的关键困难确定为噪声估计网络在多个时间步长上变化的输出分布以及噪声估计网络内快捷层的双峰激活分布。在这项工作中，我们通过时间步感知校准和分割快捷量化来应对这些挑战。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法能够将全精度无条件扩散模型量化为 4 位，同时以免训练的方式保持可比较的性能（与传统 PTQ > 100 相比，FID 变化最多为 2.34）。我们的方法还可以应用于文本引导图像生成，我们可以首次以 4 位权重运行稳定的扩散，并具有高生成质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对扩散模型的后训练量化方法Q-Diffusion，通过优化多时间步长流程和模型结构，实现高效压缩。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型虽在图像生成中表现优异，但存在推理速度慢、内存消耗大等问题，传统量化方法难以直接应用。
AI.method: 提出时序感知校准和分拆快捷量化技术，解决噪声估计网络输出分布变化及快捷层双峰激活分布难题。
AI.result: 在无需训练情况下将无条件扩散模型压缩至4位，FID变化不超过2.34，首次实现4位权重下高质量文本引导图像生成。

search_text: Q-Diffusion: Quantizing Diffusion Models Q-扩散：量化扩散模型 Diffusion models have achieved great success in image synthesis through iterative noise estimation using deep neural networks. However, the slow inference, high memory consumption, and computation intensity of the noise estimation model hinder the efficient adoption of diffusion models. Although post-training quantization (PTQ) is considered a go-to compression method for other tasks, it does not work out-of-the-box on diffusion models. We propose a novel PTQ method specifically tailored towards the unique multi-timestep pipeline and model architecture of the diffusion models, which compresses the noise estimation network to accelerate the generation process. We identify the key difficulty of diffusion model quantization as the changing output distributions of noise estimation networks over multiple time steps and the bimodal activation distribution of the shortcut layers within the noise estimation network. We tackle these challenges with timestep-aware calibration and split shortcut quantization in this work. Experimental results show that our proposed method is able to quantize full-precision unconditional diffusion models into 4-bit while maintaining comparable performance (small FID change of at most 2.34 compared to >100 for traditional PTQ) in a training-free manner. Our approach can also be applied to text-guided image generation, where we can run stable diffusion in 4-bit weights with high generation quality for the first time. 扩散模型通过使用深度神经网络迭代噪声估计在图像合成方面取得了巨大成功。然而，噪声估计模型的推理速度慢、内存消耗高、计算强度大，阻碍了扩散模型的有效采用。尽管训练后量化（PTQ）被认为是其他任务的首选压缩方法，但它在扩散模型上并不是开箱即用的。我们提出了一种新颖的 PTQ 方法，专门针对扩散模型独特的多时间步管道和模型架构而设计，该方法压缩噪声估计网络以加速生成过程。我们将扩散模型量化的关键困难确定为噪声估计网络在多个时间步长上变化的输出分布以及噪声估计网络内快捷层的双峰激活分布。在这项工作中，我们通过时间步感知校准和分割快捷量化来应对这些挑战。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法能够将全精度无条件扩散模型量化为 4 位，同时以免训练的方式保持可比较的性能（与传统 PTQ > 100 相比，FID 变化最多为 2.34）。我们的方法还可以应用于文本引导图像生成，我们可以首次以 4 位权重运行稳定的扩散，并具有高生成质量。 本文提出一种针对扩散模型的后训练量化方法Q-Diffusion，通过优化多时间步长流程和模型结构，实现高效压缩。 Xiuyu Li,Yijiang Liu,Long Lian,Huanrui Yang,Zhen Dong,Daniel Kang,Shanghang Zhang,Kurt Keutzer cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuhui Zhang,Shih-Cheng Huang,Zhengping Zhou,Matthew P. Lungren,Serena Yeung
title: Adapting Pre-trained Vision Transformers from 2D to 3D through Weight Inflation Improves Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 通过权重膨胀将预训练的视觉 Transformer 从 2D 调整为 3D，改善医学图像分割
abstract: Given the prevalence of 3D medical imaging technologies such as MRI and CT that are widely used in diagnosing and treating diverse diseases, 3D segmentation is one of the fundamental tasks of medical image analysis. Recently, Transformer-based models have started to achieve state-of-the-art performances across many vision tasks, through pre-training on large-scale natural image benchmark datasets. While works on medical image analysis have also begun to explore Transformer-based models, there is currently no optimal strategy to effectively leverage pre-trained Transformers, primarily due to the difference in dimensionality between 2D natural images and 3D medical images. Existing solutions either split 3D images into 2D slices and predict each slice independently, thereby losing crucial depth-wise information, or modify the Transformer architecture to support 3D inputs without leveraging pre-trained weights. In this work, we use a simple yet effective weight inflation strategy to adapt pre-trained Transformers from 2D to 3D, retaining the benefit of both transfer learning and depth information. We further investigate the effectiveness of transfer from different pre-training sources and objectives. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performances across a broad range of 3D medical image datasets, and can become a standard strategy easily utilized by all work on Transformer-based models for 3D medical images, to maximize performance.
summary: Given the prevalence of 3D medical imaging technologies such as MRI and CT that are widely used in diagnosing and treating diverse diseases, 3D segmentation is one of the fundamental tasks of medical image analysis. Recently, Transformer-based models have started to achieve state-of-the-art performances across many vision tasks, through pre-training on large-scale natural image benchmark datasets. While works on medical image analysis have also begun to explore Transformer-based models, there is currently no optimal strategy to effectively leverage pre-trained Transformers, primarily due to the difference in dimensionality between 2D natural images and 3D medical images. Existing solutions either split 3D images into 2D slices and predict each slice independently, thereby losing crucial depth-wise information, or modify the Transformer architecture to support 3D inputs without leveraging pre-trained weights. In this work, we use a simple yet effective weight inflation strategy to adapt pre-trained Transformers from 2D to 3D, retaining the benefit of both transfer learning and depth information. We further investigate the effectiveness of transfer from different pre-training sources and objectives. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performances across a broad range of 3D medical image datasets, and can become a standard strategy easily utilized by all work on Transformer-based models for 3D medical images, to maximize performance.
abstract_zh: 鉴于 MRI 和 CT 等 3D 医学成像技术的普及，广泛应用于诊断和治疗多种疾病，3D 分割是医学图像分析的基本任务之一。最近，通过对大规模自然图像基准数据集进行预训练，基于 Transformer 的模型已开始在许多视觉任务中实现最先进的性能。虽然医学图像分析工作也开始探索基于 Transformer 的模型，但目前还没有有效利用预训练 Transformer 的最佳策略，这主要是由于 2D 自然图像和 3D 医学图像之间的维度差异。现有解决方案要么将 3D 图像分割为 2D 切片并独立预测每个切片，从而丢失关键的深度信息，要么修改 Transformer 架构以支持 3D 输入，而不利用预先训练的权重。在这项工作中，我们使用简单而有效的权重膨胀策略将预训练的 Transformer 从 2D 调整为 3D，保留迁移学习和深度信息的优势。我们进一步研究了不同预训练来源和目标的迁移有效性。我们的方法在广泛的 3D 医学图像数据集上实现了最先进的性能，并且可以成为所有基于 Transformer 的 3D 医学图像模型工作轻松使用的标准策略，以最大限度地提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过权重膨胀策略将预训练的2D视觉Transformer适应到3D医学图像分割任务中，以提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有3D医学图像分割方法要么通过分割2D切片丢失深度信息，要么修改Transformer架构但无法利用预训练权重，导致性能不足。
AI.method: 采用权重膨胀策略将2D预训练Transformer扩展至3D，保留预训练权重和深度信息，并探究不同预训练源和目标的有效性。
AI.result: 该方法在多个3D医学图像数据集上达到最先进水平，成为Transformer在3D医学图像分析中的标准策略。
AI.conclusion: 权重膨胀策略有效结合了迁移学习优势与深度信息，为3D医学图像分割提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

search_text: Adapting Pre-trained Vision Transformers from 2D to 3D through Weight Inflation Improves Medical Image Segmentation 通过权重膨胀将预训练的视觉 Transformer 从 2D 调整为 3D，改善医学图像分割 Given the prevalence of 3D medical imaging technologies such as MRI and CT that are widely used in diagnosing and treating diverse diseases, 3D segmentation is one of the fundamental tasks of medical image analysis. Recently, Transformer-based models have started to achieve state-of-the-art performances across many vision tasks, through pre-training on large-scale natural image benchmark datasets. While works on medical image analysis have also begun to explore Transformer-based models, there is currently no optimal strategy to effectively leverage pre-trained Transformers, primarily due to the difference in dimensionality between 2D natural images and 3D medical images. Existing solutions either split 3D images into 2D slices and predict each slice independently, thereby losing crucial depth-wise information, or modify the Transformer architecture to support 3D inputs without leveraging pre-trained weights. In this work, we use a simple yet effective weight inflation strategy to adapt pre-trained Transformers from 2D to 3D, retaining the benefit of both transfer learning and depth information. We further investigate the effectiveness of transfer from different pre-training sources and objectives. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performances across a broad range of 3D medical image datasets, and can become a standard strategy easily utilized by all work on Transformer-based models for 3D medical images, to maximize performance. 鉴于 MRI 和 CT 等 3D 医学成像技术的普及，广泛应用于诊断和治疗多种疾病，3D 分割是医学图像分析的基本任务之一。最近，通过对大规模自然图像基准数据集进行预训练，基于 Transformer 的模型已开始在许多视觉任务中实现最先进的性能。虽然医学图像分析工作也开始探索基于 Transformer 的模型，但目前还没有有效利用预训练 Transformer 的最佳策略，这主要是由于 2D 自然图像和 3D 医学图像之间的维度差异。现有解决方案要么将 3D 图像分割为 2D 切片并独立预测每个切片，从而丢失关键的深度信息，要么修改 Transformer 架构以支持 3D 输入，而不利用预先训练的权重。在这项工作中，我们使用简单而有效的权重膨胀策略将预训练的 Transformer 从 2D 调整为 3D，保留迁移学习和深度信息的优势。我们进一步研究了不同预训练来源和目标的迁移有效性。我们的方法在广泛的 3D 医学图像数据集上实现了最先进的性能，并且可以成为所有基于 Transformer 的 3D 医学图像模型工作轻松使用的标准策略，以最大限度地提高性能。 本文提出通过权重膨胀策略将预训练的2D视觉Transformer适应到3D医学图像分割任务中，以提升分割效果。 Yuhui Zhang,Shih-Cheng Huang,Zhengping Zhou,Matthew P. Lungren,Serena Yeung cs.CV

title: Down-Sampled Epsilon-Lexicase Selection for Real-World Symbolic Regression Problems
title_zh: 针对现实世界符号回归问题的下采样 Epsilon-Lexicase 选择
abstract: Epsilon-lexicase selection is a parent selection method in genetic programming that has been successfully applied to symbolic regression problems. Recently, the combination of random subsampling with lexicase selection significantly improved performance in other genetic programming domains such as program synthesis. However, the influence of subsampling on the solution quality of real-world symbolic regression problems has not yet been studied. In this paper, we propose down-sampled epsilon-lexicase selection which combines epsilon-lexicase selection with random subsampling to improve the performance in the domain of symbolic regression. Therefore, we compare down-sampled epsilon-lexicase with traditional selection methods on common real-world symbolic regression problems and analyze its influence on the properties of the population over a genetic programming run. We find that the diversity is reduced by using down-sampled epsilon-lexicase selection compared to standard epsilon-lexicase selection. This comes along with high hyperselection rates we observe for down-sampled epsilon-lexicase selection. Further, we find that down-sampled epsilon-lexicase selection outperforms the traditional selection methods on all studied problems. Overall, with down-sampled epsilon-lexicase selection we observe an improvement of the solution quality of up to 85% in comparison to standard epsilon-lexicase selection.
summary: Epsilon-lexicase selection is a parent selection method in genetic programming that has been successfully applied to symbolic regression problems. Recently, the combination of random subsampling with lexicase selection significantly improved performance in other genetic programming domains such as program synthesis. However, the influence of subsampling on the solution quality of real-world symbolic regression problems has not yet been studied. In this paper, we propose down-sampled epsilon-lexicase selection which combines epsilon-lexicase selection with random subsampling to improve the performance in the domain of symbolic regression. Therefore, we compare down-sampled epsilon-lexicase with traditional selection methods on common real-world symbolic regression problems and analyze its influence on the properties of the population over a genetic programming run. We find that the diversity is reduced by using down-sampled epsilon-lexicase selection compared to standard epsilon-lexicase selection. This comes along with high hyperselection rates we observe for down-sampled epsilon-lexicase selection. Further, we find that down-sampled epsilon-lexicase selection outperforms the traditional selection methods on all studied problems. Overall, with down-sampled epsilon-lexicase selection we observe an improvement of the solution quality of up to 85% in comparison to standard epsilon-lexicase selection.
abstract_zh: Epsilon-lexicase 选择是遗传编程中的一种父选择方法，已成功应用于符号回归问题。最近，随机子采样与词汇选择的结合显着提高了其他遗传编程领域（例如程序合成）的性能。然而，子采样对现实世界符号回归问题的解质量的影响尚未被研究。在本文中，我们提出了下采样 epsilon-lexicase 选择，它将 epsilon-lexicase 选择与随机子采样相结合，以提高符号回归领域的性能。因此，我们将下采样 epsilon-lexicase 与传统选择方法在常见的现实世界符号回归问题上进行比较，并分析其在遗传编程运行中对群体属性的影响。我们发现，与标准 epsilon-lexicase 选择相比，使用下采样 epsilon-lexicase 选择会降低多样性。这伴随着我们在下采样 epsilon-lexicase 选择中观察到的高超选择率。此外，我们发现下采样的 epsilon-lexicase 选择在所有研究问题上都优于传统的选择方法。总体而言，通过下采样 epsilon-lexicase 选择，与标准 epsilon-lexicase 选择相比，我们观察到解决方案质量提高了 85%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合随机子采样与epsilon-lexicase选择的改进方法，用于提升实际符号回归问题的求解质量。
AI.motivation: 尽管随机子采样与lexicase选择在其他领域表现优异，但其对实际符号回归问题的影响尚未被研究，因此需探索该方法在此领域的有效性。
AI.method: 将epsilon-lexicase选择与随机子采样结合，形成下采样epsilon-lexicase选择方法，并在多个实际符号回归问题中与传统方法对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在所有测试问题中均优于传统方法，解的质量提升最高达85%，但种群多样性有所下降且超选择率较高。
AI.conclusion: 下采样epsilon-lexicase选择能显著提升实际符号回归的解质量，尽管伴随多样性降低，但其性能优势明显。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 下采样epsilon-lexicase选择能显著提升实际符号回归的解质量，尽管伴随多样性降低，但其性能优势明显。

tldr: 本文提出了一种结合随机子采样与epsilon-lexicase选择的改进方法，用于提升实际符号回归问题的求解质量。
motivation: 尽管随机子采样与lexicase选择在其他领域表现优异，但其对实际符号回归问题的影响尚未被研究，因此需探索该方法在此领域的有效性。
method: 将epsilon-lexicase选择与随机子采样结合，形成下采样epsilon-lexicase选择方法，并在多个实际符号回归问题中与传统方法对比实验。
result: 实验表明，该方法在所有测试问题中均优于传统方法，解的质量提升最高达85%，但种群多样性有所下降且超选择率较高。
conclusion: 下采样epsilon-lexicase选择能显著提升实际符号回归的解质量，尽管伴随多样性降低，但其性能优势明显。
search_text: Down-Sampled Epsilon-Lexicase Selection for Real-World Symbolic Regression Problems 针对现实世界符号回归问题的下采样 Epsilon-Lexicase 选择 Epsilon-lexicase selection is a parent selection method in genetic programming that has been successfully applied to symbolic regression problems. Recently, the combination of random subsampling with lexicase selection significantly improved performance in other genetic programming domains such as program synthesis. However, the influence of subsampling on the solution quality of real-world symbolic regression problems has not yet been studied. In this paper, we propose down-sampled epsilon-lexicase selection which combines epsilon-lexicase selection with random subsampling to improve the performance in the domain of symbolic regression. Therefore, we compare down-sampled epsilon-lexicase with traditional selection methods on common real-world symbolic regression problems and analyze its influence on the properties of the population over a genetic programming run. We find that the diversity is reduced by using down-sampled epsilon-lexicase selection compared to standard epsilon-lexicase selection. This comes along with high hyperselection rates we observe for down-sampled epsilon-lexicase selection. Further, we find that down-sampled epsilon-lexicase selection outperforms the traditional selection methods on all studied problems. Overall, with down-sampled epsilon-lexicase selection we observe an improvement of the solution quality of up to 85% in comparison to standard epsilon-lexicase selection. Epsilon-lexicase 选择是遗传编程中的一种父选择方法，已成功应用于符号回归问题。最近，随机子采样与词汇选择的结合显着提高了其他遗传编程领域（例如程序合成）的性能。然而，子采样对现实世界符号回归问题的解质量的影响尚未被研究。在本文中，我们提出了下采样 epsilon-lexicase 选择，它将 epsilon-lexicase 选择与随机子采样相结合，以提高符号回归领域的性能。因此，我们将下采样 epsilon-lexicase 与传统选择方法在常见的现实世界符号回归问题上进行比较，并分析其在遗传编程运行中对群体属性的影响。我们发现，与标准 epsilon-lexicase 选择相比，使用下采样 epsilon-lexicase 选择会降低多样性。这伴随着我们在下采样 epsilon-lexicase 选择中观察到的高超选择率。此外，我们发现下采样的 epsilon-lexicase 选择在所有研究问题上都优于传统的选择方法。总体而言，通过下采样 epsilon-lexicase 选择，与标准 epsilon-lexicase 选择相比，我们观察到解决方案质量提高了 85%。 本文提出了一种结合随机子采样与epsilon-lexicase选择的改进方法，用于提升实际符号回归问题的求解质量。 Alina Geiger,Dominik Sobania,Franz Rothlauf cs.NE

title: Towards Bridging the Gaps between the Right to Explanation and the Right to be Forgotten
title_zh: 弥合解释权和被遗忘权之间的差距
abstract: The Right to Explanation and the Right to be Forgotten are two important principles outlined to regulate algorithmic decision making and data usage in real-world applications. While the right to explanation allows individuals to request an actionable explanation for an algorithmic decision, the right to be forgotten grants them the right to ask for their data to be deleted from all the databases and models of an organization. Intuitively, enforcing the right to be forgotten may trigger model updates which in turn invalidate previously provided explanations, thus violating the right to explanation. In this work, we investigate the technical implications arising due to the interference between the two aforementioned regulatory principles, and propose the first algorithmic framework to resolve the tension between them. To this end, we formulate a novel optimization problem to generate explanations that are robust to model updates due to the removal of training data instances by data deletion requests. We then derive an efficient approximation algorithm to handle the combinatorial complexity of this optimization problem. We theoretically demonstrate that our method generates explanations that are provably robust to worst-case data deletion requests with bounded costs in case of linear models and certain classes of non-linear models. Extensive experimentation with real-world datasets demonstrates the efficacy of the proposed framework.
summary: The Right to Explanation and the Right to be Forgotten are two important principles outlined to regulate algorithmic decision making and data usage in real-world applications. While the right to explanation allows individuals to request an actionable explanation for an algorithmic decision, the right to be forgotten grants them the right to ask for their data to be deleted from all the databases and models of an organization. Intuitively, enforcing the right to be forgotten may trigger model updates which in turn invalidate previously provided explanations, thus violating the right to explanation. In this work, we investigate the technical implications arising due to the interference between the two aforementioned regulatory principles, and propose the first algorithmic framework to resolve the tension between them. To this end, we formulate a novel optimization problem to generate explanations that are robust to model updates due to the removal of training data instances by data deletion requests. We then derive an efficient approximation algorithm to handle the combinatorial complexity of this optimization problem. We theoretically demonstrate that our method generates explanations that are provably robust to worst-case data deletion requests with bounded costs in case of linear models and certain classes of non-linear models. Extensive experimentation with real-world datasets demonstrates the efficacy of the proposed framework.
abstract_zh: 解释权和被遗忘权是两个重要原则，旨在规范现实应用中的算法决策和数据使用。虽然解释权允许个人要求对算法决策进行可行的解释，但被遗忘权赋予他们要求从组织的所有数据库和模型中删除其数据的权利。直观上，强制执行被遗忘权可能会触发模型更新，从而使之前提供的解释无效，从而侵犯了解释权。在这项工作中，我们研究了由于上述两个监管原则之间的干扰而产生的技术影响，并提出了第一个算法框架来解决它们之间的紧张关系。为此，我们制定了一个新颖的优化问题来生成对模型更新稳健的解释，因为数据删除请求删除了训练数据实例。然后，我们推导出一种有效的近似算法来处理该优化问题的组合复杂性。我们从理论上证明，在线性模型和某些类别的非线性模型的情况下，我们的方法生成的解释对于最坏情况的数据删除请求具有有限的成本。对现实世界数据集的广泛实验证明了所提出框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决算法决策中的'解释权'与'被遗忘权'之间的冲突，提出一种算法框架以生成对数据删除请求具有鲁棒性的解释。
AI.motivation: 当用户行使'被遗忘权'删除数据时，可能导致模型更新并使先前提供的解释失效，从而违反'解释权'，需解决二者间的矛盾。
AI.method: 通过构建优化问题生成对模型更新鲁棒的解释，并设计高效近似算法处理组合复杂性，理论证明方法在特定模型下的有效性。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验验证了该框架的有效性，能够处理数据删除请求带来的模型变化。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架成功缓解了'解释权'与'被遗忘权'的技术冲突，为合规算法设计提供了可行方案。
