authors_text: Yuhui Zhang,Jeff Z. HaoChen,Shih-Cheng Huang,Kuan-Chieh Wang,James Zou,Serena Yeung
title: Diagnosing and Rectifying Vision Models using Language
title_zh: 使用语言诊断和纠正视觉模型
abstract: Recent multi-modal contrastive learning models have demonstrated the ability to learn an embedding space suitable for building strong vision classifiers, by leveraging the rich information in large-scale image-caption datasets. Our work highlights a distinct advantage of this multi-modal embedding space: the ability to diagnose vision classifiers through natural language. The traditional process of diagnosing model behaviors in deployment settings involves labor-intensive data acquisition and annotation. Our proposed method can discover high-error data slices, identify influential attributes and further rectify undesirable model behaviors, without requiring any visual data. Through a combination of theoretical explanation and empirical verification, we present conditions under which classifiers trained on embeddings from one modality can be equivalently applied to embeddings from another modality. On a range of image datasets with known error slices, we demonstrate that our method can effectively identify the error slices and influential attributes, and can further use language to rectify failure modes of the classifier.
summary: Recent multi-modal contrastive learning models have demonstrated the ability to learn an embedding space suitable for building strong vision classifiers, by leveraging the rich information in large-scale image-caption datasets. Our work highlights a distinct advantage of this multi-modal embedding space: the ability to diagnose vision classifiers through natural language. The traditional process of diagnosing model behaviors in deployment settings involves labor-intensive data acquisition and annotation. Our proposed method can discover high-error data slices, identify influential attributes and further rectify undesirable model behaviors, without requiring any visual data. Through a combination of theoretical explanation and empirical verification, we present conditions under which classifiers trained on embeddings from one modality can be equivalently applied to embeddings from another modality. On a range of image datasets with known error slices, we demonstrate that our method can effectively identify the error slices and influential attributes, and can further use language to rectify failure modes of the classifier.
abstract_zh: 最近的多模态对比学习模型已经证明了通过利用大规模图像描述数据集中的丰富信息来学习适合构建强大视觉分类器的嵌入空间的能力。我们的工作强调了这种多模态嵌入空间的明显优势：通过自然语言诊断视觉分类器的能力。在部署设置中诊断模型行为的传统过程涉及劳动密集型数据采集和注释。我们提出的方法可以发现高错误数据切片，识别有影响的属性并进一步纠正不良模型行为，而不需要任何视觉数据。通过理论解释和实证验证的结合，我们提出了在一种条件下对一种模态的嵌入进行训练的分类器可以等效地应用于另一种模态的嵌入的条件。在一系列具有已知错误切片的图像数据集上，我们证明了我们的方法可以有效地识别错误切片和有影响的属性，并且可以进一步使用语言来纠正分类器的故障模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过多模态嵌入空间利用自然语言诊断和修正视觉分类器的方法，无需视觉数据即可发现错误数据切片并修正模型行为。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉模型诊断依赖耗时的人工数据标注，而多模态嵌入空间能通过语言信息自动识别模型缺陷，提升诊断效率。
AI.method: 结合理论分析与实证验证，提出跨模态嵌入等效条件，利用语言特征识别错误数据切片及关键属性，并通过语言指令修正模型失效模式。
AI.result: 在多个含已知错误的数据集上验证方法有效性，成功识别错误切片和影响属性，并通过语言干预改善分类器性能。
AI.conclusion: 多模态嵌入空间为视觉模型诊断提供新范式，证明语言驱动的修正方法可行，为模型可解释性研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Yilun Xu,Ziming Liu,Yonglong Tian,Shangyuan Tong,Max Tegmark,Tommi Jaakkola
title: PFGM++: Unlocking the Potential of Physics-Inspired Generative Models
title_zh: PFGM++：释放物理启发的生成模型的潜力
abstract: We introduce a new family of physics-inspired generative models termed PFGM++ that unifies diffusion models and Poisson Flow Generative Models (PFGM). These models realize generative trajectories for $N$ dimensional data by embedding paths in $N{+}D$ dimensional space while still controlling the progression with a simple scalar norm of the $D$ additional variables. The new models reduce to PFGM when $D{=}1$ and to diffusion models when $D{\to}\infty$. The flexibility of choosing $D$ allows us to trade off robustness against rigidity as increasing $D$ results in more concentrated coupling between the data and the additional variable norms. We dispense with the biased large batch field targets used in PFGM and instead provide an unbiased perturbation-based objective similar to diffusion models. To explore different choices of $D$, we provide a direct alignment method for transferring well-tuned hyperparameters from diffusion models ($D{\to} \infty$) to any finite $D$ values. Our experiments show that models with finite $D$ can be superior to previous state-of-the-art diffusion models on CIFAR-10/FFHQ $64{\times}64$ datasets, with FID scores of $1.91/2.43$ when $D{=}2048/128$. In class-conditional setting, $D{=}2048$ yields current state-of-the-art FID of $1.74$ on CIFAR-10. In addition, we demonstrate that models with smaller $D$ exhibit improved robustness against modeling errors. Code is available at https://github.com/Newbeeer/pfgmpp
summary: We introduce a new family of physics-inspired generative models termed PFGM++ that unifies diffusion models and Poisson Flow Generative Models (PFGM). These models realize generative trajectories for $N$ dimensional data by embedding paths in $N{+}D$ dimensional space while still controlling the progression with a simple scalar norm of the $D$ additional variables. The new models reduce to PFGM when $D{=}1$ and to diffusion models when $D{\to}\infty$. The flexibility of choosing $D$ allows us to trade off robustness against rigidity as increasing $D$ results in more concentrated coupling between the data and the additional variable norms. We dispense with the biased large batch field targets used in PFGM and instead provide an unbiased perturbation-based objective similar to diffusion models. To explore different choices of $D$, we provide a direct alignment method for transferring well-tuned hyperparameters from diffusion models ($D{\to} \infty$) to any finite $D$ values. Our experiments show that models with finite $D$ can be superior to previous state-of-the-art diffusion models on CIFAR-10/FFHQ $64{\times}64$ datasets, with FID scores of $1.91/2.43$ when $D{=}2048/128$. In class-conditional setting, $D{=}2048$ yields current state-of-the-art FID of $1.74$ on CIFAR-10. In addition, we demonstrate that models with smaller $D$ exhibit improved robustness against modeling errors. Code is available at https://github.com/Newbeeer/pfgmpp
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一系列新的物理启发生成模型，称为 PFGM++，它统一了扩散模型和泊松流生成模型 (PFGM)。这些模型通过在 $N{+}D$ 维空间中嵌入路径来实现 $N$ 维数据的生成轨迹，同时仍然使用 $D$ 附加变量的简单标量范数来控制进展。当 $D{=}1$ 时，新模型简化为 PFGM；当 $D{\to}\infty$ 时，新模型简化为扩散模型。选择 $D$ 的灵活性使我们能够在鲁棒性与刚性之间进行权衡，因为增加 $D$ 会导致数据和附加变量规范之间的耦合更加集中。我们放弃了 PFGM 中使用的有偏差的大批量场目标，而是提供类似于扩散模型的无偏差的基于扰动的目标。为了探索 $D$ 的不同选择，我们提供了一种直接对齐方法，用于将经过良好调整的超参数从扩散模型 ($D{\to} \infty$) 转移到任何有限的 $D$ 值。我们的实验表明，有限 $D$ 的模型可以优于 CIFAR-10/FFHQ $64{\times}64$ 数据集上先前最先进的扩散模型，当 $D{=}2048/128$ 时，FID 分数为 $1.91/2.43$。在类条件设置中，$D{=}2048$ 在 CIFAR-10 上产生当前最先进的 FID 为 $1.74$。此外，我们证明具有较小 $D$ 的模型对建模错误表现出更高的鲁棒性。代码可在 https://github.com/Newbeeer/pfgmpp 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型物理启发生成模型PFGM++，通过引入可调节参数D统一扩散模型与泊松流生成模型，实现生成轨迹的灵活控制。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型在灵活性与鲁棒性间存在权衡，而PFGM++通过引入D参数动态调整数据与辅助变量的耦合强度，兼顾生成质量与模型稳定性。
AI.method: 在N+D维空间嵌入生成路径，利用D维辅助变量的标量范数控制生成进程；采用无偏扰动目标替代传统有偏目标，并提供扩散模型超参数向有限D值的迁移方法。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/FFHQ数据集上，D=2048时FID达1.91/2.43（优于扩散模型），D=2048的条件生成FID达1.74（SOTA）；较小D值模型对建模误差更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: PFGM++通过可调节D参数实现了生成模型性能与鲁棒性的动态平衡，验证了物理启发框架在生成建模中的有效性，代码已开源。

authors_text: Matthew Tancik,Ethan Weber,Evonne Ng,Ruilong Li,Brent Yi,Justin Kerr,Terrance Wang,Alexander Kristoffersen,Jake Austin,Kamyar Salahi,Abhik Ahuja,David McAllister,Angjoo Kanazawa
title: Nerfstudio: A Modular Framework for Neural Radiance Field Development
title_zh: Nerfstudio：神经辐射场开发的模块化框架
abstract: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) are a rapidly growing area of research with wide-ranging applications in computer vision, graphics, robotics, and more. In order to streamline the development and deployment of NeRF research, we propose a modular PyTorch framework, Nerfstudio. Our framework includes plug-and-play components for implementing NeRF-based methods, which make it easy for researchers and practitioners to incorporate NeRF into their projects. Additionally, the modular design enables support for extensive real-time visualization tools, streamlined pipelines for importing captured in-the-wild data, and tools for exporting to video, point cloud and mesh representations. The modularity of Nerfstudio enables the development of Nerfacto, our method that combines components from recent papers to achieve a balance between speed and quality, while also remaining flexible to future modifications. To promote community-driven development, all associated code and data are made publicly available with open-source licensing at https://nerf.studio.
summary: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) are a rapidly growing area of research with wide-ranging applications in computer vision, graphics, robotics, and more. In order to streamline the development and deployment of NeRF research, we propose a modular PyTorch framework, Nerfstudio. Our framework includes plug-and-play components for implementing NeRF-based methods, which make it easy for researchers and practitioners to incorporate NeRF into their projects. Additionally, the modular design enables support for extensive real-time visualization tools, streamlined pipelines for importing captured in-the-wild data, and tools for exporting to video, point cloud and mesh representations. The modularity of Nerfstudio enables the development of Nerfacto, our method that combines components from recent papers to achieve a balance between speed and quality, while also remaining flexible to future modifications. To promote community-driven development, all associated code and data are made publicly available with open-source licensing at https://nerf.studio.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 是一个快速发展的研究领域，在计算机视觉、图形、机器人等领域有着广泛的应用。为了简化 NeRF 研究的开发和部署，我们提出了一个模块化的 PyTorch 框架 Nerfstudio。我们的框架包括用于实现基于 NeRF 的方法的即插即用组件，这使得研究人员和从业者可以轻松地将 NeRF 纳入他们的项目中。此外，模块化设计还支持广泛的实时可视化工具、用于导入捕获的野外数据的简化管道以及用于导出视频、点云和网格表示的工具。 Nerfstudio 的模块化使得 Nerfacto 的开发成为可能，我们的方法结合了最近论文中的组件，以实现速度和质量之间的平衡，同时还对未来的修改保持灵活性。为了促进社区驱动的开发，所有相关代码和数据均通过开源许可在 https://nerf.studio 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Nerfstudio的模块化PyTorch框架，旨在简化神经辐射场（NeRF）的研究与应用开发。
AI.motivation: NeRF研究发展迅速但存在开发和部署复杂的问题，需提供一个模块化工具以降低使用门槛并支持多样化功能。
AI.method: 构建包含即插即用组件的框架，集成实时可视化工具、数据导入流水线及模型导出功能，并通过模块化设计实现灵活组合（如Nerfacto方法）。
AI.result: 开发了Nerfstudio框架及Nerfacto方法，在速度与质量间取得平衡，同时通过开源代码和数据推动社区协作。
AI.conclusion: Nerfstudio为NeRF研究提供了高效灵活的开发平台，其开源特性将促进技术的进一步创新与应用扩展。

authors_text: Nicolas M. Müller,Simon Roschmann,Shahbaz Khan,Philip Sperl,Konstantin Böttinger
title: Shortcut Detection with Variational Autoencoders
title_zh: 使用变分自动编码器进行捷径检测
comment: Accepted at the ICML 2023 Workshop on Spurious Correlations, Invariance and Stability
comments: Accepted at the ICML 2023 Workshop on Spurious Correlations, Invariance and Stability
abstract: For real-world applications of machine learning (ML), it is essential that models make predictions based on well-generalizing features rather than spurious correlations in the data. The identification of such spurious correlations, also known as shortcuts, is a challenging problem and has so far been scarcely addressed. In this work, we present a novel approach to detect shortcuts in image and audio datasets by leveraging variational autoencoders (VAEs). The disentanglement of features in the latent space of VAEs allows us to discover feature-target correlations in datasets and semi-automatically evaluate them for ML shortcuts. We demonstrate the applicability of our method on several real-world datasets and identify shortcuts that have not been discovered before.
summary: For real-world applications of machine learning (ML), it is essential that models make predictions based on well-generalizing features rather than spurious correlations in the data. The identification of such spurious correlations, also known as shortcuts, is a challenging problem and has so far been scarcely addressed. In this work, we present a novel approach to detect shortcuts in image and audio datasets by leveraging variational autoencoders (VAEs). The disentanglement of features in the latent space of VAEs allows us to discover feature-target correlations in datasets and semi-automatically evaluate them for ML shortcuts. We demonstrate the applicability of our method on several real-world datasets and identify shortcuts that have not been discovered before.
abstract_zh: 对于机器学习 (ML) 的实际应用，模型基于良好概括的特征而不是数据中的虚假相关性进行预测至关重要。识别这种虚假相关性（也称为捷径）是一个具有挑战性的问题，迄今为止几乎没有得到解决。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用变分自动编码器（VAE）来检测图像和音频数据集中的快捷方式的新颖方法。 VAE 潜在空间中特征的解开使我们能够发现数据集中的特征-目标相关性，并半自动评估它们的 ML 捷径。我们展示了我们的方法在几个现实世界数据集上的适用性，并确定了以前尚未发现的捷径。

AI.motivation: 现实场景中机器学习模型需避免依赖数据中的虚假相关性，但现有方法难以有效识别此类问题。
AI.method: 利用变分自编码器潜在空间的特征解耦能力，发现并评估数据集中的特征-目标相关性以检测shortcuts。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上验证方法有效性，成功识别出此前未被发现的shortcuts。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为检测数据集中的虚假相关性提供了新思路，有助于提升模型泛化能力。

search_text: Shortcut Detection with Variational Autoencoders 使用变分自动编码器进行捷径检测 For real-world applications of machine learning (ML), it is essential that models make predictions based on well-generalizing features rather than spurious correlations in the data. The identification of such spurious correlations, also known as shortcuts, is a challenging problem and has so far been scarcely addressed. In this work, we present a novel approach to detect shortcuts in image and audio datasets by leveraging variational autoencoders (VAEs). The disentanglement of features in the latent space of VAEs allows us to discover feature-target correlations in datasets and semi-automatically evaluate them for ML shortcuts. We demonstrate the applicability of our method on several real-world datasets and identify shortcuts that have not been discovered before. 对于机器学习 (ML) 的实际应用，模型基于良好概括的特征而不是数据中的虚假相关性进行预测至关重要。识别这种虚假相关性（也称为捷径）是一个具有挑战性的问题，迄今为止几乎没有得到解决。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用变分自动编码器（VAE）来检测图像和音频数据集中的快捷方式的新颖方法。 VAE 潜在空间中特征的解开使我们能够发现数据集中的特征-目标相关性，并半自动评估它们的 ML 捷径。我们展示了我们的方法在几个现实世界数据集上的适用性，并确定了以前尚未发现的捷径。 提出一种基于变分自编码器的方法来检测图像和音频数据集中的虚假相关性（shortcuts）。 Nicolas M. title: Computational Models of Solving Raven's Progressive Matrices: A Comprehensive Introduction
title_zh: 求解 Raven 渐进矩阵的计算模型：综合介绍
abstract: As being widely used to measure human intelligence, Raven's Progressive Matrices (RPM) tests also pose a great challenge for AI systems. There is a long line of computational models for solving RPM, starting from 1960s, either to understand the involved cognitive processes or solely for problem-solving purposes. Due to the dramatic paradigm shifts in AI researches, especially the advent of deep learning models in the last decade, the computational studies on RPM have also changed a lot. Therefore, now is a good time to look back at this long line of research. As the title -- ``a comprehensive introduction'' -- indicates, this paper provides an all-in-one presentation of computational models for solving RPM, including the history of RPM, intelligence testing theories behind RPM, item design and automatic item generation of RPM-like tasks, a conceptual chronicle of computational models for solving RPM, which reveals the philosophy behind the technology evolution of these models, and suggestions for transferring human intelligence testing and AI testing.
summary: As being widely used to measure human intelligence, Raven's Progressive Matrices (RPM) tests also pose a great challenge for AI systems. There is a long line of computational models for solving RPM, starting from 1960s, either to understand the involved cognitive processes or solely for problem-solving purposes. Due to the dramatic paradigm shifts in AI researches, especially the advent of deep learning models in the last decade, the computational studies on RPM have also changed a lot. Therefore, now is a good time to look back at this long line of research. As the title -- ``a comprehensive introduction'' -- indicates, this paper provides an all-in-one presentation of computational models for solving RPM, including the history of RPM, intelligence testing theories behind RPM, item design and automatic item generation of RPM-like tasks, a conceptual chronicle of computational models for solving RPM, which reveals the philosophy behind the technology evolution of these models, and suggestions for transferring human intelligence testing and AI testing.
abstract_zh: 随着Raven的渐进矩阵（RPM）测试被广泛用于测量人类智力，也给AI系统带来了巨大的挑战。从 20 世纪 60 年代开始，有一长串用于解决 RPM 的计算模型，要么是为了理解所涉及的认知过程，要么只是为了解决问题。由于人工智能研究范式的巨大转变，特别是近十年来深度学习模型的出现，RPM 的计算研究也发生了很大变化。因此，现在是回顾这一长串研究的好时机。正如标题“全面介绍”所示，本文对解决 RPM 的计算模型进行了全面介绍，包括 RPM 的历史、RPM 背后的智力测试理论、类 RPM 任务的项目设计和自动项目生成、解决 RPM 的计算模型的概念编年史，揭示了这些模型背后的技术演进原理，以及将人类智力测试和人工智能测试迁移的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了计算模型在解决瑞文渐进矩阵（RPM）任务中的发展历程与技术演变，涵盖历史背景、理论基础、题目设计及模型哲学。
AI.motivation: RPM作为衡量人类智力的重要工具，对AI系统构成挑战。随着深度学习等技术的突破，需回顾并梳理RPM计算模型的研究脉络，以促进人机智能测试的融合。
AI.method: 通过概念化的时间线梳理，结合RPM历史、智力理论、题目生成方法及计算模型的哲学思想，分析技术演进逻辑并提出AI测试方向建议。
AI.result: 构建了RPM计算模型的全景图谱，揭示了从符号主义到深度学习的技术迭代路径，并为未来AI智能测试提供了理论与实践框架。
AI.conclusion: 计算模型的持续发展需深度融合人类智力理论与AI技术，未来研究应关注跨模态学习与可解释性，以实现更接近人类推理能力的智能系统。

authors_text: Nikhil Gosala,Kürsat Petek,Paulo L. J. Drews-Jr,Wolfram Burgard,Abhinav Valada
title: SkyEye: Self-Supervised Bird's-Eye-View Semantic Mapping Using Monocular Frontal View Images
title_zh: SkyEye：使用单目正面图像的自我监督鸟瞰语义映射
abstract: Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) semantic maps have become an essential component of automated driving pipelines due to the rich representation they provide for decision-making tasks. However, existing approaches for generating these maps still follow a fully supervised training paradigm and hence rely on large amounts of annotated BEV data. In this work, we address this limitation by proposing the first self-supervised approach for generating a BEV semantic map using a single monocular image from the frontal view (FV). During training, we overcome the need for BEV ground truth annotations by leveraging the more easily available FV semantic annotations of video sequences. Thus, we propose the SkyEye architecture that learns based on two modes of self-supervision, namely, implicit supervision and explicit supervision. Implicit supervision trains the model by enforcing spatial consistency of the scene over time based on FV semantic sequences, while explicit supervision exploits BEV pseudolabels generated from FV semantic annotations and self-supervised depth estimates. Extensive evaluations on the KITTI-360 dataset demonstrate that our self-supervised approach performs on par with the state-of-the-art fully supervised methods and achieves competitive results using only 1% of direct supervision in the BEV compared to fully supervised approaches. Finally, we publicly release both our code and the BEV datasets generated from the KITTI-360 and Waymo datasets.
summary: Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) semantic maps have become an essential component of automated driving pipelines due to the rich representation they provide for decision-making tasks. However, existing approaches for generating these maps still follow a fully supervised training paradigm and hence rely on large amounts of annotated BEV data. In this work, we address this limitation by proposing the first self-supervised approach for generating a BEV semantic map using a single monocular image from the frontal view (FV). During training, we overcome the need for BEV ground truth annotations by leveraging the more easily available FV semantic annotations of video sequences. Thus, we propose the SkyEye architecture that learns based on two modes of self-supervision, namely, implicit supervision and explicit supervision. Implicit supervision trains the model by enforcing spatial consistency of the scene over time based on FV semantic sequences, while explicit supervision exploits BEV pseudolabels generated from FV semantic annotations and self-supervised depth estimates. Extensive evaluations on the KITTI-360 dataset demonstrate that our self-supervised approach performs on par with the state-of-the-art fully supervised methods and achieves competitive results using only 1% of direct supervision in the BEV compared to fully supervised approaches. Finally, we publicly release both our code and the BEV datasets generated from the KITTI-360 and Waymo datasets.
abstract_zh: 鸟瞰图 (BEV) 语义图已成为自动驾驶管道的重要组成部分，因为它们为决策任务提供了丰富的表示。然而，生成这些地图的现有方法仍然遵循完全监督的训练范例，因此依赖于大量带注释的 BEV 数据。在这项工作中，我们通过提出第一种自监督方法来解决这一限制，该方法使用来自正面视图（FV）的单个单目图像生成 BEV 语义图。在训练过程中，我们通过利用更容易获得的视频序列 FV 语义注释来克服对 BEV 地面实况注释的需求。因此，我们提出了基于两种自我监督模式进行学习的SkyEye架构，即隐式监督和显式监督。隐式监督通过基于 FV 语义序列强制场景随时间的空间一致性来训练模型，而显式监督则利用 FV 语义注释和自监督深度估计生成的 BEV 伪标签。对 KITTI-360 数据集的广泛评估表明，我们的自监督方法的性能与最先进的完全监督方法相当，并且与完全监督方法相比，仅使用 BEV 中 1% 的直接监督即可获得有竞争力的结果。最后，我们公开发布我们的代码以及从 KITTI-360 和 Waymo 数据集生成的 BEV 数据集。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于单目图像的自监督方法，生成鸟瞰图语义地图
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖大量标注的BEV数据，而本研究旨在减少对标注数据的依赖，通过自监督学习提高效率
AI.method: 结合隐式监督（基于FV语义序列的时间一致性）和显式监督（利用伪标签和自监督深度估计），无需BEV标注
AI.result: 在KITTI-360数据集上，仅用1%的BEV标注即达到全监督方法水平
AI.conclusion: 自监督方法有效降低数据依赖，且公开了代码和生成的BEV数据集

Implicit supervision trains the model by enforcing spatial consistency of the scene over time based on FV semantic sequences, while explicit supervision exploits BEV pseudolabels generated from FV semantic annotations and self-supervised depth estimates. Extensive evaluations on the KITTI-360 dataset demonstrate that our self-supervised approach performs on par with the state-of-the-art fully supervised methods and achieves competitive results using only 1% of direct supervision in the BEV compared to fully supervised approaches. Finally, we publicly release both our code and the BEV datasets generated from the KITTI-360 and Waymo datasets. 鸟瞰图 (BEV) 语义图已成为自动驾驶管道的重要组成部分，因为它们为决策任务提供了丰富的表示。然而，生成这些地图的现有方法仍然遵循完全监督的训练范例，因此依赖于大量带注释的 BEV 数据。在这项工作中，我们通过提出第一种自监督方法来解决这一限制，该方法使用来自正面视图（FV）的单个单目图像生成 BEV 语义图。在训练过程中，我们通过利用更容易获得的视频序列 FV 语义注释来克服对 BEV 地面实况注释的需求。因此，我们提出了基于两种自我监督模式进行学习的SkyEye架构，即隐式监督和显式监督。隐式监督通过基于 FV 语义序列强制场景随时间的空间一致性来训练模型，而显式监督则利用 FV 语义注释和自监督深度估计生成的 BEV 伪标签。对 KITTI-360 数据集的广泛评估表明，我们的自监督方法的性能与最先进的完全监督方法相当，并且与完全监督方法相比，仅使用 BEV 中 1% 的直接监督即可获得有竞争力的结果。最后，我们公开发布我们的代码以及从 KITTI-360 和 Waymo 数据集生成的 BEV 数据集。 提出一种基于单目图像的自监督方法，生成鸟瞰图语义地图 Nikhil Gosala,Kürsat Petek,Paulo L. J. Drews-Jr,Wolfram Burgard,Abhinav Valada cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Debarati Das,Jacob Gilbert,MohammadTaghi Hajiaghayi,Tomasz Kociumaka,Barna Saha
title: Weighted Edit Distance Computation: Strings, Trees and Dyck
title_zh: 加权编辑距离计算：字符串、树和 Dyck
abstract: Given two strings of length $n$ over alphabet $Σ$, and an upper bound $k$ on their edit distance, the algorithm of Myers (Algorithmica'86) and Landau and Vishkin (JCSS'88) computes the unweighted string edit distance in $\mathcal{O}(n+k^2)$ time. Till date, it remains the fastest algorithm for exact edit distance computation, and it is optimal under the Strong Exponential Hypothesis (STOC'15). Over the years, this result has inspired many developments, including fast approximation algorithms for string edit distance as well as similar $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n+$poly$(k))$-time algorithms for generalizations to tree and Dyck edit distances. Surprisingly, all these results hold only for unweighted instances. While unweighted edit distance is theoretically fundamental, almost all real-world applications require weighted edit distance, where different weights are assigned to different edit operations and may vary with the characters being edited. Given a weight function $w: Σ\cup \{\varepsilon \}\times Σ\cup \{\varepsilon \} \rightarrow \mathbb{R}_{\ge 0}$ (such that $w(a,a)=0$ and $w(a,b)\ge 1$ for all $a,b\in Σ\cup \{\varepsilon\}$ with $a\ne b$), the goal is to find an alignment that minimizes the total weight of edits. Except for the vanilla $\mathcal{O}(n^2)$-time dynamic-programming algorithm and its almost trivial $\mathcal{O}(nk)$-time implementation, none of the aforementioned developments on the unweighted edit distance apply to the weighted variant. In this paper, we propose the first $\mathcal{O}(n+$poly$(k))$-time algorithm that computes weighted string edit distance exactly, thus bridging a fundamental gap between our understanding of unweighted and weighted edit distance. We then generalize this result to weighted tree and Dyck edit distances, which lead to a deterministic algorithm that improves upon the previous work for unweighted tree edit distance.

Till date, it remains the fastest algorithm for exact edit distance computation, and it is optimal under the Strong Exponential Hypothesis (STOC'15). Over the years, this result has inspired many developments, including fast approximation algorithms for string edit distance as well as similar $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n+$poly$(k))$-time algorithms for generalizations to tree and Dyck edit distances. Surprisingly, all these results hold only for unweighted instances. While unweighted edit distance is theoretically fundamental, almost all real-world applications require weighted edit distance, where different weights are assigned to different edit operations and may vary with the characters being edited. Given a weight function $w: Σ\cup \{\varepsilon \}\times Σ\cup \{\varepsilon \} \rightarrow \mathbb{R}_{\ge 0}$ (such that $w(a,a)=0$ and $w(a,b)\ge 1$ for all $a,b\in Σ\cup \{\varepsilon\}$ with $a\ne b$), the goal is to find an alignment that minimizes the total weight of edits. Except for the vanilla $\mathcal{O}(n^2)$-time dynamic-programming algorithm and its almost trivial $\mathcal{O}(nk)$-time implementation, none of the aforementioned developments on the unweighted edit distance apply to the weighted variant. In this paper, we propose the first $\mathcal{O}(n+$poly$(k))$-time algorithm that computes weighted string edit distance exactly, thus bridging a fundamental gap between our understanding of unweighted and weighted edit distance. We then generalize this result to weighted tree and Dyck edit distances, which lead to a deterministic algorithm that improves upon the previous work for unweighted tree edit distance.
abstract_zh: 给定字母表 $Σ$ 上长度为 $n$ 的两个字符串，以及其编辑距离的上限 $k$，Myers (Algorithmica'86) 和 Landau 和 Vishkin (JCSS'88) 的算法会在 $\mathcal{O}(n+k^2)$ 时间内计算未加权字符串编辑距离。迄今为止，它仍然是精确计算编辑距离最快的算法，并且在强指数假设（STOC'15）下是最佳的。多年来，这一结果激发了许多发展，包括字符串编辑距离的快速近似算法以及用于泛化树和 Dyck 编辑距离的类似 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n+$poly$(k))$ 时间算法。令人惊讶的是，所有这些结果仅适用于未加权的实例。虽然未加权编辑距离在理论上是基本的，但几乎所有实际应用都需要加权编辑距离，其中不同的权重被分配给不同的编辑操作，并且可能随所编辑的字符而变化。给定一个权重函数 $w: Σ\cup \{\varepsilon \}\times Σ\cup \{\varepsilon \} \rightarrow \mathbb{R}_{\ge 0}$ （使得对于 Σ\cup \{\varepsilon\}$ 中的所有 $a,b\ 和 $a\ne b$，$w(a,a)=0$ 和 $w(a,b)\ge 1$），目标是找到一种使编辑总重量最小化的对齐方式。除了普通的 $\mathcal{O}(n^2)$ 时间动态规划算法及其几乎微不足道的 $\mathcal{O}(nk)$ 时间实现之外，上述未加权编辑距离的发展都不适用于加权变体。在本文中，我们提出了第一个精确计算加权字符串编辑距离的 $\mathcal{O}(n+$poly$(k))$-time 算法，从而弥合了我们对未加权和加权编辑距离的理解之间的根本差距。然后，我们将此结果推广到加权树和戴克编辑距离，这导致了一种确定性算法，该算法改进了之前针对未加权树编辑距离的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种计算加权字符串、树和Dyck编辑距离的高效算法，填补了加权与非加权编辑距离算法之间的理论空白。
AI.motivation: 尽管非加权编辑距离算法已有高效解决方案，但现实应用中需要考虑不同编辑操作的权重差异，而现有方法无法有效处理加权场景。
AI.method: 设计了一种时间复杂度为O(n+poly(k))的精确算法，通过动态规划优化和结构扩展，将方法推广至树和Dyck结构的加权编辑距离计算。
AI.result: 首次实现加权字符串编辑距离的精确高效计算，并改进了非加权树编辑距离的确定性算法，时间复杂度优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 本研究弥合了非加权与加权编辑距离算法的理论差距，为实际应用提供了更普适的解决方案。

authors_text: Md Momen Bhuiyan,Sang Won Lee,Nitesh Goyal,Tanushree Mitra
title: NewsComp: Facilitating Diverse News Reading through Comparative Annotation
title_zh: NewsComp：通过比较注释促进多元化新闻阅读
comment: 2023 ACM CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems, 17 pages
comments: 2023 ACM CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems, 17 pages
abstract: To support efficient, balanced news consumption, merging articles from diverse sources into one, potentially through crowdsourcing, could alleviate some hurdles. However, the merging process could also impact annotators' attitudes towards the content. To test this theory, we propose comparative news annotation, i.e., annotating similarities and differences between a pair of articles. By developing and deploying NewsComp -- a prototype system -- we conducted a between-subjects experiment(N=109) to examine how users' annotations compare to experts', and how comparative annotation affects users' perceptions of article credibility and quality. We found that comparative annotation can marginally impact users' credibility perceptions in certain cases. While users' annotations were not on par with experts', they showed greater precision in finding similarities than in identifying disparate important statements. The comparison process led users to notice differences in information placement/depth, degree of factuality/opinion, and empathetic/inflammatory language use. We discuss implications for the design of future comparative annotation tasks.
summary: To support efficient, balanced news consumption, merging articles from diverse sources into one, potentially through crowdsourcing, could alleviate some hurdles. However, the merging process could also impact annotators' attitudes towards the content. To test this theory, we propose comparative news annotation, i.e., annotating similarities and differences between a pair of articles. By developing and deploying NewsComp -- a prototype system -- we conducted a between-subjects experiment(N=109) to examine how users' annotations compare to experts', and how comparative annotation affects users' perceptions of article credibility and quality. We found that comparative annotation can marginally impact users' credibility perceptions in certain cases. While users' annotations were not on par with experts', they showed greater precision in finding similarities than in identifying disparate important statements. The comparison process led users to notice differences in information placement/depth, degree of factuality/opinion, and empathetic/inflammatory language use. We discuss implications for the design of future comparative annotation tasks.
abstract_zh: 为了支持高效、平衡的新闻消费，将不同来源的文章合并为一个（可能通过众包）可以减轻一些障碍。然而，合并过程也可能影响注释者对内容的态度。为了检验这一理论，我们提出了比较新闻注释，即注释一对文章之间的相似点和差异。通过开发和部署 NewsComp（一个原型系统），我们进行了受试者间实验（N=109），以检查用户的注释与专家的注释如何比较，以及比较注释如何影响用户对文章可信度和质量的看法。我们发现，在某些情况下，比较注释会对用户的可信度感知产生轻微影响。虽然用户的注释与专家的注释不一样，但他们在寻找相似性方面比在识别不同的重要陈述方面表现出更高的精确度。比较过程使用户注意到信息放置/深度、事实/观点程度以及移情/煽动性语言使用方面的差异。我们讨论了对未来比较注释任务设计的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NewsComp系统，通过比较注释促进多样化新闻阅读，研究比较注释对用户新闻可信度和质量感知的影响。
AI.motivation: 为解决新闻消费中信息偏见问题，作者希望通过合并多来源新闻并利用比较注释任务，提升用户对新闻内容的全面理解与批判性思考。
AI.method: 开发NewsComp原型系统，开展109人参与的对比实验，分析用户与专家注释差异，并评估比较注释对新闻可信度、质量感知的影响。
AI.result: 用户注释在发现相似性上优于识别关键差异，比较过程使用户注意到信息呈现深度、事实性与情感语言差异，但用户可信度判断与专家存在差距。
AI.conclusion: 比较注释有助于用户发现新闻差异，但需优化任务设计以提升用户注释准确性，未来可探索更有效的注释框架与训练机制。

search_text: NewsComp: Facilitating Diverse News Reading through Comparative Annotation NewsComp：通过比较注释促进多元化新闻阅读 To support efficient, balanced news consumption, merging articles from diverse sources into one, potentially through crowdsourcing, could alleviate some hurdles. However, the merging process could also impact annotators' attitudes towards the content. To test this theory, we propose comparative news annotation, i.e., annotating similarities and differences between a pair of articles. By developing and deploying NewsComp -- a prototype system -- we conducted a between-subjects experiment(N=109) to examine how users' annotations compare to experts', and how comparative annotation affects users' perceptions of article credibility and quality. We found that comparative annotation can marginally impact users' credibility perceptions in certain cases. While users' annotations were not on par with experts', they showed greater precision in finding similarities than in identifying disparate important statements. The comparison process led users to notice differences in information placement/depth, degree of factuality/opinion, and empathetic/inflammatory language use. We discuss implications for the design of future comparative annotation tasks. 为了支持高效、平衡的新闻消费，将不同来源的文章合并为一个（可能通过众包）可以减轻一些障碍。然而，合并过程也可能影响注释者对内容的态度。为了检验这一理论，我们提出了比较新闻注释，即注释一对文章之间的相似点和差异。通过开发和部署 NewsComp（一个原型系统），我们进行了受试者间实验（N=109），以检查用户的注释与专家的注释如何比较，以及比较注释如何影响用户对文章可信度和质量的看法。我们发现，在某些情况下，比较注释会对用户的可信度感知产生轻微影响。虽然用户的注释与专家的注释不一样，但他们在寻找相似性方面比在识别不同的重要陈述方面表现出更高的精确度。比较过程使用户注意到信息放置/深度、事实/观点程度以及移情/煽动性语言使用方面的差异。我们讨论了对未来比较注释任务设计的影响。 本文提出NewsComp系统，通过比较注释促进多样化新闻阅读，研究比较注释对用户新闻可信度和质量感知的影响。 Md Momen Bhuiyan,Sang Won Lee,Nitesh Goyal,Tanushree Mitra cs.HC

title: On the Computational Complexity of Ethics: Moral Tractability for Minds and Machines
title_zh: 论伦理学的计算复杂性：思想和机器的道德易处理性
abstract: Why should moral philosophers, moral psychologists, and machine ethicists care about computational complexity? Debates on whether artificial intelligence (AI) can or should be used to solve problems in ethical domains have mainly been driven by what AI can or cannot do in terms of human capacities. In this paper, we tackle the problem from the other end by exploring what kind of moral machines are possible based on what computational systems can or cannot do. To do so, we analyze normative ethics through the lens of computational complexity. First, we introduce computational complexity for the uninitiated reader and discuss how the complexity of ethical problems can be framed within Marr's three levels of analysis. We then study a range of ethical problems based on consequentialism, deontology, and virtue ethics, with the aim of elucidating the complexity associated with the problems themselves (e.g., due to combinatorics, uncertainty, strategic dynamics), the computational methods employed (e.g., probability, logic, learning), and the available resources (e.g., time, knowledge, learning). The results indicate that most problems the normative frameworks pose lead to tractability issues in every category analyzed. Our investigation also provides several insights about the computational nature of normative ethics, including the differences between rule- and outcome-based moral strategies, and the implementation-variance with regard to moral resources. We then discuss the consequences complexity results have for the prospect of moral machines in virtue of the trade-off between optimality and efficiency. Finally, we elucidate how computational complexity can be used to inform both philosophical and cognitive-psychological research on human morality by advancing the Moral Tractability Thesis (MTT).

abstract_zh: 为什么道德哲学家、道德心理学家和机器伦理学家应该关心计算复杂性？关于人工智能（AI）是否可以或应该用于解决伦理领域问题的争论主要是由人工智能在人类能力方面能做什么或不能做什么而驱动的。在本文中，我们通过根据计算系统能做什么或不能做什么来探索什么样的道德机器是可能的，从而从另一端解决问题。为此，我们通过计算复杂性的角度来分析规范伦理。首先，我们为外行读者介绍计算复杂性，并讨论如何在马尔的三个分析层次中构建道德问题的复杂性。然后，我们研究一系列基于结果论、道义论和美德伦理学的伦理问题，目的是阐明与问题本身相关的复杂性（例如，由于组合、不确定性、战略动态）、所采用的计算方法（例如，概率、逻辑、学习）和可用资源（例如，时间、知识、学习）。结果表明，规范框架带来的大多数问题都会导致所分析的每个类别中的可处理性问题。我们的研究还提供了关于规范伦理的计算性质的一些见解，包括基于规则和基于结果的道德策略之间的差异，以及道德资源方面的实施差异。然后，我们讨论复杂性结果对最优性和效率之间的权衡对道德机器前景的影响。最后，我们阐明了如何通过推进道德易处理性论文（MTT），利用计算复杂性为人类道德的哲学和认知心理学研究提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文通过计算复杂性理论分析伦理问题的可计算性，探讨道德机器在计算资源限制下的可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统AI伦理讨论聚焦于人类能力边界，而本文从计算系统的能力出发，揭示伦理问题的计算复杂性对道德机器设计的影响。
AI.method: 结合计算复杂性理论与Marr的三级分析框架，对后果主义、义务论和美德伦理中的伦理问题进行复杂性分类，分析其计算方法与资源限制。
AI.result: 多数规范伦理框架下的问题在计算复杂性上存在不可行性，规则导向与结果导向策略存在效率与最优性权衡，资源分配差异显著影响道德决策。
AI.conclusion: 计算复杂性理论为伦理研究提供新视角，提出道德可计算性假说（MTT），揭示人类道德与机器伦理在计算资源约束下的本质差异。

title: Combining Variational Autoencoders and Physical Bias for Improved Microscopy Data Analysis
title_zh: 结合变分自动编码器和物理偏差以改进显微镜数据分析
comment: 20 pages, 7 figures in main text, 4 figures in Supp Mat
comments: 20 pages, 7 figures in main text, 4 figures in Supp Mat
abstract: Electron and scanning probe microscopy produce vast amounts of data in the form of images or hyperspectral data, such as EELS or 4D STEM, that contain information on a wide range of structural, physical, and chemical properties of materials. To extract valuable insights from these data, it is crucial to identify physically separate regions in the data, such as phases, ferroic variants, and boundaries between them. In order to derive an easily interpretable feature analysis, combining with well-defined boundaries in a principled and unsupervised manner, here we present a physics augmented machine learning method which combines the capability of Variational Autoencoders to disentangle factors of variability within the data and the physics driven loss function that seeks to minimize the total length of the discontinuities in images corresponding to latent representations. Our method is applied to various materials, including NiO-LSMO, BiFeO3, and graphene. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in extracting meaningful information from large volumes of imaging data. The fully notebook containing implementation of the code and analysis workflow is available at https://github.com/arpanbiswas52/PaperNotebooks
summary: Electron and scanning probe microscopy produce vast amounts of data in the form of images or hyperspectral data, such as EELS or 4D STEM, that contain information on a wide range of structural, physical, and chemical properties of materials. To extract valuable insights from these data, it is crucial to identify physically separate regions in the data, such as phases, ferroic variants, and boundaries between them. In order to derive an easily interpretable feature analysis, combining with well-defined boundaries in a principled and unsupervised manner, here we present a physics augmented machine learning method which combines the capability of Variational Autoencoders to disentangle factors of variability within the data and the physics driven loss function that seeks to minimize the total length of the discontinuities in images corresponding to latent representations. Our method is applied to various materials, including NiO-LSMO, BiFeO3, and graphene. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in extracting meaningful information from large volumes of imaging data. The fully notebook containing implementation of the code and analysis workflow is available at https://github.com/arpanbiswas52/PaperNotebooks
abstract_zh: 电子和扫描探针显微镜以图像或高光谱数据的形式产生大量数据，例如 EELS 或 4D STEM，其中包含有关材料的各种结构、物理和化学性质的信息。为了从这些数据中提取有价值的见解，识别数据中物理上独立的区域至关重要，例如相、铁性变体以及它们之间的边界。为了导出易于解释的特征分析，以有原则和无监督的方式与明确定义的边界相结合，这里我们提出了一种物理增强机器学习方法，该方法结合了变分自动编码器的能力来解开数据中的可变性因素，以及物理驱动的损失函数，该函数旨在最小化与潜在表示相对应的图像中不连续性的总长度。我们的方法适用于各种材料，包括 NiO-LSMO、BiFeO3 和石墨烯。结果证明了我们的方法在从大量成像数据中提取有意义的信息方面的有效性。包含代码实现和分析工作流程的完整笔记本位于 https://github.com/arpanbiswas52/PaperNotebooks

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合变分自编码器和物理偏差的方法，用于改进显微镜数据的分析。
AI.motivation: 电子和扫描探针显微镜生成大量图像或超光谱数据，需要有效提取材料的结构、物理和化学信息。现有方法难以在无监督情况下提取可解释的特征。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种结合变分自编码器和物理驱动损失函数的方法，通过分离数据中的可变因素并最小化图像中不连续性的总长度，以提取可解释的特征。
AI.result: 该方法成功应用于多种材料（如NiO-LSMO、BiFeO3和石墨烯），展示了从大量成像数据中提取有意义信息的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为显微镜数据分析提供了一种有效且可解释的解决方案，并可通过提供的代码和分析流程进行复现。

The results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in extracting meaningful information from large volumes of imaging data. The fully notebook containing implementation of the code and analysis workflow is available at https://github.com/arpanbiswas52/PaperNotebooks 电子和扫描探针显微镜以图像或高光谱数据的形式产生大量数据，例如 EELS 或 4D STEM，其中包含有关材料的各种结构、物理和化学性质的信息。为了从这些数据中提取有价值的见解，识别数据中物理上独立的区域至关重要，例如相、铁性变体以及它们之间的边界。为了导出易于解释的特征分析，以有原则和无监督的方式与明确定义的边界相结合，这里我们提出了一种物理增强机器学习方法，该方法结合了变分自动编码器的能力来解开数据中的可变性因素，以及物理驱动的损失函数，该函数旨在最小化与潜在表示相对应的图像中不连续性的总长度。我们的方法适用于各种材料，包括 NiO-LSMO、BiFeO3 和石墨烯。结果证明了我们的方法在从大量成像数据中提取有意义的信息方面的有效性。包含代码实现和分析工作流程的完整笔记本位于 https://github.com/arpanbiswas52/PaperNotebooks 本文提出了一种结合变分自编码器和物理偏差的方法，用于改进显微镜数据的分析。 Arpan Biswas,Maxim Ziatdinov,Sergei V. Kalinin cs.LG,eess.IV

title: A Vector Quantized Approach for Text to Speech Synthesis on Real-World Spontaneous Speech
title_zh: 现实世界自发语音的文本到语音合成的矢量量化方法
abstract: Recent Text-to-Speech (TTS) systems trained on reading or acted corpora have achieved near human-level naturalness. The diversity of human speech, however, often goes beyond the coverage of these corpora. We believe the ability to handle such diversity is crucial for AI systems to achieve human-level communication. Our work explores the use of more abundant real-world data for building speech synthesizers. We train TTS systems using real-world speech from YouTube and podcasts. We observe the mismatch between training and inference alignments in mel-spectrogram based autoregressive models, leading to unintelligible synthesis, and demonstrate that learned discrete codes within multiple code groups effectively resolves this issue. We introduce our MQTTS system whose architecture is designed for multiple code generation and monotonic alignment, along with the use of a clean silence prompt to improve synthesis quality. We conduct ablation analyses to identify the efficacy of our methods. We show that MQTTS outperforms existing TTS systems in several objective and subjective measures.
summary: Recent Text-to-Speech (TTS) systems trained on reading or acted corpora have achieved near human-level naturalness. The diversity of human speech, however, often goes beyond the coverage of these corpora. We believe the ability to handle such diversity is crucial for AI systems to achieve human-level communication. Our work explores the use of more abundant real-world data for building speech synthesizers. We train TTS systems using real-world speech from YouTube and podcasts. We observe the mismatch between training and inference alignments in mel-spectrogram based autoregressive models, leading to unintelligible synthesis, and demonstrate that learned discrete codes within multiple code groups effectively resolves this issue. We introduce our MQTTS system whose architecture is designed for multiple code generation and monotonic alignment, along with the use of a clean silence prompt to improve synthesis quality. We conduct ablation analyses to identify the efficacy of our methods. We show that MQTTS outperforms existing TTS systems in several objective and subjective measures.
abstract_zh: 最近经过阅读或表演语料库训练的文本转语音（TTS）系统已经达到了接近人类水平的自然度。然而，人类言语的多样性往往超出了这些语料库的覆盖范围。我们相信处理这种多样性的能力对于人工智能系统实现人类水平的沟通至关重要。我们的工作探索使用更丰富的现实世界数据来构建语音合成器。我们使用 YouTube 和播客中的真实语音来训练 TTS 系统。我们观察到基于梅尔谱图的自回归模型中训练和推理对齐之间的不匹配，导致难以理解的合成，并证明在多个代码组中学习的离散代码有效地解决了这个问题。我们介绍了我们的 MQTTS 系统，其架构专为多代码生成和单调对齐而设计，并使用干净的静音提示来提高综合质量。我们进行消融分析来确定我们方法的有效性。我们证明 MQTTS 在多个客观和主观指标上均优于现有 TTS 系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于向量量化的方法，利用真实世界自发语音数据构建文本到语音合成系统，以提升语音多样性与自然度。
AI.motivation: 现有TTS系统依赖朗读或表演语料库，难以覆盖人类语音的多样性，限制了AI在真实场景中的沟通能力。
AI.method: 通过YouTube和播客等真实语料训练TTS系统，采用多码组离散编码解决对齐偏差问题，并引入单调对齐机制与静音提示优化合成质量。
AI.result: MQTTS系统在多项客观与主观评估指标上优于现有TTS系统，有效缓解了真实场景下的语音合成不可理解问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多码组向量量化与对齐优化，显著提升了真实世界自发语音的合成效果，为实现人类级沟通能力提供了新方向。

title: Attending to Graph Transformers
title_zh: 关注图形转换器
abstract: Recently, transformer architectures for graphs emerged as an alternative to established techniques for machine learning with graphs, such as (message-passing) graph neural networks. So far, they have shown promising empirical results, e.g., on molecular prediction datasets, often attributed to their ability to circumvent graph neural networks' shortcomings, such as over-smoothing and over-squashing. Here, we derive a taxonomy of graph transformer architectures, bringing some order to this emerging field. We overview their theoretical properties, survey structural and positional encodings, and discuss extensions for important graph classes, e.g., 3D molecular graphs. Empirically, we probe how well graph transformers can recover various graph properties, how well they can deal with heterophilic graphs, and to what extent they prevent over-squashing. Further, we outline open challenges and research direction to stimulate future work. Our code is available at https://github.com/luis-mueller/probing-graph-transformers.
summary: Recently, transformer architectures for graphs emerged as an alternative to established techniques for machine learning with graphs, such as (message-passing) graph neural networks. So far, they have shown promising empirical results, e.g., on molecular prediction datasets, often attributed to their ability to circumvent graph neural networks' shortcomings, such as over-smoothing and over-squashing. Here, we derive a taxonomy of graph transformer architectures, bringing some order to this emerging field. We overview their theoretical properties, survey structural and positional encodings, and discuss extensions for important graph classes, e.g., 3D molecular graphs. Empirically, we probe how well graph transformers can recover various graph properties, how well they can deal with heterophilic graphs, and to what extent they prevent over-squashing. Further, we outline open challenges and research direction to stimulate future work. Our code is available at https://github.com/luis-mueller/probing-graph-transformers.
abstract_zh: 最近，图的转换器架构出现，作为图机器学习的现有技术的替代方案，例如（消息传递）图神经网络。到目前为止，他们已经展示了有希望的实证结果，例如在分子预测数据集上，这通常归因于它们能够规避图神经网络的缺点，例如过度平滑和过度挤压。在这里，我们推导了图转换器架构的分类法，为这个新兴领域带来了一些秩序。我们概述了它们的理论特性，调查了结构和位置编码，并讨论了重要图类的扩展，例如 3D 分子图。根据经验，我们探讨了图转换器如何很好地恢复各种图属性，它们如何处理异性图，以及它们在多大程度上防止过度挤压。此外，我们概述了开放的挑战和研究方向，以刺激未来的工作。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/luis-mueller/probing-graph-transformers 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文对图变压器架构进行分类，概述其理论性质，调查结构和位置编码，并讨论扩展与实证分析。
AI.motivation: 图变压器作为图机器学习的新方法，展现出克服传统图神经网络缺陷（如过平滑、过压缩）的潜力，需系统梳理该领域以明确其优势与挑战。
AI.method: 推导图变压器架构分类法，分析理论性质，调研结构与位置编码，扩展至3D分子图，并通过实证测试其恢复图属性、处理异质图及防止过压缩的能力。
AI.result: 实证显示图变压器在恢复图属性、处理异质图及减少过压缩方面表现良好，同时揭示了现有模型的局限性及未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 图变压器为图学习提供新思路，但需进一步解决理论分析与复杂图结构适配问题，未来研究应聚焦扩展性与鲁棒性提升。

authors_text: Lazar Atanackovic,Alexander Tong,Bo Wang,Leo J. Lee,Yoshua Bengio,Jason Hartford
title: DynGFN: Towards Bayesian Inference of Gene Regulatory Networks with GFlowNets
title_zh: DynGFN：使用 GFlowNets 进行基因调控网络的贝叶斯推理
abstract: One of the grand challenges of cell biology is inferring the gene regulatory network (GRN) which describes interactions between genes and their products that control gene expression and cellular function. We can treat this as a causal discovery problem but with two non-standard challenges: (1) regulatory networks are inherently cyclic so we should not model a GRN as a directed acyclic graph (DAG), and (2) observations have significant measurement noise, so for typical sample sizes there will always be a large equivalence class of graphs that are likely given the data, and we want methods that capture this uncertainty. Existing methods either focus on challenge (1), identifying cyclic structure from dynamics, or on challenge (2) learning complex Bayesian posteriors over DAGs, but not both. In this paper we leverage the fact that it is possible to estimate the "velocity" of gene expression with RNA velocity techniques to develop an approach that addresses both challenges. Because we have access to velocity information, we can treat the Bayesian structure learning problem as a problem of sparse identification of a dynamical system, capturing cyclic feedback loops through time. Since our objective is to model uncertainty over discrete structures, we leverage Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) to estimate the posterior distribution over the combinatorial space of possible sparse dependencies. Our results indicate that our method learns posteriors that better encapsulate the distributions of cyclic structures compared to counterpart state-of-the-art Bayesian structure learning approaches.
summary: One of the grand challenges of cell biology is inferring the gene regulatory network (GRN) which describes interactions between genes and their products that control gene expression and cellular function. We can treat this as a causal discovery problem but with two non-standard challenges: (1) regulatory networks are inherently cyclic so we should not model a GRN as a directed acyclic graph (DAG), and (2) observations have significant measurement noise, so for typical sample sizes there will always be a large equivalence class of graphs that are likely given the data, and we want methods that capture this uncertainty. Existing methods either focus on challenge (1), identifying cyclic structure from dynamics, or on challenge (2) learning complex Bayesian posteriors over DAGs, but not both. In this paper we leverage the fact that it is possible to estimate the "velocity" of gene expression with RNA velocity techniques to develop an approach that addresses both challenges. Because we have access to velocity information, we can treat the Bayesian structure learning problem as a problem of sparse identification of a dynamical system, capturing cyclic feedback loops through time. Since our objective is to model uncertainty over discrete structures, we leverage Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) to estimate the posterior distribution over the combinatorial space of possible sparse dependencies. Our results indicate that our method learns posteriors that better encapsulate the distributions of cyclic structures compared to counterpart state-of-the-art Bayesian structure learning approaches.
abstract_zh: 细胞生物学的重大挑战之一是推断基因调控网络（GRN），它描述了基因及其控制基因表达和细胞功能的产物之间的相互作用。我们可以将其视为因果发现问题，但存在两个非标准挑战：（1）监管网络本质上是循环的，因此我们不应该将 GRN 建模为有向无环图（DAG）；（2）观察结果具有显着的测量噪声，因此对于典型的样本量，总是存在大量可能给定数据的图等价类，我们需要捕获这种不确定性的方法。现有方法要么关注挑战 (1)，从动力学中识别循环结构，要么关注挑战 (2) 在 DAG 上学习复杂的贝叶斯后验，但不能同时关注两者。在本文中，我们利用 RNA 速度技术可以估计基因表达“速度”的事实来开发一种解决这两个挑战的方法。因为我们可以获得速度信息，所以我们可以将贝叶斯结构学习问题视为动力系统的稀疏识别问题，捕获随时间变化的循环反馈循环。由于我们的目标是对离散结构的不确定性进行建模，因此我们利用生成流网络 (GFlowNets) 来估计可能稀疏依赖项的组合空间上的后验分布。我们的结果表明，与最先进的贝叶斯结构学习方法相比，我们的方法学习的后验能够更好地封装循环结构的分布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DynGFN方法，利用GFlowNets进行贝叶斯推断，解决基因调控网络（GRN）中循环结构和测量噪声的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法同时处理GRN的循环结构和数据噪声导致的不确定性，需开发兼顾两者的新方法。
AI.method: 结合RNA velocity技术估计基因表达速度，将问题转化为动态系统的稀疏识别，并利用GFlowNets建模组合空间中的后验分布。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在捕捉循环结构分布方面优于现有贝叶斯结构学习方法。
AI.conclusion: DynGFN通过整合速度信息与GFlowNets，有效解决了GRN推断中的循环性和不确定性问题。

search_text: DynGFN: Towards Bayesian Inference of Gene Regulatory Networks with GFlowNets DynGFN：使用 GFlowNets 进行基因调控网络的贝叶斯推理 One of the grand challenges of cell biology is inferring the gene regulatory network (GRN) which describes interactions between genes and their products that control gene expression and cellular function. We can treat this as a causal discovery problem but with two non-standard challenges: (1) regulatory networks are inherently cyclic so we should not model a GRN as a directed acyclic graph (DAG), and (2) observations have significant measurement noise, so for typical sample sizes there will always be a large equivalence class of graphs that are likely given the data, and we want methods that capture this uncertainty. Existing methods either focus on challenge (1), identifying cyclic structure from dynamics, or on challenge (2) learning complex Bayesian posteriors over DAGs, but not both. In this paper we leverage the fact that it is possible to estimate the "velocity" of gene expression with RNA velocity techniques to develop an approach that addresses both challenges. Because we have access to velocity information, we can treat the Bayesian structure learning problem as a problem of sparse identification of a dynamical system, capturing cyclic feedback loops through time. Since our objective is to model uncertainty over discrete structures, we leverage Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) to estimate the posterior distribution over the combinatorial space of possible sparse dependencies. Our results indicate that our method learns posteriors that better encapsulate the distributions of cyclic structures compared to counterpart state-of-the-art Bayesian structure learning approaches. 细胞生物学的重大挑战之一是推断基因调控网络（GRN），它描述了基因及其控制基因表达和细胞功能的产物之间的相互作用。我们可以将其视为因果发现问题，但存在两个非标准挑战：（1）监管网络本质上是循环的，因此我们不应该将 GRN 建模为有向无环图（DAG）；（2）观察结果具有显着的测量噪声，因此对于典型的样本量，总是存在大量可能给定数据的图等价类，我们需要捕获这种不确定性的方法。现有方法要么关注挑战 (1)，从动力学中识别循环结构，要么关注挑战 (2) 在 DAG 上学习复杂的贝叶斯后验，但不能同时关注两者。在本文中，我们利用 RNA 速度技术可以估计基因表达“速度”的事实来开发一种解决这两个挑战的方法。因为我们可以获得速度信息，所以我们可以将贝叶斯结构学习问题视为动力系统的稀疏识别问题，捕获随时间变化的循环反馈循环。由于我们的目标是对离散结构的不确定性进行建模，因此我们利用生成流网络 (GFlowNets) 来估计可能稀疏依赖项的组合空间上的后验分布。我们的结果表明，与最先进的贝叶斯结构学习方法相比，我们的方法学习的后验能够更好地封装循环结构的分布。 本文提出DynGFN方法，利用GFlowNets进行贝叶斯推断，解决基因调控网络（GRN）中循环结构和测量噪声的挑战。 Lazar Atanackovic,Alexander Tong,Bo Wang,Leo J. authors_text: Yongjian Deng,Hao Chen,Bochen Xie,Hai Liu,Youfu Li
title: A Dynamic Graph CNN with Cross-Representation Distillation for Event-Based Recognition
title_zh: 用于基于事件的识别的具有交叉表示蒸馏的动态图 CNN
abstract: Recent advances in event-based research prioritize sparsity and temporal precision. Approaches using dense frame-based representations processed via well-pretrained CNNs are being replaced by the use of sparse point-based representations learned through graph CNNs (GCN). Yet, the efficacy of these graph methods is far behind their frame-based counterparts with two limitations. ($i$) Biased graph construction without carefully integrating variant attributes ($i.e.$, semantics, spatial and temporal cues) for each vertex, leading to imprecise graph representation. ($ii$) Deficient learning because of the lack of well-pretrained models available. Here we solve the first problem by proposing a new event-based GCN (EDGCN), with a dynamic aggregation module to integrate all attributes of vertices adaptively. To address the second problem, we introduce a novel learning framework called cross-representation distillation (CRD), which leverages the dense representation of events as a cross-representation auxiliary to provide additional supervision and prior knowledge for the event graph. This frame-to-graph distillation allows us to benefit from the large-scale priors provided by CNNs while still retaining the advantages of graph-based models. Extensive experiments show our model and learning framework are effective and generalize well across multiple vision tasks.
summary: Recent advances in event-based research prioritize sparsity and temporal precision. Approaches using dense frame-based representations processed via well-pretrained CNNs are being replaced by the use of sparse point-based representations learned through graph CNNs (GCN). Yet, the efficacy of these graph methods is far behind their frame-based counterparts with two limitations. ($i$) Biased graph construction without carefully integrating variant attributes ($i.e.$, semantics, spatial and temporal cues) for each vertex, leading to imprecise graph representation. ($ii$) Deficient learning because of the lack of well-pretrained models available. Here we solve the first problem by proposing a new event-based GCN (EDGCN), with a dynamic aggregation module to integrate all attributes of vertices adaptively. To address the second problem, we introduce a novel learning framework called cross-representation distillation (CRD), which leverages the dense representation of events as a cross-representation auxiliary to provide additional supervision and prior knowledge for the event graph. This frame-to-graph distillation allows us to benefit from the large-scale priors provided by CNNs while still retaining the advantages of graph-based models. Extensive experiments show our model and learning framework are effective and generalize well across multiple vision tasks.
abstract_zh: 基于事件的研究的最新进展优先考虑稀疏性和时间精度。使用经过良好预训练的 CNN 处理的基于密集帧的表示的方法正在被使用通过图 CNN (GCN) 学习的基于稀疏点的表示所取代。然而，这些图方法的功效远远落后于基于框架的方法，有两个局限性。 ($i$) 没有仔细集成每个顶点的变体属性（$即$，语义，空间和时间线索）的有偏差的图构造，导致不精确的图表示。 ($ii$) 由于缺乏经过良好预训练的模型而导致学习不足。在这里，我们通过提出一种新的基于事件的 GCN (EDGCN) 来解决第一个问题，它具有动态聚合模块来自适应地集成顶点的所有属性。为了解决第二个问题，我们引入了一种称为交叉表示蒸馏（CRD）的新颖学习框架，它利用事件的密集表示作为交叉表示辅助，为事件图提供额外的监督和先验知识。这种从帧到图的蒸馏使我们能够从 CNN 提供的大规模先验中受益，同时仍然保留基于图的模型的优势。大量的实验表明，我们的模型和学习框架是有效的，并且可以很好地推广到多个视觉任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态图卷积网络（EDGCN）与跨表示蒸馏框架（CRD），以解决事件基识别中图方法效率不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图方法存在图构建偏差及缺乏预训练模型两大缺陷，导致其性能远低于传统帧基方法。
AI.method: 设计动态聚合模块自适应整合顶点多属性，提出CRD框架利用帧表示作为辅助监督，实现帧到图的知识迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在多个视觉任务中均表现优异，验证了方法的有效性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态图结构优化与跨表示蒸馏，本文方法有效克服了事件基识别中的关键挑战。

authors_text: Jiří Martinů,Jan Novotný,Karel Adámek,Petr Čermák,Jiří Kozel,David Školoudík
title: A Survey of Feature detection methods for localisation of plain sections of Axial Brain Magnetic Resonance Imaging
title_zh: 轴位脑磁共振成像平片定位特征检测方法综述
comment: ef:Biomedical Signal Processing and Control, Volume 82, April 2023, 104611
comments: ef:Biomedical Signal Processing and Control, Volume 82, April 2023, 104611
abstract: Matching MRI brain images between patients or mapping patients' MRI slices to the simulated atlas of a brain is key to the automatic registration of MRI of a brain. The ability to match MRI images would also enable such applications as indexing and searching MRI images among multiple patients or selecting images from the region of interest. In this work, we have introduced robustness, accuracy and cumulative distance metrics and methodology that allows us to compare different techniques and approaches in matching brain MRI of different patients or matching MRI brain slice to a position in the brain atlas. To that end, we have used feature detection methods AGAST, AKAZE, BRISK, GFTT, HardNet, and ORB, which are established methods in image processing, and compared them on their resistance to image degradation and their ability to match the same brain MRI slice of different patients. We have demonstrated that some of these techniques can correctly match most of the brain MRI slices of different patients. When matching is performed with the atlas of the human brain, their performance is significantly lower. The best performing feature detection method was a combination of SIFT detector and HardNet descriptor that achieved 93% accuracy in matching images with other patients and only 52% accurately matched images when compared to atlas.
summary: Matching MRI brain images between patients or mapping patients' MRI slices to the simulated atlas of a brain is key to the automatic registration of MRI of a brain. The ability to match MRI images would also enable such applications as indexing and searching MRI images among multiple patients or selecting images from the region of interest. In this work, we have introduced robustness, accuracy and cumulative distance metrics and methodology that allows us to compare different techniques and approaches in matching brain MRI of different patients or matching MRI brain slice to a position in the brain atlas. To that end, we have used feature detection methods AGAST, AKAZE, BRISK, GFTT, HardNet, and ORB, which are established methods in image processing, and compared them on their resistance to image degradation and their ability to match the same brain MRI slice of different patients. We have demonstrated that some of these techniques can correctly match most of the brain MRI slices of different patients. When matching is performed with the atlas of the human brain, their performance is significantly lower. The best performing feature detection method was a combination of SIFT detector and HardNet descriptor that achieved 93% accuracy in matching images with other patients and only 52% accurately matched images when compared to atlas.
abstract_zh: 将患者之间的 MRI 大脑图像进行匹配或将患者的 MRI 切片映射到大脑的模拟图谱是大脑 MRI 自动配准的关键。匹配 MRI 图像的能力还将使诸如在多个患者之间索引和搜索 MRI 图像或从感兴趣区域选择图像等应用成为可能。在这项工作中，我们引入了鲁棒性、准确性和累积距离度量和方法，使我们能够比较不同患者的脑 MRI 匹配或 MRI 脑切片与脑图谱中的位置匹配的不同技术和方法。为此，我们使用了图像处理中已建立的方法AGAST、AKAZE、BRISK、GFTT、HardNet和ORB等特征检测方法，并比较了它们对图像退化的抵抗力以及与不同患者的相同大脑MRI切片的匹配能力。我们已经证明，其中一些技术可以正确匹配不同患者的大部分脑部 MRI 切片。当与人脑图谱进行匹配时，它们的性能明显较低。性能最佳的特征检测方法是 SIFT 检测器和 HardNet 描述符的组合，与其他患者的图像匹配准确率达到 93%，而与图集相比，图像匹配准确率仅为 52%。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了用于轴向脑磁共振成像平截面定位的特征检测方法。
AI.motivation: 匹配不同患者的MRI脑图像或将其映射到大脑模拟图谱对于自动注册MRI图像至关重要，同时能够实现图像索引、搜索及感兴趣区域的选择。
AI.method: 本文使用了AGAST、AKAZE、BRISK、GFTT、HardNet和ORB等特征检测方法，并比较了它们在图像退化抵抗能力和跨患者MRI图像匹配中的表现。
AI.result: 部分方法能够正确匹配大多数不同患者的脑MRI切片，但在与大脑图谱匹配时性能显著下降。SIFT检测器与HardNet描述符的组合在匹配其他患者图像时达到93%的准确率，但在与图谱匹配时仅达到52%。
AI.conclusion: SIFT与HardNet的组合在跨患者匹配中表现最佳，但在与大脑图谱匹配时效果较差，表明需要进一步研究以提高图谱匹配的性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文综述了用于轴向脑磁共振成像平截面定位的特征检测方法。
ai_content.motivation: 匹配不同患者的MRI脑图像或将其映射到大脑模拟图谱对于自动注册MRI图像至关重要，同时能够实现图像索引、搜索及感兴趣区域的选择。
ai_content.method: 本文使用了AGAST、AKAZE、BRISK、GFTT、HardNet和ORB等特征检测方法，并比较了它们在图像退化抵抗能力和跨患者MRI图像匹配中的表现。
ai_content.result: 部分方法能够正确匹配大多数不同患者的脑MRI切片，但在与大脑图谱匹配时性能显著下降。SIFT检测器与HardNet描述符的组合在匹配其他患者图像时达到93%的准确率，但在与图谱匹配时仅达到52%。
ai_content.conclusion: SIFT与HardNet的组合在跨患者匹配中表现最佳，但在与大脑图谱匹配时效果较差，表明需要进一步研究以提高图谱匹配的性能。

search_text: A Survey of Feature detection methods for localisation of plain sections of Axial Brain Magnetic Resonance Imaging 轴位脑磁共振成像平片定位特征检测方法综述 Matching MRI brain images between patients or mapping patients' MRI slices to the simulated atlas of a brain is key to the automatic registration of MRI of a brain. The ability to match MRI images would also enable such applications as indexing and searching MRI images among multiple patients or selecting images from the region of interest. In this work, we have introduced robustness, accuracy and cumulative distance metrics and methodology that allows us to compare different techniques and approaches in matching brain MRI of different patients or matching MRI brain slice to a position in the brain atlas. To that end, we have used feature detection methods AGAST, AKAZE, BRISK, GFTT, HardNet, and ORB, which are established methods in image processing, and compared them on their resistance to image degradation and their ability to match the same brain MRI slice of different patients. We have demonstrated that some of these techniques can correctly match most of the brain MRI slices of different patients. When matching is performed with the atlas of the human brain, their performance is significantly lower. The best performing feature detection method was a combination of SIFT detector and HardNet descriptor that achieved 93% accuracy in matching images with other patients and only 52% accurately matched images when compared to atlas. 将患者之间的 MRI 大脑图像进行匹配或将患者的 MRI 切片映射到大脑的模拟图谱是大脑 MRI 自动配准的关键。匹配 MRI 图像的能力还将使诸如在多个患者之间索引和搜索 MRI 图像或从感兴趣区域选择图像等应用成为可能。在这项工作中，我们引入了鲁棒性、准确性和累积距离度量和方法，使我们能够比较不同患者的脑 MRI 匹配或 MRI 脑切片与脑图谱中的位置匹配的不同技术和方法。为此，我们使用了图像处理中已建立的方法AGAST、AKAZE、BRISK、GFTT、HardNet和ORB等特征检测方法，并比较了它们对图像退化的抵抗力以及与不同患者的相同大脑MRI切片的匹配能力。我们已经证明，其中一些技术可以正确匹配不同患者的大部分脑部 MRI 切片。当与人脑图谱进行匹配时，它们的性能明显较低。性能最佳的特征检测方法是 SIFT 检测器和 HardNet 描述符的组合，与其他患者的图像匹配准确率达到 93%，而与图集相比，图像匹配准确率仅为 52%。 本文综述了用于轴向脑磁共振成像平截面定位的特征检测方法。 Jiří Martinů,Jan Novotný,Karel Adámek,Petr Čermák,Jiří Kozel,David Školoudík eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Task Space Control of Robot Manipulators based on Visual SLAM
title_zh: 基于视觉SLAM的机器人机械臂任务空间控制
abstract: This paper aims to address the open problem of designing a globally stable vision-based controller for robot manipulators. Accordingly, based on a hybrid mechanism, this paper proposes a novel task-space control law attained by taking the gradient of a potential function in SE(3). The key idea is to employ the Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (VSLAM) algorithm to estimate a robot pose. The estimated robot pose is then used in the proposed hybrid controller as feedback information. Invoking Barbalats lemma and Lyapunov's stability theorem, it is guaranteed that the resulting closed-loop system is globally asymptotically stable, which is the main accomplishment of the proposed structure. Simulation studies are conducted on a six degrees of freedom (6-DOF) robot manipulator to demonstrate the effectiveness and validate the performance of the proposed VSLAM-based control scheme.
summary: This paper aims to address the open problem of designing a globally stable vision-based controller for robot manipulators. Accordingly, based on a hybrid mechanism, this paper proposes a novel task-space control law attained by taking the gradient of a potential function in SE(3). The key idea is to employ the Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (VSLAM) algorithm to estimate a robot pose. The estimated robot pose is then used in the proposed hybrid controller as feedback information. Invoking Barbalats lemma and Lyapunov's stability theorem, it is guaranteed that the resulting closed-loop system is globally asymptotically stable, which is the main accomplishment of the proposed structure. Simulation studies are conducted on a six degrees of freedom (6-DOF) robot manipulator to demonstrate the effectiveness and validate the performance of the proposed VSLAM-based control scheme.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在解决为机器人操纵器设计全局稳定的基于视觉的控制器的开放问题。因此，基于混合机制，本文提出了一种通过SE(3)中势函数的梯度获得的新颖的任务空间控制律。关键思想是采用视觉同步定位与建图（VSLAM）算法来估计机器人姿态。然后，估计的机器人位姿在所提出的混合控制器中用作反馈信息。引用Barbalats引理和Lyapunov稳定性定理，保证了所得闭环系统全局渐近稳定，这是该结构的主要成就。在六自由度 (6-DOF) 机器人操纵器上进行仿真研究，以证明所提出的基于 VSLAM 的控制方案的有效性并验证其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉SLAM的机械臂任务空间控制方法，通过混合机制和势函数梯度设计全局稳定控制器。
AI.motivation: 现有机械臂视觉控制器存在全局稳定性不足的问题，需结合VSLAM技术提升位姿估计精度与控制鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用混合控制架构，利用VSLAM算法估计机器人位姿，结合SE(3)空间势函数梯度生成控制律，并通过Barbalats引理与Lyapunov定理证明系统稳定性。
AI.result: 在6-DOF机械臂仿真中验证了所提控制方案的有效性，证明其可实现全局渐近稳定。
AI.conclusion: 提出的VSLAM视觉控制方法能够有效保证机械臂系统的全局稳定性，为视觉伺服控制提供了新思路。

authors_text: Apiwat Ditthapron,Emmanuel O. Agu,Adam C. Lammert
title: Masking Kernel for Learning Energy-Efficient Representations for Speaker Recognition and Mobile Health
title_zh: 用于学习说话人识别和移动健康的节能表示的屏蔽内核
abstract: Modern smartphones possess hardware for audio acquisition and to perform speech processing tasks such as speaker recognition and health assessment. However, energy consumption remains a concern, especially for resource-intensive DNNs. Prior work has improved the DNN energy efficiency by utilizing a compact model or reducing the dimensions of speech features. Both approaches reduced energy consumption during DNN inference but not during speech acquisition. This paper proposes using a masking kernel integrated into gradient descent during DNN training to learn the most energy-efficient speech length and sampling rate for windowing, a common step for sample construction. To determine the most energy-optimal parameters, a masking function with non-zero derivatives was combined with a low-pass filter. The proposed approach minimizes the energy consumption of both data collection and inference by 57%, and is competitive with speaker recognition and traumatic brain injury detection baselines.
summary: Modern smartphones possess hardware for audio acquisition and to perform speech processing tasks such as speaker recognition and health assessment. However, energy consumption remains a concern, especially for resource-intensive DNNs. Prior work has improved the DNN energy efficiency by utilizing a compact model or reducing the dimensions of speech features. Both approaches reduced energy consumption during DNN inference but not during speech acquisition. This paper proposes using a masking kernel integrated into gradient descent during DNN training to learn the most energy-efficient speech length and sampling rate for windowing, a common step for sample construction. To determine the most energy-optimal parameters, a masking function with non-zero derivatives was combined with a low-pass filter. The proposed approach minimizes the energy consumption of both data collection and inference by 57%, and is competitive with speaker recognition and traumatic brain injury detection baselines.
abstract_zh: 现代智能手机拥有用于音频采集和执行语音处理任务（例如说话人识别和健康评估）的硬件。然而，能源消耗仍然是一个问题，特别是对于资源密集型 DNN 而言。先前的工作通过利用紧凑模型或减少语音特征的维度来提高 DNN 的能量效率。这两种方法都减少了 DNN 推理期间的能耗，但没有减少语音采集期间的能耗。本文提出在 DNN 训练期间使用集成到梯度下降中的掩蔽内核来学习最节能的语音长度和加窗采样率，这是样本构建的常见步骤。为了确定能量最优的参数，将具有非零导数的掩蔽函数与低通滤波器相结合。所提出的方法将数据收集和推理的能耗降低了 57%，并且与说话人识别和创伤性脑损伤检测基线具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种掩码核方法，通过学习最优语音长度和采样率，降低说话人识别和移动健康应用中的能耗。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅减少DNN推理能耗，未解决语音采集阶段的高能耗问题，需同时优化数据采集与模型推理的能效。
AI.method: 在梯度下降训练中集成掩码核，结合非零导数的掩码函数与低通滤波器，学习最优窗口参数以降低整体能耗。
AI.result: 该方法使数据采集与推理能耗均降低57%，且性能与基线方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡能效与性能，适用于移动设备的语音处理任务。

authors_text: Koustav Mullick,Harshil Jain,Sanchit Gupta,Amit Arvind Kale
title: Domain Adaptation of Synthetic Driving Datasets for Real-World Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 现实世界自动驾驶的合成驾驶数据集的域适应
abstract: While developing perception based deep learning models, the benefit of synthetic data is enormous. However, performance of networks trained with synthetic data for certain computer vision tasks degrade significantly when tested on real world data due to the domain gap between them. One of the popular solutions in bridging this gap between synthetic and actual world data is to frame it as a domain adaptation task. In this paper, we propose and evaluate novel ways for the betterment of such approaches. In particular we build upon the method of UNIT-GAN. In normal GAN training for the task of domain translation, pairing of images from both the domains (viz, real and synthetic) is done randomly. We propose a novel method to efficiently incorporate semantic supervision into this pair selection, which helps in boosting the performance of the model along with improving the visual quality of such transformed images. We illustrate our empirical findings on Cityscapes \cite{cityscapes} and challenging synthetic dataset Synscapes. Though the findings are reported on the base network of UNIT-GAN, they can be easily extended to any other similar network.
summary: While developing perception based deep learning models, the benefit of synthetic data is enormous. However, performance of networks trained with synthetic data for certain computer vision tasks degrade significantly when tested on real world data due to the domain gap between them. One of the popular solutions in bridging this gap between synthetic and actual world data is to frame it as a domain adaptation task. In this paper, we propose and evaluate novel ways for the betterment of such approaches. In particular we build upon the method of UNIT-GAN. In normal GAN training for the task of domain translation, pairing of images from both the domains (viz, real and synthetic) is done randomly. We propose a novel method to efficiently incorporate semantic supervision into this pair selection, which helps in boosting the performance of the model along with improving the visual quality of such transformed images. We illustrate our empirical findings on Cityscapes \cite{cityscapes} and challenging synthetic dataset Synscapes. Though the findings are reported on the base network of UNIT-GAN, they can be easily extended to any other similar network.
abstract_zh: 在开发基于感知的深度学习模型时，合成数据的好处是巨大的。然而，由于某些计算机视觉任务的合成数据训练的网络的性能在对现实世界数据进行测试时由于它们之间的域差距而显着下降。弥合合成数据与实际数据之间差距的流行解决方案之一是将其构建为域适应任务。在本文中，我们提出并评估了改进此类方法的新方法。特别是，我们建立在 UNIT-GAN 方法的基础上。在域翻译任务的正常 GAN 训练中，两个域（即真实域和合成域）的图像配对是随机完成的。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，可以有效地将语义监督纳入该对选择中，这有助于提高模型的性能，同时提高此类转换图像的视觉质量。我们阐述了我们对 Cityscapes \cite{cityscapes} 和具有挑战性的合成数据集 Synscapes 的实证研究结果。尽管研究结果是在 UNIT-GAN 的基础网络上报告的，但它们可以轻松扩展到任何其他类似的网络。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进UNIT-GAN方法，解决合成驾驶数据与真实世界数据间的领域差异问题，以提升自动驾驶感知模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 合成数据虽能有效训练深度学习模型，但因与真实数据存在领域差异，导致模型性能下降。需寻找有效方法缩小这一差距。
AI.method: 基于UNIT-GAN框架，提出引入语义监督优化图像配对策略，提升模型性能及生成图像质量。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和Synscapes数据集上验证，模型性能与图像质量显著提升，方法可扩展至其他类似网络。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效缓解领域差异问题，为自动驾驶中的领域适应研究提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Haoyue Zhang,Jennifer S. Polson,Eric J. Yang,Kambiz Nael,William Speier,Corey W. Arnold
title: Predicting Thrombectomy Recanalization from CT Imaging Using Deep Learning Models
title_zh: 使用深度学习模型通过 CT 成像预测血栓切除术再通
comment: Medical Imaging with Deep Learning 2022 accepted short paper Jun 2022
comments: Medical Imaging with Deep Learning 2022 accepted short paper Jun 2022
abstract: For acute ischemic stroke (AIS) patients with large vessel occlusions, clinicians must decide if the benefit of mechanical thrombectomy (MTB) outweighs the risks and potential complications following an invasive procedure. Pre-treatment computed tomography (CT) and angiography (CTA) are widely used to characterize occlusions in the brain vasculature. If a patient is deemed eligible, a modified treatment in cerebral ischemia (mTICI) score will be used to grade how well blood flow is reestablished throughout and following the MTB procedure. An estimation of the likelihood of successful recanalization can support treatment decision-making. In this study, we proposed a fully automated prediction of a patient's recanalization score using pre-treatment CT and CTA imaging. We designed a spatial cross attention network (SCANet) that utilizes vision transformers to localize to pertinent slices and brain regions. Our top model achieved an average cross-validated ROC-AUC of 77.33 $\pm$ 3.9\%. This is a promising result that supports future applications of deep learning on CT and CTA for the identification of eligible AIS patients for MTB.
summary: For acute ischemic stroke (AIS) patients with large vessel occlusions, clinicians must decide if the benefit of mechanical thrombectomy (MTB) outweighs the risks and potential complications following an invasive procedure. Pre-treatment computed tomography (CT) and angiography (CTA) are widely used to characterize occlusions in the brain vasculature. If a patient is deemed eligible, a modified treatment in cerebral ischemia (mTICI) score will be used to grade how well blood flow is reestablished throughout and following the MTB procedure. An estimation of the likelihood of successful recanalization can support treatment decision-making. In this study, we proposed a fully automated prediction of a patient's recanalization score using pre-treatment CT and CTA imaging. We designed a spatial cross attention network (SCANet) that utilizes vision transformers to localize to pertinent slices and brain regions. Our top model achieved an average cross-validated ROC-AUC of 77.33 $\pm$ 3.9\%. This is a promising result that supports future applications of deep learning on CT and CTA for the identification of eligible AIS patients for MTB.
abstract_zh: 对于大血管闭塞的急性缺血性卒中 (AIS) 患者，临床医生必须确定机械血栓切除术 (MTB) 的益处是否大于侵入性手术后的风险和潜在并发症。治疗前计算机断层扫描 (CT) 和血管造影 (CTA) 广泛用于表征脑血管系统的闭塞。如果患者被认为符合资格，则将使用改良的脑缺血治疗 (mTICI) 评分来对 MTB 手术期间和之后血流重建的情况进行分级。成功再通可能性的估计可以支持治疗决策。在本研究中，我们提出使用治疗前 CT 和 CTA 成像对患者的再通评分进行全自动预测。我们设计了一个空间交叉注意网络（SCANet），它利用视觉转换器来定位相关的切片和大脑区域。我们的顶级模型的平均交叉验证 ROC-AUC 为 77.33 $\pm$ 3.9\%。这是一个有希望的结果，支持未来 CT 和 CTA 上的深度学习应用，以识别符合 MTB 条件的 AIS 患者。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的自动化方法，利用CT和CTA影像预测急性缺血性中风患者的取栓再通评分。
AI.motivation: 机械取栓治疗需权衡风险与收益，现有预后评估依赖人工判断，缺乏客观量化工具。
AI.method: 设计空间交叉注意力网络（SCANet），结合视觉Transformer定位关键影像区域进行自动化预测。
AI.result: 最佳模型在交叉验证中达到77.33±3.9%的ROC-AUC，验证了深度学习在该领域的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为临床决策提供客观依据，推动深度学习在脑血管疾病影像分析中的应用发展。

authors_text: Seyed M. R. Modaresi,Aomar Osmani,Mohammadreza Razzazi,Abdelghani Chibani
title: Multi-Modal Evaluation Approach for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 医学图像分割的多模态评估方法
abstract: Manual segmentation of medical images (e.g., segmenting tumors in CT scans) is a high-effort task that can be accelerated with machine learning techniques. However, selecting the right segmentation approach depends on the evaluation function, particularly in medical image segmentation where we must deal with dependency between voxels. For instance, in contrast to classical systems where the predictions are either correct or incorrect, predictions in medical image segmentation may be partially correct and incorrect simultaneously. In this paper, we explore this expressiveness to extract the useful properties of these systems and formally define a novel multi-modal evaluation (MME) approach to measure the effectiveness of different segmentation methods. This approach improves the segmentation evaluation by introducing new relevant and interpretable characteristics, including detection property, boundary alignment, uniformity, total volume, and relative volume. Our proposed approach is open-source and publicly available for use. We have conducted several reproducible experiments, including the segmentation of pancreas, liver tumors, and multi-organs datasets, to show the applicability of the proposed approach.
summary: Manual segmentation of medical images (e.g., segmenting tumors in CT scans) is a high-effort task that can be accelerated with machine learning techniques. However, selecting the right segmentation approach depends on the evaluation function, particularly in medical image segmentation where we must deal with dependency between voxels. For instance, in contrast to classical systems where the predictions are either correct or incorrect, predictions in medical image segmentation may be partially correct and incorrect simultaneously. In this paper, we explore this expressiveness to extract the useful properties of these systems and formally define a novel multi-modal evaluation (MME) approach to measure the effectiveness of different segmentation methods. This approach improves the segmentation evaluation by introducing new relevant and interpretable characteristics, including detection property, boundary alignment, uniformity, total volume, and relative volume. Our proposed approach is open-source and publicly available for use. We have conducted several reproducible experiments, including the segmentation of pancreas, liver tumors, and multi-organs datasets, to show the applicability of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 医学图像的手动分割（例如，在 CT 扫描中分割肿瘤）是一项艰巨的任务，可以通过机器学习技术来加速。然而，选择正确的分割方法取决于评估函数，特别是在医学图像分割中，我们必须处理体素之间的依赖性。例如，与预测要么正确要么不正确的经典系统相反，医学图像分割中的预测可能同时部分正确和不正确。在本文中，我们探索这种表达能力，以提取这些系统的有用属性，并正式定义一种新颖的多模态评估（MME）方法来衡量不同分割方法的有效性。该方法通过引入新的相关且可解释的特征（包括检测属性、边界对齐、均匀性、总体积和相对体积）来改进分割评估。我们提出的方法是开源的并且可供公开使用。我们进行了多项可重复的实验，包括胰腺、肝脏肿瘤和多器官数据集的分割，以展示所提出方法的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多模态评估方法（MME），用于改进医学图像分割任务中不同分割方法的有效性评估。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割中传统评估方法无法准确反映预测结果的局部正确性与边界对齐等特性，需一种更符合医学影像特点的评估体系。
AI.method: 通过定义检测性、边界对齐、均匀性、总体积和相对体积等可解释特性，构建多模态评估框架并开放源代码。
AI.result: 在胰腺、肝肿瘤及多器官数据集上的实验验证了该方法的有效性，能够更全面地评估分割算法性能。
AI.conclusion: MME方法为医学图像分割提供了更精确、可解释的评估标准，有助于优化模型选择与改进分割效果。
