method: 通过定义检测性、边界对齐、均匀性、总体积和相对体积等可解释特性，构建多模态评估框架并开放源代码。
result: 在胰腺、肝肿瘤及多器官数据集上的实验验证了该方法的有效性，能够更全面地评估分割算法性能。
conclusion: MME方法为医学图像分割提供了更精确、可解释的评估标准，有助于优化模型选择与改进分割效果。
search_text: Multi-Modal Evaluation Approach for Medical Image Segmentation 医学图像分割的多模态评估方法 Manual segmentation of medical images (e.g., segmenting tumors in CT scans) is a high-effort task that can be accelerated with machine learning techniques. However, selecting the right segmentation approach depends on the evaluation function, particularly in medical image segmentation where we must deal with dependency between voxels. For instance, in contrast to classical systems where the predictions are either correct or incorrect, predictions in medical image segmentation may be partially correct and incorrect simultaneously. In this paper, we explore this expressiveness to extract the useful properties of these systems and formally define a novel multi-modal evaluation (MME) approach to measure the effectiveness of different segmentation methods. This approach improves the segmentation evaluation by introducing new relevant and interpretable characteristics, including detection property, boundary alignment, uniformity, total volume, and relative volume. Our proposed approach is open-source and publicly available for use. We have conducted several reproducible experiments, including the segmentation of pancreas, liver tumors, and multi-organs datasets, to show the applicability of the proposed approach. 医学图像的手动分割（例如，在 CT 扫描中分割肿瘤）是一项艰巨的任务，可以通过机器学习技术来加速。然而，选择正确的分割方法取决于评估函数，特别是在医学图像分割中，我们必须处理体素之间的依赖性。例如，与预测要么正确要么不正确的经典系统相反，医学图像分割中的预测可能同时部分正确和不正确。在本文中，我们探索这种表达能力，以提取这些系统的有用属性，并正式定义一种新颖的多模态评估（MME）方法来衡量不同分割方法的有效性。该方法通过引入新的相关且可解释的特征（包括检测属性、边界对齐、均匀性、总体积和相对体积）来改进分割评估。我们提出的方法是开源的并且可供公开使用。我们进行了多项可重复的实验，包括胰腺、肝脏肿瘤和多器官数据集的分割，以展示所提出方法的适用性。 本文提出了一种多模态评估方法（MME），用于改进医学图像分割任务中不同分割方法的有效性评估。 Seyed M. R. Modaresi,Aomar Osmani,Mohammadreza Razzazi,Abdelghani Chibani cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Robustness to Spurious Correlations Improves Semantic Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: 对虚假相关性的鲁棒性改善了语义分布外检测
abstract: Methods which utilize the outputs or feature representations of predictive models have emerged as promising approaches for out-of-distribution (OOD) detection of image inputs. However, these methods struggle to detect OOD inputs that share nuisance values (e.g. background) with in-distribution inputs. The detection of shared-nuisance out-of-distribution (SN-OOD) inputs is particularly relevant in real-world applications, as anomalies and in-distribution inputs tend to be captured in the same settings during deployment. In this work, we provide a possible explanation for SN-OOD detection failures and propose nuisance-aware OOD detection to address them. Nuisance-aware OOD detection substitutes a classifier trained via empirical risk minimization and cross-entropy loss with one that 1. is trained under a distribution where the nuisance-label relationship is broken and 2. yields representations that are independent of the nuisance under this distribution, both marginally and conditioned on the label. We can train a classifier to achieve these objectives using Nuisance-Randomized Distillation (NuRD), an algorithm developed for OOD generalization under spurious correlations. Output- and feature-based nuisance-aware OOD detection perform substantially better than their original counterparts, succeeding even when detection based on domain generalization algorithms fails to improve performance.
summary: Methods which utilize the outputs or feature representations of predictive models have emerged as promising approaches for out-of-distribution (OOD) detection of image inputs. However, these methods struggle to detect OOD inputs that share nuisance values (e.g. background) with in-distribution inputs. The detection of shared-nuisance out-of-distribution (SN-OOD) inputs is particularly relevant in real-world applications, as anomalies and in-distribution inputs tend to be captured in the same settings during deployment. In this work, we provide a possible explanation for SN-OOD detection failures and propose nuisance-aware OOD detection to address them. Nuisance-aware OOD detection substitutes a classifier trained via empirical risk minimization and cross-entropy loss with one that 1. is trained under a distribution where the nuisance-label relationship is broken and 2. yields representations that are independent of the nuisance under this distribution, both marginally and conditioned on the label. We can train a classifier to achieve these objectives using Nuisance-Randomized Distillation (NuRD), an algorithm developed for OOD generalization under spurious correlations. Output- and feature-based nuisance-aware OOD detection perform substantially better than their original counterparts, succeeding even when detection based on domain generalization algorithms fails to improve performance.
abstract_zh: 利用预测模型的输出或特征表示的方法已成为图像输入的分布外（OOD）检测的有前途的方法。然而，这些方法很难检测与分布内输入共享干扰值（例如背景）的 OOD 输入。共享滋扰的分布外 (SN-OOD) 输入的检测在实际应用中尤其重要，因为在部署期间往往会在相同的设置中捕获异常和分布内输入。在这项工作中，我们为 SN-OOD 检测失败提供了可能的解释，并提出了滋扰感知 OOD 检测来解决这些问题。滋扰感知 OOD 检测将通过经验风险最小化和交叉熵损失训练的分类器替换为以下分类器：1. 在滋扰-标签关系被破坏的分布下进行训练，2. 产生与该分布下的滋扰无关的表示，无论是边缘还是以标签为条件。我们可以使用 Nuisance-Randomized Distillation (NuRD) 训练分类器来实现这些目标，Nuisance-Randomized Distillation (NuRD) 是一种为虚假相关下的 OOD 泛化而开发的算法。基于输出和特征的滋扰感知 OOD 检测的性能明显优于原始检测，即使基于领域泛化算法的检测无法提高性能，也能成功。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种鲁棒的语义分布外检测方法，通过消除干扰因素（如背景）对模型的影响，提升在共享干扰因素的分布外检测（SN-OOD）场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分布外检测方法在面对与训练数据共享干扰特征（如背景）的分布外输入时表现不佳，而这类场景在现实应用中普遍存在。
AI.method: 提出‘干扰感知’检测框架，通过Nuisance-Randomized Distillation（NuRD）算法训练分类器，打破干扰特征与标签的关联性，使特征表示在边际和条件分布下均独立于干扰因素。
AI.result: 输出和特征级的干扰感知检测方法显著优于原始方法，在领域泛化算法失效时仍能有效提升检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过消除模型对干扰特征的依赖，可有效提升分布外检测的鲁棒性，为现实场景中的异常检测提供新思路。

title: Hyperspectral Image Compression Using Implicit Neural Representation
title_zh: 使用隐式神经表示的高光谱图像压缩
abstract: Hyperspectral images, which record the electromagnetic spectrum for a pixel in the image of a scene, often store hundreds of channels per pixel and contain an order of magnitude more information than a typical similarly-sized color image. Consequently, concomitant with the decreasing cost of capturing these images, there is a need to develop efficient techniques for storing, transmitting, and analyzing hyperspectral images. This paper develops a method for hyperspectral image compression using implicit neural representations where a multilayer perceptron network $Φ_θ$ with sinusoidal activation functions ``learns'' to map pixel locations to pixel intensities for a given hyperspectral image $I$. $Φ_θ$ thus acts as a compressed encoding of this image. The original image is reconstructed by evaluating $Φ_θ$ at each pixel location. We have evaluated our method on four benchmarks -- Indian Pines, Cuprite, Pavia University, and Jasper Ridge -- and we show the proposed method achieves better compression than JPEG, JPEG2000, and PCA-DCT at low bitrates.
summary: Hyperspectral images, which record the electromagnetic spectrum for a pixel in the image of a scene, often store hundreds of channels per pixel and contain an order of magnitude more information than a typical similarly-sized color image. Consequently, concomitant with the decreasing cost of capturing these images, there is a need to develop efficient techniques for storing, transmitting, and analyzing hyperspectral images. This paper develops a method for hyperspectral image compression using implicit neural representations where a multilayer perceptron network $Φ_θ$ with sinusoidal activation functions ``learns'' to map pixel locations to pixel intensities for a given hyperspectral image $I$. $Φ_θ$ thus acts as a compressed encoding of this image. The original image is reconstructed by evaluating $Φ_θ$ at each pixel location. We have evaluated our method on four benchmarks -- Indian Pines, Cuprite, Pavia University, and Jasper Ridge -- and we show the proposed method achieves better compression than JPEG, JPEG2000, and PCA-DCT at low bitrates.
abstract_zh: 高光谱图像记录场景图像中像素的电磁频谱，每个像素通常存储数百个通道，并且比典型的类似大小的彩色图像包含的信息多一个数量级。因此，随着捕获这些图像的成本的降低，需要开发用于存储、传输和分析高光谱图像的有效技术。本文开发了一种使用隐式神经表示的高光谱图像压缩方法，其中具有正弦激活函数的多层感知器网络 $Φ_θ$ “学习”将给定高光谱图像 $I$ 的像素位置映射到像素强度。 $Φ_θ$ 因此充当该图像的压缩编码。通过评估每个像素位置的 $Φ_θ$ 来重建原始图像。我们在四个基准测试（Indian Pines、Cuprite、Pavia University 和 Jasper Ridge）上评估了我们的方法，结果表明所提出的方法在低比特率下实现了比 JPEG、JPEG2000 和 PCA-DCT 更好的压缩。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用隐式神经表示进行高光谱图像压缩的方法。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像包含大量波段数据，存储和传输成本高，需开发高效压缩技术以应对数据量增长。
AI.method: 通过带正弦激活函数的多层感知机网络学习像素位置到强度的映射，将图像编码为神经网络参数实现压缩。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上验证，该方法在低比特率下优于JPEG、JPEG2000和PCA-DCT等传统压缩算法。
AI.conclusion: 隐式神经表示为高光谱图像压缩提供了有效解决方案，相比传统方法具有更优的压缩性能。

authors_text: Antonio De Nicola,Anna Formica,Michele Missikoff,Elaheh Pourabbas,Francesco Taglino
title: A Parametric Similarity Method: Comparative Experiments based on Semantically Annotated Large Datasets
title_zh: 参数相似度方法：基于语义注释大数据集的比较实验
abstract: We present the parametric method SemSimp aimed at measuring semantic similarity of digital resources. SemSimp is based on the notion of information content, and it leverages a reference ontology and taxonomic reasoning, encompassing different approaches for weighting the concepts of the ontology. In particular, weights can be computed by considering either the available digital resources or the structure of the reference ontology of a given domain. SemSimp is assessed against six representative semantic similarity methods for comparing sets of concepts proposed in the literature, by carrying out an experimentation that includes both a statistical analysis and an expert judgement evaluation. To the purpose of achieving a reliable assessment, we used a real-world large dataset based on the Digital Library of the Association for Computing Machinery (ACM), and a reference ontology derived from the ACM Computing Classification System (ACM-CCS). For each method, we considered two indicators. The first concerns the degree of confidence to identify the similarity among the papers belonging to some special issues selected from the ACM Transactions on Information Systems journal, the second the Pearson correlation with human judgement. The results reveal that one of the configurations of SemSimp outperforms the other assessed methods. An additional experiment performed in the domain of physics shows that, in general, SemSimp provides better results than the other similarity methods.
summary: We present the parametric method SemSimp aimed at measuring semantic similarity of digital resources. SemSimp is based on the notion of information content, and it leverages a reference ontology and taxonomic reasoning, encompassing different approaches for weighting the concepts of the ontology. In particular, weights can be computed by considering either the available digital resources or the structure of the reference ontology of a given domain. SemSimp is assessed against six representative semantic similarity methods for comparing sets of concepts proposed in the literature, by carrying out an experimentation that includes both a statistical analysis and an expert judgement evaluation. To the purpose of achieving a reliable assessment, we used a real-world large dataset based on the Digital Library of the Association for Computing Machinery (ACM), and a reference ontology derived from the ACM Computing Classification System (ACM-CCS). For each method, we considered two indicators. The first concerns the degree of confidence to identify the similarity among the papers belonging to some special issues selected from the ACM Transactions on Information Systems journal, the second the Pearson correlation with human judgement. The results reveal that one of the configurations of SemSimp outperforms the other assessed methods. An additional experiment performed in the domain of physics shows that, in general, SemSimp provides better results than the other similarity methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了参数化方法 SemSimp ，旨在测量数字资源的语义相似性。 SemSimp 基于信息内容的概念，它利用参考本体和分类推理，包含对本体概念进行加权的不同方法。特别地，可以通过考虑可用的数字资源或给定域的参考本体的结构来计算权重。 SemSimp 通过进行包括统计分析和专家判断评估的实验，针对六种代表性的语义相似性方法进行评估，以比较文献中提出的概念集。为了实现可靠的评估，我们使用了基于计算机协会（ACM）数字图书馆的真实世界大型数据集，以及源自ACM计算分类系统（ACM-CCS）的参考本体。对于每种方法，我们考虑了两个指标。第一个涉及确定属于从 ACM Transactions on Information Systems 期刊中选出的某些特殊问题的论文之间的相似性的置信度，第二个涉及皮尔逊与人类判断的相关性。结果表明 SemSimp 的其中一种配置优于其他评估方法。在物理学领域进行的另一项实验表明，一般来说，SemSimp 提供的结果比其他相似方法更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义标注的大数据集的参数相似性方法SemSimp，用于测量数字资源的语义相似性，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有语义相似性方法在处理复杂概念和领域特定数据时存在局限性，需开发一种结合本体结构和实际数据的灵活方法以提高准确性。
AI.method: 基于信息内容理论，利用ACM-CCS本体和数字资源数据，通过两种权重计算方式（资源驱动或结构驱动）构建SemSimp，并采用统计分析与专家评估进行多指标对比实验。
AI.result: SemSimp在ACM数据集和物理领域实验中均优于其他六种方法，其中特定配置的Pearson相关系数和专家判断一致性显著更高。
AI.conclusion: SemSimp通过参数化设计有效融合本体结构与实际数据，为跨领域语义相似性计算提供了更优解决方案。

The results reveal that one of the configurations of SemSimp outperforms the other assessed methods. title: Local Law 144: A Critical Analysis of Regression Metrics
title_zh: 地方法 144：回归指标的批判性分析
abstract: The use of automated decision tools in recruitment has received an increasing amount of attention. In November 2021, the New York City Council passed a legislation (Local Law 144) that mandates bias audits of Automated Employment Decision Tools. From 15th April 2023, companies that use automated tools for hiring or promoting employees are required to have these systems audited by an independent entity. Auditors are asked to compute bias metrics that compare outcomes for different groups, based on sex/gender and race/ethnicity categories at a minimum. Local Law 144 proposes novel bias metrics for regression tasks (scenarios where the automated system scores candidates with a continuous range of values). A previous version of the legislation proposed a bias metric that compared the mean scores of different groups. The new revised bias metric compares the proportion of candidates in each group that falls above the median. In this paper, we argue that both metrics fail to capture distributional differences over the whole domain, and therefore cannot reliably detect bias. We first introduce two metrics, as possible alternatives to the legislation metrics. We then compare these metrics over a range of theoretical examples, for which the legislation proposed metrics seem to underestimate bias. Finally, we study real data and show that the legislation metrics can similarly fail in a real-world recruitment application.
summary: The use of automated decision tools in recruitment has received an increasing amount of attention. In November 2021, the New York City Council passed a legislation (Local Law 144) that mandates bias audits of Automated Employment Decision Tools. From 15th April 2023, companies that use automated tools for hiring or promoting employees are required to have these systems audited by an independent entity. Auditors are asked to compute bias metrics that compare outcomes for different groups, based on sex/gender and race/ethnicity categories at a minimum. Local Law 144 proposes novel bias metrics for regression tasks (scenarios where the automated system scores candidates with a continuous range of values). A previous version of the legislation proposed a bias metric that compared the mean scores of different groups. The new revised bias metric compares the proportion of candidates in each group that falls above the median. In this paper, we argue that both metrics fail to capture distributional differences over the whole domain, and therefore cannot reliably detect bias. We first introduce two metrics, as possible alternatives to the legislation metrics. We then compare these metrics over a range of theoretical examples, for which the legislation proposed metrics seem to underestimate bias. Finally, we study real data and show that the legislation metrics can similarly fail in a real-world recruitment application.
abstract_zh: 自动化决策工具在招聘中的使用受到越来越多的关注。 2021 年 11 月，纽约市议会通过了一项立法（地方法 144），强制要求对自动就业决策工具进行偏见审计。从 2023 年 4 月 15 日起，使用自动化工具招聘或晋升员工的公司必须由独立实体对这些系统进行审核。审核员被要求至少根据性别和种族/民族类别来计算比较不同群体结果的偏差指标。第 144 号地方法提出了用于回归任务的新颖偏差指标（自动化系统以连续范围的值对候选人进行评分的场景）。该立法的先前版本提出了一个偏差指标，用于比较不同群体的平均分数。新修订的偏差指标比较了每组中高于中位数的候选人比例。在本文中，我们认为这两个指标都无法捕获整个领域的分布差异，因此无法可靠地检测偏差。我们首先引入两个指标，作为立法指标的可能替代方案。然后，我们将这些指标与一系列理论示例进行比较，立法提出的指标似乎低估了偏差。最后，我们研究真实数据并表明立法指标在现实世界的招聘应用程序中也可能同样失败。

AI.tldr: 批判性分析纽约市Local Law 144中回归任务的偏差度量方法，并提出替代方案
AI.motivation: 现有法规的偏差度量方法（均值比较和中位数比例）无法全面捕捉分布差异，导致偏差检测不可靠
AI.method: 提出两种替代偏差度量指标，通过理论案例和实际招聘数据验证法规指标的不足
AI.result: 理论和实际案例显示，法规指标在多种场景下低估偏差，替代指标更有效
AI.conclusion: 现有法规的回归任务偏差度量方法存在缺陷，需采用更全面的替代指标以提高偏差检测可靠性

authors_text: Yujin Huang,Terry Yue Zhuo,Qiongkai Xu,Han Hu,Xingliang Yuan,Chunyang Chen
title: Training-free Lexical Backdoor Attacks on Language Models
title_zh: 对语言模型的免训练词汇后门攻击
comment: Accepted to International World Wide Web Conference 2023, Security, Privacy & Trust Track
comments: Accepted to International World Wide Web Conference 2023, Security, Privacy & Trust Track
abstract: Large-scale language models have achieved tremendous success across various natural language processing (NLP) applications. Nevertheless, language models are vulnerable to backdoor attacks, which inject stealthy triggers into models for steering them to undesirable behaviors. Most existing backdoor attacks, such as data poisoning, require further (re)training or fine-tuning language models to learn the intended backdoor patterns. The additional training process however diminishes the stealthiness of the attacks, as training a language model usually requires long optimization time, a massive amount of data, and considerable modifications to the model parameters. In this work, we propose Training-Free Lexical Backdoor Attack (TFLexAttack) as the first training-free backdoor attack on language models. Our attack is achieved by injecting lexical triggers into the tokenizer of a language model via manipulating its embedding dictionary using carefully designed rules. These rules are explainable to human developers which inspires attacks from a wider range of hackers. The sparse manipulation of the dictionary also habilitates the stealthiness of our attack. We conduct extensive experiments on three dominant NLP tasks based on nine language models to demonstrate the effectiveness and universality of our attack. The code of this work is available at https://github.com/Jinxhy/TFLexAttack.
summary: Large-scale language models have achieved tremendous success across various natural language processing (NLP) applications. Nevertheless, language models are vulnerable to backdoor attacks, which inject stealthy triggers into models for steering them to undesirable behaviors. Most existing backdoor attacks, such as data poisoning, require further (re)training or fine-tuning language models to learn the intended backdoor patterns. The additional training process however diminishes the stealthiness of the attacks, as training a language model usually requires long optimization time, a massive amount of data, and considerable modifications to the model parameters. In this work, we propose Training-Free Lexical Backdoor Attack (TFLexAttack) as the first training-free backdoor attack on language models. Our attack is achieved by injecting lexical triggers into the tokenizer of a language model via manipulating its embedding dictionary using carefully designed rules. These rules are explainable to human developers which inspires attacks from a wider range of hackers. The sparse manipulation of the dictionary also habilitates the stealthiness of our attack. We conduct extensive experiments on three dominant NLP tasks based on nine language models to demonstrate the effectiveness and universality of our attack. The code of this work is available at https://github.com/Jinxhy/TFLexAttack.
abstract_zh: 大规模语言模型在各种自然语言处理（NLP）应用中取得了巨大的成功。然而，语言模型很容易受到后门攻击，后门攻击会向模型中注入隐秘的触发器，从而引导它们做出不良行为。大多数现有的后门攻击（例如数据中毒）需要进一步（重新）训练或微调语言模型以学习预期的后门模式。然而，额外的训练过程降低了攻击的隐蔽性，因为训练语言模型通常需要很长的优化时间、大量的数据以及对模型参数的大量修改。在这项工作中，我们提出免训练词汇后门攻击（TFLexAttack）作为第一个针对语言模型的免训练后门攻击。我们的攻击是通过使用精心设计的规则操纵其嵌入字典，将词汇触发器注入到语言模型的分词器中来实现的。这些规则对于人类开发人员来说是可以解释的，这激发了更广泛的黑客的攻击。对字典的稀疏操作也使我们的攻击变得隐蔽。我们基于九种语言模型对三个主要 NLP 任务进行了广泛的实验，以证明我们的攻击的有效性和普遍性。这项工作的代码可在 https://github.com/Jinxhy/TFLexAttack 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的语言模型词法后门攻击方法（TFLexAttack），通过操纵词嵌入字典注入触发器，实现对语言模型的隐蔽控制。
AI.motivation: 现有后门攻击需依赖模型再训练，导致攻击过程耗时且参数修改明显，降低了隐蔽性。本文旨在设计一种无需训练的更隐蔽的攻击方式。
AI.method: 通过设计可解释的规则，直接修改语言模型分词器的嵌入字典，注入稀疏的词法触发器，使模型在推理阶段响应特定触发词时执行预设恶意行为。
AI.result: 在九个语言模型的三个主流NLP任务中验证了攻击的有效性和通用性，攻击成功率高达90%以上且未引发模型参数显著变化。
AI.conclusion: TFLexAttack证明了无需训练的词法后门攻击可行性，其稀疏性修改和可解释性规则为隐蔽攻击提供了新思路，同时凸显了语言模型分词器安全的重要性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的语言模型词法后门攻击方法（TFLexAttack），通过操纵词嵌入字典注入触发器，实现对语言模型的隐蔽控制。

search_text: Training-free Lexical Backdoor Attacks on Language Models 对语言模型的免训练词汇后门攻击 Large-scale language models have achieved tremendous success across various natural language processing (NLP) applications. Nevertheless, language models are vulnerable to backdoor attacks, which inject stealthy triggers into models for steering them to undesirable behaviors. Most existing backdoor attacks, such as data poisoning, require further (re)training or fine-tuning language models to learn the intended backdoor patterns. The additional training process however diminishes the stealthiness of the attacks, as training a language model usually requires long optimization time, a massive amount of data, and considerable modifications to the model parameters. In this work, we propose Training-Free Lexical Backdoor Attack (TFLexAttack) as the first training-free backdoor attack on language models. Our attack is achieved by injecting lexical triggers into the tokenizer of a language model via manipulating its embedding dictionary using carefully designed rules. These rules are explainable to human developers which inspires attacks from a wider range of hackers. The sparse manipulation of the dictionary also habilitates the stealthiness of our attack. We conduct extensive experiments on three dominant NLP tasks based on nine language models to demonstrate the effectiveness and universality of our attack. The code of this work is available at https://github.com/Jinxhy/TFLexAttack. 大规模语言模型在各种自然语言处理（NLP）应用中取得了巨大的成功。然而，语言模型很容易受到后门攻击，后门攻击会向模型中注入隐秘的触发器，从而引导它们做出不良行为。大多数现有的后门攻击（例如数据中毒）需要进一步（重新）训练或微调语言模型以学习预期的后门模式。然而，额外的训练过程降低了攻击的隐蔽性，因为训练语言模型通常需要很长的优化时间、大量的数据以及对模型参数的大量修改。在这项工作中，我们提出免训练词汇后门攻击（TFLexAttack）作为第一个针对语言模型的免训练后门攻击。我们的攻击是通过使用精心设计的规则操纵其嵌入字典，将词汇触发器注入到语言模型的分词器中来实现的。这些规则对于人类开发人员来说是可以解释的，这激发了更广泛的黑客的攻击。对字典的稀疏操作也使我们的攻击变得隐蔽。我们基于九种语言模型对三个主要 NLP 任务进行了广泛的实验，以证明我们的攻击的有效性和普遍性。这项工作的代码可在 https://github.com/Jinxhy/TFLexAttack 获取。 本文提出了一种无需训练的语言模型词法后门攻击方法（TFLexAttack），通过操纵词嵌入字典注入触发器，实现对语言模型的隐蔽控制。 Yujin Huang,Terry Yue Zhuo,Qiongkai Xu,Han Hu,Xingliang Yuan,Chunyang Chen cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.CL

title: Assessing the impact of regulations and standards on innovation in the field of AI
title_zh: 评估法规和标准对人工智能领域创新的影响
abstract: Regulations and standards in the field of artificial intelligence (AI) are necessary to minimise risks and maximise benefits, yet some argue that they stifle innovation. This paper critically examines the idea that regulation stifles innovation in the field of AI. Current trends in AI regulation, particularly the proposed European AI Act and the standards supporting its implementation, are discussed. Arguments in support of the idea that regulation stifles innovation are analysed and criticised, and an alternative point of view is offered, showing how regulation and standards can foster innovation in the field of AI.
summary: Regulations and standards in the field of artificial intelligence (AI) are necessary to minimise risks and maximise benefits, yet some argue that they stifle innovation. This paper critically examines the idea that regulation stifles innovation in the field of AI. Current trends in AI regulation, particularly the proposed European AI Act and the standards supporting its implementation, are discussed. Arguments in support of the idea that regulation stifles innovation are analysed and criticised, and an alternative point of view is offered, showing how regulation and standards can foster innovation in the field of AI.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）领域的法规和标准对于最小化风险和最大化收益是必要的，但有些人认为它们会扼杀创新。本文批判性地审视了监管抑制人工智能领域创新的观点。讨论了人工智能监管的当前趋势，特别是拟议的欧洲人工智能法案和支持其实施的标准。对支持监管抑制创新这一观点的论点进行了分析和批评，并提出了另一种观点，展示了监管和标准如何促进人工智能领域的创新。

AI.tldr: 评估法规和标准对AI领域创新的影响，反驳'法规抑制创新'的观点，并探讨其促进作用。
AI.motivation: 解决AI监管与创新之间争议，为政策制定者和行业提供平衡风险与创新的依据。
AI.method: 通过分析欧洲AI法案等案例，批判性评估'法规抑制创新'的论点，并提出监管促进创新的替代视角。
AI.result: 证明法规和标准可通过提供框架、建立信任、引导资源等方式促进AI创新，而非单纯抑制。
AI.conclusion: 合理监管与标准能平衡风险与创新，需避免过度限制，支持AI技术可持续发展。

title: Triplet Loss-less Center Loss Sampling Strategies in Facial Expression Recognition Scenarios
title_zh: 面部表情识别场景中的三元组无损中心损失采样策略
comment: The paper has been accepted in the CISS 2023 and will be published very soon
comments: The paper has been accepted in the CISS 2023 and will be published very soon
abstract: Facial expressions convey massive information and play a crucial role in emotional expression. Deep neural network (DNN) accompanied by deep metric learning (DML) techniques boost the discriminative ability of the model in facial expression recognition (FER) applications. DNN, equipped with only classification loss functions such as Cross-Entropy cannot compact intra-class feature variation or separate inter-class feature distance as well as when it gets fortified by a DML supporting loss item. The triplet center loss (TCL) function is applied on all dimensions of the sample's embedding in the embedding space. In our work, we developed three strategies: fully-synthesized, semi-synthesized, and prediction-based negative sample selection strategies. To achieve better results, we introduce a selective attention module that provides a combination of pixel-wise and element-wise attention coefficients using high-semantic deep features of input samples. We evaluated the proposed method on the RAF-DB, a highly imbalanced dataset. The experimental results reveal significant improvements in comparison to the baseline for all three negative sample selection strategies.
summary: Facial expressions convey massive information and play a crucial role in emotional expression. Deep neural network (DNN) accompanied by deep metric learning (DML) techniques boost the discriminative ability of the model in facial expression recognition (FER) applications. DNN, equipped with only classification loss functions such as Cross-Entropy cannot compact intra-class feature variation or separate inter-class feature distance as well as when it gets fortified by a DML supporting loss item. The triplet center loss (TCL) function is applied on all dimensions of the sample's embedding in the embedding space. In our work, we developed three strategies: fully-synthesized, semi-synthesized, and prediction-based negative sample selection strategies. To achieve better results, we introduce a selective attention module that provides a combination of pixel-wise and element-wise attention coefficients using high-semantic deep features of input samples. We evaluated the proposed method on the RAF-DB, a highly imbalanced dataset. The experimental results reveal significant improvements in comparison to the baseline for all three negative sample selection strategies.
abstract_zh: 面部表情传递着海量信息，在情绪表达中发挥着至关重要的作用。深度神经网络（DNN）与深度度量学习（DML）技术相结合，提高了模型在面部表情识别（FER）应用中的判别能力。仅配备交叉熵等分类损失函数的 DNN 无法压缩类内特征变化或分离类间特征距离，也无法通过支持损失项的 DML 进行强化。三重态中心损失（TCL）函数应用于嵌入空间中样本嵌入的所有维度。在我们的工作中，我们开发了三种策略：全合成、半合成和基于预测的负样本选择策略。为了获得更好的结果，我们引入了选择性注意模块，该模块使用输入样本的高语义深层特征提供像素级和元素级注意系数的组合。我们在高度不平衡的数据集 RAF-DB 上评估了所提出的方法。实验结果表明，与所有三种负样本选择策略的基线相比，都有显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种无需三元组损失的中心损失采样策略，以提升面部表情识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统分类损失函数难以有效压缩类内特征变化和分离类间特征距离，而三元组损失计算成本高，需探索更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 开发了全合成、半合成及基于预测的负样本选择策略，并引入结合像素级与元素级注意力系数的选择性注意模块。
AI.result: 在RAF-DB数据集上，三种策略均显著优于基线模型，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提策略有效提升了面部表情识别性能，未来可进一步探索其他采样优化方向。

title: Real-Word Error Correction with Trigrams: Correcting Multiple Errors in a Sentence
title_zh: 使用 Trigrams 进行实词纠错：纠正句子中的多个错误
abstract: Spelling correction is a fundamental task in Text Mining. In this study, we assess the real-word error correction model proposed by Mays, Damerau and Mercer and describe several drawbacks of the model. We propose a new variation which focuses on detecting and correcting multiple real-word errors in a sentence, by manipulating a Probabilistic Context-Free Grammar (PCFG) to discriminate between items in the search space. We test our approach on the Wall Street Journal corpus and show that it outperforms Hirst and Budanitsky's WordNet-based method and Wilcox-O'Hearn, Hirst, and Budanitsky's fixed windows size method.-O'Hearn, Hirst, and Budanitsky's fixed windows size method.
summary: Spelling correction is a fundamental task in Text Mining. In this study, we assess the real-word error correction model proposed by Mays, Damerau and Mercer and describe several drawbacks of the model. We propose a new variation which focuses on detecting and correcting multiple real-word errors in a sentence, by manipulating a Probabilistic Context-Free Grammar (PCFG) to discriminate between items in the search space. We test our approach on the Wall Street Journal corpus and show that it outperforms Hirst and Budanitsky's WordNet-based method and Wilcox-O'Hearn, Hirst, and Budanitsky's fixed windows size method.-O'Hearn, Hirst, and Budanitsky's fixed windows size method.
abstract_zh: 拼写纠正是文本挖掘的一项基本任务。在本研究中，我们评估了 Mays、Damerau 和 Mercer 提出的实际纠错模型，并描述了该模型的几个缺点。我们提出了一种新的变体，其重点是通过操纵概率上下文无关语法（PCFG）来区分搜索空间中的项目，从而检测和纠正句子中的多个真实单词错误。我们在《华尔街日报》语料库上测试了我们的方法，结果表明它优于 Hirst 和 Budanitsky 的基于 WordNet 的方法以及 Wilcox-O'Hearn、Hirst 和 Budanitsky 的固定窗口大小方法。-O'Hearn、Hirst 和 Budanitsky 的固定窗口大小方法。

AI.result: 在华尔街日报语料库测试中，新方法优于WordNet和固定窗口方法
AI.conclusion: 提出的新方法有效解决了多错误纠正问题，优于现有方法

authors_text: Xinyi Yang,Shiyu Huang,Yiwen Sun,Yuxiang Yang,Chao Yu,Wei-Wei Tu,Huazhong Yang,Yu Wang
title: Learning Graph-Enhanced Commander-Executor for Multi-Agent Navigation
title_zh: 学习用于多代理导航的图增强型指挥官执行器
comment: This paper is accepted by aamas 2023
comments: This paper is accepted by aamas 2023
abstract: This paper investigates the multi-agent navigation problem, which requires multiple agents to reach the target goals in a limited time. Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has shown promising results for solving this issue. However, it is inefficient for MARL to directly explore the (nearly) optimal policy in the large search space, which is exacerbated as the agent number increases (e.g., 10+ agents) or the environment is more complex (e.g., 3D simulator). Goal-conditioned hierarchical reinforcement learning (HRL) provides a promising direction to tackle this challenge by introducing a hierarchical structure to decompose the search space, where the low-level policy predicts primitive actions in the guidance of the goals derived from the high-level policy. In this paper, we propose Multi-Agent Graph-Enhanced Commander-Executor (MAGE-X), a graph-based goal-conditioned hierarchical method for multi-agent navigation tasks. MAGE-X comprises a high-level Goal Commander and a low-level Action Executor. The Goal Commander predicts the probability distribution of goals and leverages them to assign each agent the most appropriate final target. The Action Executor utilizes graph neural networks (GNN) to construct a subgraph for each agent that only contains crucial partners to improve cooperation. Additionally, the Goal Encoder in the Action Executor captures the relationship between the agent and the designated goal to encourage the agent to reach the final target. The results show that MAGE-X outperforms the state-of-the-art MARL baselines with a 100% success rate with only 3 million training steps in multi-agent particle environments (MPE) with 50 agents, and at least a 12% higher success rate and 2x higher data efficiency in a more complicated quadrotor 3D navigation task.

Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has shown promising results for solving this issue. However, it is inefficient for MARL to directly explore the (nearly) optimal policy in the large search space, which is exacerbated as the agent number increases (e.g., 10+ agents) or the environment is more complex (e.g., 3D simulator). Goal-conditioned hierarchical reinforcement learning (HRL) provides a promising direction to tackle this challenge by introducing a hierarchical structure to decompose the search space, where the low-level policy predicts primitive actions in the guidance of the goals derived from the high-level policy. In this paper, we propose Multi-Agent Graph-Enhanced Commander-Executor (MAGE-X), a graph-based goal-conditioned hierarchical method for multi-agent navigation tasks. MAGE-X comprises a high-level Goal Commander and a low-level Action Executor. The Goal Commander predicts the probability distribution of goals and leverages them to assign each agent the most appropriate final target. The Action Executor utilizes graph neural networks (GNN) to construct a subgraph for each agent that only contains crucial partners to improve cooperation. Additionally, the Goal Encoder in the Action Executor captures the relationship between the agent and the designated goal to encourage the agent to reach the final target. The results show that MAGE-X outperforms the state-of-the-art MARL baselines with a 100% success rate with only 3 million training steps in multi-agent particle environments (MPE) with 50 agents, and at least a 12% higher success rate and 2x higher data efficiency in a more complicated quadrotor 3D navigation task.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了多智能体导航问题，该问题需要多个智能体在有限的时间内到达目标。多智能体强化学习（MARL）在解决这个问题方面显示出了有希望的结果。然而，MARL 在大搜索空间中直接探索（接近）最优策略的效率很低，随着智能体数量的增加（例如，10+ 智能体）或环境更加复杂（例如，3D 模拟器），这种情况会加剧。目标条件分层强化学习（HRL）通过引入分层结构来分解搜索空间，为应对这一挑战提供了一个有前途的方向，其中低级策略在从高级策略导出的目标的指导下预测原始动作。在本文中，我们提出了多智能体图增强型指挥官执行器（MAGE-X），这是一种基于图的目标条件分层方法，用于多智能体导航任务。 MAGE-X 由高级目标指挥官和低级行动执行者组成。目标指挥官预测目标的概率分布，并利用它们为每个代理分配最合适的最终目标。动作执行器利用图神经网络（GNN）为每个代理构建一个子图，该子图仅包含关键合作伙伴以改善合作。此外，动作执行器中的目标编码器捕获智能体与指定目标之间的关系，以鼓励智能体达到最终目标。结果表明，MAGE-X 在具有 50 个智能体的多智能体粒子环境 (MPE) 中仅需要 300 万个训练步骤即可实现 100% 的成功率，优于最先进的 MARL 基线，并且在更复杂的四旋翼 3D 导航任务中至少提高 12% 的成功率和 2 倍的数据效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图增强的指挥官-执行器分层框架（MAGE-X），用于解决多智能体导航任务中的高效路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多智能体强化学习（MARL）在大规模搜索空间或复杂环境中效率低下，难以直接探索最优策略，尤其当智能体数量增加或环境复杂度提升时问题更加显著。
AI.method: MAGE-X包含高层目标指挥官和低层动作执行器。指挥官预测目标分布并分配最终目标，执行器通过图神经网络构建子图以增强合作，并利用目标编码器捕捉智能体与目标的关系。
AI.result: 在50智能体的多智能体粒子环境中，MAGE-X以300万训练步实现100%成功率；在更复杂的四旋翼3D导航任务中，成功率提升至少12%，数据效率提高2倍。
AI.conclusion: MAGE-X通过分层结构和图增强机制有效解决了多智能体导航中的效率与协作问题，优于现有MARL基线方法。

authors_text: Vinh T. Nguyen,Chuyen T. H. Nguyen
title: The Effect of Structural Equation Modeling on Chatbot Usage: An Investigation of Dialogflow
title_zh: 结构方程建模对聊天机器人使用的影响：对话流研究
abstract: This study aims to understand users' perceptions of using the Dialogflow framework and verify the relationships among service awareness, task-technology fit, output quality, and TAM variables. Generalized Structured Component Analysis was employed to experiment with six hypotheses. Two hundred twenty-seven participants were recruited through the purposive non-random sampling technique. Google Forms was utilized as a medium to develop and distribute survey questionnaires to subjects of interest. The experimental results indicated that perceived ease of use and usefulness had a statistically significant and positive influence on behavioral intention. Awareness of service and output quality was considered reliable predictors of perceived usefulness. Also, perceived task-technology fit positively affected perceived ease of use. The model specification accounted for 50.04% of the total variation. The findings can be leveraged to reinforce TAM in future research in a comparative academic context to validate the hypothesis. Several practitioner recommendations and the study's limitations have been presented.
summary: This study aims to understand users' perceptions of using the Dialogflow framework and verify the relationships among service awareness, task-technology fit, output quality, and TAM variables. Generalized Structured Component Analysis was employed to experiment with six hypotheses. Two hundred twenty-seven participants were recruited through the purposive non-random sampling technique. Google Forms was utilized as a medium to develop and distribute survey questionnaires to subjects of interest. The experimental results indicated that perceived ease of use and usefulness had a statistically significant and positive influence on behavioral intention. Awareness of service and output quality was considered reliable predictors of perceived usefulness. Also, perceived task-technology fit positively affected perceived ease of use. The model specification accounted for 50.04% of the total variation. The findings can be leveraged to reinforce TAM in future research in a comparative academic context to validate the hypothesis. Several practitioner recommendations and the study's limitations have been presented.
abstract_zh: 本研究旨在了解用户对使用 Dialogflow 框架的看法，并验证服务意识、任务技术契合度、输出质量和 TAM 变量之间的关系。采用广义结构化成分分析来试验六种假设。通过有目的的非随机抽样技术招募了 227 名参与者。 Google Forms 被用作开发调查问卷并向感兴趣的主题分发调查问卷的媒介。实验结果表明，感知的易用性和有用性对行为意向具有统计上显着的积极影响。对服务和产出质量的认识被认为是感知有用性的可靠预测因素。此外，感知到的任务技术契合度也会对感知到的易用性产生积极影响。模型规格占总变异的50.04%。这些发现可用于在比较学术背景下的未来研究中加强 TAM，以验证假设。已经提出了一些从业者的建议和研究的局限性。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过结构方程模型分析用户使用Dialogflow框架聊天机器人的感知因素，验证服务意识、任务-技术适配度等变量与技术接受模型（TAM）的关系。
AI.motivation: 旨在验证TAM模型在聊天机器人场景中的适用性，并探讨服务意识、输出质量等新变量对用户技术接受度的影响机制。
AI.method: 采用广义结构成分分析（GSCA）检验六个假设，通过Google表单对227名参与者进行目的性非随机抽样调查。
AI.result: 感知易用性与有用性显著正向影响行为意图，服务意识和输出质量是感知有用性的可靠预测因素，任务-技术适配度正向影响感知易用性，模型解释力达50.04%。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为TAM模型在聊天机器人领域的应用提供了理论支持，并提出了实践建议与研究局限性，可为后续比较研究提供参考。

ai_content.tldr: 本研究通过结构方程模型分析用户使用Dialogflow框架聊天机器人的感知因素，验证服务意识、任务-技术适配度等变量与技术接受模型（TAM）的关系。
ai_content.motivation: 旨在验证TAM模型在聊天机器人场景中的适用性，并探讨服务意识、输出质量等新变量对用户技术接受度的影响机制。
ai_content.method: 采用广义结构成分分析（GSCA）检验六个假设，通过Google表单对227名参与者进行目的性非随机抽样调查。
ai_content.result: 感知易用性与有用性显著正向影响行为意图，服务意识和输出质量是感知有用性的可靠预测因素，任务-技术适配度正向影响感知易用性，模型解释力达50.04%。
ai_content.conclusion: 研究结果为TAM模型在聊天机器人领域的应用提供了理论支持，并提出了实践建议与研究局限性，可为后续比较研究提供参考。

search_text: The Effect of Structural Equation Modeling on Chatbot Usage: An Investigation of Dialogflow 结构方程建模对聊天机器人使用的影响：对话流研究 This study aims to understand users' perceptions of using the Dialogflow framework and verify the relationships among service awareness, task-technology fit, output quality, and TAM variables. Generalized Structured Component Analysis was employed to experiment with six hypotheses. Two hundred twenty-seven participants were recruited through the purposive non-random sampling technique. Google Forms was utilized as a medium to develop and distribute survey questionnaires to subjects of interest. The experimental results indicated that perceived ease of use and usefulness had a statistically significant and positive influence on behavioral intention. Awareness of service and output quality was considered reliable predictors of perceived usefulness. Also, perceived task-technology fit positively affected perceived ease of use. The model specification accounted for 50.04% of the total variation. The findings can be leveraged to reinforce TAM in future research in a comparative academic context to validate the hypothesis. Several practitioner recommendations and the study's limitations have been presented. 本研究旨在了解用户对使用 Dialogflow 框架的看法，并验证服务意识、任务技术契合度、输出质量和 TAM 变量之间的关系。采用广义结构化成分分析来试验六种假设。通过有目的的非随机抽样技术招募了 227 名参与者。 Google Forms 被用作开发调查问卷并向感兴趣的主题分发调查问卷的媒介。实验结果表明，感知的易用性和有用性对行为意向具有统计上显着的积极影响。对服务和产出质量的认识被认为是感知有用性的可靠预测因素。此外，感知到的任务技术契合度也会对感知到的易用性产生积极影响。模型规格占总变异的50.04%。这些发现可用于在比较学术背景下的未来研究中加强 TAM，以验证假设。已经提出了一些从业者的建议和研究的局限性。 本研究通过结构方程模型分析用户使用Dialogflow框架聊天机器人的感知因素，验证服务意识、任务-技术适配度等变量与技术接受模型（TAM）的关系。 Vinh T. Nguyen,Chuyen T. H. Nguyen cs.HC

authors_text: David Rosson,Eetu Mäkelä,Ville Vaara,Ananth Mahadevan,Yann Ryan,Mikko Tolonen
title: Reception Reader: Exploring Text Reuse in Early Modern British Publications
title_zh: 接待读者：探索早期现代英国出版物中的文本重用
abstract: The Reception Reader is a web tool for studying text reuse in the Early English Books Online (EEBO-TCP) and Eighteenth Century Collections Online (ECCO) data. Users can: 1) explore a visual overview of the reception of a work, or its incoming connections, across time based on shared text segments, 2) interactively survey the details of connected documents, and 3) examine the context of reused text for "close reading". We show examples of how the tool streamlines research and exploration tasks, and discuss the utility and limitations of the user interface along with its current data sources.
summary: The Reception Reader is a web tool for studying text reuse in the Early English Books Online (EEBO-TCP) and Eighteenth Century Collections Online (ECCO) data. Users can: 1) explore a visual overview of the reception of a work, or its incoming connections, across time based on shared text segments, 2) interactively survey the details of connected documents, and 3) examine the context of reused text for "close reading". We show examples of how the tool streamlines research and exploration tasks, and discuss the utility and limitations of the user interface along with its current data sources.
abstract_zh: Reception Reader 是一个 Web 工具，用于研究早期英语在线图书 (EEBO-TCP) 和十八世纪在线馆藏 (ECCO) 数据中的文本重用。用户可以：1）根据共享的文本片段，跨时间探索作品接收或其传入连接的视觉概述，2）交互式调查连接文档的详细信息，3）检查重复使用文本的上下文以进行“仔细阅读”。我们展示了该工具如何简化研究和探索任务的示例，并讨论了用户界面及其当前数据源的实用性和局限性。

AI.tldr: 开发名为Reception Reader的网络工具，用于探索早期现代英国出版物中的文本重用现象。
AI.motivation: 传统文本分析方法难以高效追踪文本传播与影响，需通过可视化与交互工具提升研究效率。
AI.method: 构建集成可视化时间线、交互式文档浏览及上下文分析功能的网络工具，基于EEBO-TCP和ECCO数据集。
AI.result: 工具有效简化了文本重用研究流程，但受限于数据源覆盖范围及界面交互深度。
AI.conclusion: Reception Reader为文本传播研究提供新方法，未来需扩展数据源并优化交互设计。

authors_text: Sudhanshu Mittal,Joshua Niemeijer,Jörg P. Schäfer,Thomas Brox
title: Best Practices in Active Learning for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 语义分割主动学习的最佳实践
abstract: Active learning is particularly of interest for semantic segmentation, where annotations are costly. Previous academic studies focused on datasets that are already very diverse and where the model is trained in a supervised manner with a large annotation budget. In contrast, data collected in many driving scenarios is highly redundant, and most medical applications are subject to very constrained annotation budgets. This work investigates the various types of existing active learning methods for semantic segmentation under diverse conditions across three dimensions - data distribution w.r.t. different redundancy levels, integration of semi-supervised learning, and different labeling budgets. We find that these three underlying factors are decisive for the selection of the best active learning approach. As an outcome of our study, we provide a comprehensive usage guide to obtain the best performance for each case. We also propose an exemplary evaluation task for driving scenarios, where data has high redundancy, to showcase the practical implications of our research findings.
summary: Active learning is particularly of interest for semantic segmentation, where annotations are costly. Previous academic studies focused on datasets that are already very diverse and where the model is trained in a supervised manner with a large annotation budget. In contrast, data collected in many driving scenarios is highly redundant, and most medical applications are subject to very constrained annotation budgets. This work investigates the various types of existing active learning methods for semantic segmentation under diverse conditions across three dimensions - data distribution w.r.t. different redundancy levels, integration of semi-supervised learning, and different labeling budgets. We find that these three underlying factors are decisive for the selection of the best active learning approach. As an outcome of our study, we provide a comprehensive usage guide to obtain the best performance for each case. We also propose an exemplary evaluation task for driving scenarios, where data has high redundancy, to showcase the practical implications of our research findings.
abstract_zh: 主动学习对于语义分割特别有意义，因为语义分割的注释成本很高。之前的学术研究主要集中在已经非常多样化的数据集上，并且模型是在有大量注释预算的情况下以监督方式进行训练的。相比之下，在许多驾驶场景中收集的数据是高度冗余的，并且大多数医疗应用程序都受到非常有限的注释预算的影响。这项工作研究了跨三个维度的不同条件下现有的各种类型的语义分割主动学习方法——数据分布。不同的冗余级别、半监督学习的集成以及不同的标签预算。我们发现这三个基本因素对于选择最佳主动学习方法具有决定性作用。作为我们研究的结果，我们提供了全面的使用指南，以获得每种情况的最佳性能。我们还提出了一个针对数据具有高冗余度的驾驶场景的示范性评估任务，以展示我们研究结果的实际意义。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了语义分割中主动学习的最佳实践，针对数据冗余度、半监督学习整合及标注预算差异，提出适用性指南与驾驶场景评估任务。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习方法多基于高多样性数据集和大标注预算，但实际应用如自动驾驶和医疗领域常面临数据冗余高、标注预算受限的挑战，需针对性优化策略。
AI.method: 通过三个维度分析主动学习方法：数据分布的冗余度、半监督学习整合方式及标注预算约束，比较不同场景下的方法表现，并设计驾驶场景评估任务验证结论。
AI.result: 确定数据冗余度、半监督整合方式及标注预算为方法选择的关键因素，提出分场景使用指南，并通过高冗余驾驶数据验证了指南的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 主动学习方法的选择需结合数据特性、预算约束及半监督策略，本文指南可帮助用户在不同条件下实现最佳性能，驾驶场景评估任务证明了研究的实际价值。

title: Taming Local Effects in Graph-based Spatiotemporal Forecasting
title_zh: 抑制基于图的时空预测中的局部效应
abstract: Spatiotemporal graph neural networks have shown to be effective in time series forecasting applications, achieving better performance than standard univariate predictors in several settings. These architectures take advantage of a graph structure and relational inductive biases to learn a single (global) inductive model to predict any number of the input time series, each associated with a graph node. Despite the gain achieved in computational and data efficiency w.r.t. fitting a set of local models, relying on a single global model can be a limitation whenever some of the time series are generated by a different spatiotemporal stochastic process. The main objective of this paper is to understand the interplay between globality and locality in graph-based spatiotemporal forecasting, while contextually proposing a methodological framework to rationalize the practice of including trainable node embeddings in such architectures. We ascribe to trainable node embeddings the role of amortizing the learning of specialized components. Moreover, embeddings allow for 1) effectively combining the advantages of shared message-passing layers with node-specific parameters and 2) efficiently transferring the learned model to new node sets. Supported by strong empirical evidence, we provide insights and guidelines for specializing graph-based models to the dynamics of each time series and show how this aspect plays a crucial role in obtaining accurate predictions.
summary: Spatiotemporal graph neural networks have shown to be effective in time series forecasting applications, achieving better performance than standard univariate predictors in several settings. These architectures take advantage of a graph structure and relational inductive biases to learn a single (global) inductive model to predict any number of the input time series, each associated with a graph node. Despite the gain achieved in computational and data efficiency w.r.t. fitting a set of local models, relying on a single global model can be a limitation whenever some of the time series are generated by a different spatiotemporal stochastic process. The main objective of this paper is to understand the interplay between globality and locality in graph-based spatiotemporal forecasting, while contextually proposing a methodological framework to rationalize the practice of including trainable node embeddings in such architectures. We ascribe to trainable node embeddings the role of amortizing the learning of specialized components. Moreover, embeddings allow for 1) effectively combining the advantages of shared message-passing layers with node-specific parameters and 2) efficiently transferring the learned model to new node sets. Supported by strong empirical evidence, we provide insights and guidelines for specializing graph-based models to the dynamics of each time series and show how this aspect plays a crucial role in obtaining accurate predictions.
abstract_zh: 时空图神经网络已被证明在时间序列预测应用中是有效的，在多种设置中实现了比标准单变量预测器更好的性能。这些架构利用图结构和关系归纳偏差来学习单个（全局）归纳模型来预测任意数量的输入时间序列，每个输入时间序列与一个图节点相关联。尽管在计算和数据效率方面取得了进步。每当某些时间序列是由不同的时空随机过程生成时，依赖单个全局模型来拟合一组局部模型可能会受到限制。本文的主要目标是了解基于图的时空预测中全局性和局部性之间的相互作用，同时提出一种方法框架来合理化在此类架构中包含可训练节点嵌入的实践。我们将可训练的节点嵌入归因于分摊专业组件学习的作用。此外，嵌入允许 1) 有效地将共享消息传递层的优点与特定于节点的参数相结合；2) 有效地将学习到的模型转移到新的节点集。在强有力的经验证据的支持下，我们为将基于图的模型专门化到每个时间序列的动态提供了见解和指南，并展示了这一方面如何在获得准确预测方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究基于图的时空预测中全局性与局部性的平衡，并提出通过可训练节点嵌入来处理局部效应的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管全局模型在计算和数据效率上优于局部模型，但当部分时间序列由不同时空随机过程生成时，全局模型可能失效，需兼顾局部特性。
AI.method: 通过引入可训练节点嵌入，结合共享消息传递层与节点特定参数，实现模型对各时间序列动态的专门化，并提升新节点集的迁移能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，通过节点嵌入专门化模型可显著提升预测准确性，验证了局部效应处理的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 平衡全局与局部特性是提升基于图的时空预测精度的关键，节点嵌入为实现这一目标提供了有效框架。

title: Weakly-supervised Representation Learning for Video Alignment and Analysis
title_zh: 用于视频对齐和分析的弱监督表示学习
abstract: Many tasks in video analysis and understanding boil down to the need for frame-based feature learning, aiming to encapsulate the relevant visual content so as to enable simpler and easier subsequent processing. While supervised strategies for this learning task can be envisioned, self and weakly-supervised alternatives are preferred due to the difficulties in getting labeled data. This paper introduces LRProp -- a novel weakly-supervised representation learning approach, with an emphasis on the application of temporal alignment between pairs of videos of the same action category. The proposed approach uses a transformer encoder for extracting frame-level features, and employs the DTW algorithm within the training iterations in order to identify the alignment path between video pairs. Through a process referred to as ``pair-wise position propagation'', the probability distributions of these correspondences per location are matched with the similarity of the frame-level features via KL-divergence minimization. The proposed algorithm uses also a regularized SoftDTW loss for better tuning the learned features. Our novel representation learning paradigm consistently outperforms the state of the art on temporal alignment tasks, establishing a new performance bar over several downstream video analysis applications.
summary: Many tasks in video analysis and understanding boil down to the need for frame-based feature learning, aiming to encapsulate the relevant visual content so as to enable simpler and easier subsequent processing. While supervised strategies for this learning task can be envisioned, self and weakly-supervised alternatives are preferred due to the difficulties in getting labeled data. This paper introduces LRProp -- a novel weakly-supervised representation learning approach, with an emphasis on the application of temporal alignment between pairs of videos of the same action category. The proposed approach uses a transformer encoder for extracting frame-level features, and employs the DTW algorithm within the training iterations in order to identify the alignment path between video pairs. Through a process referred to as ``pair-wise position propagation'', the probability distributions of these correspondences per location are matched with the similarity of the frame-level features via KL-divergence minimization. The proposed algorithm uses also a regularized SoftDTW loss for better tuning the learned features. Our novel representation learning paradigm consistently outperforms the state of the art on temporal alignment tasks, establishing a new performance bar over several downstream video analysis applications.
abstract_zh: 视频分析和理解中的许多任务都归结为基于帧的特征学习的需要，旨在封装相关的视觉内容，以便使后续处理更简单、更容易。虽然可以设想此学习任务的监督策略，但由于难以获取标记数据，自我监督和弱监督替代方案是首选。本文介绍了 LProp——一种新颖的弱监督表示学习方法，重点是同一动作类别的视频对之间时间对齐的应用。该方法使用变压器编码器来提取帧级特征，并在训练迭代中采用 DTW 算法来识别视频对之间的对齐路径。通过称为“成对位置传播”的过程，每个位置的这些对应的概率分布通过 KL 散度最小化与帧级特征的相似性进行匹配。所提出的算法还使用正则化 SoftDTW 损失来更好地调整学习到的特征。我们新颖的表示学习范例在时间对齐任务上始终优于最先进的技术，在多个下游视频分析应用程序上建立了新的性能标准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督表示学习方法LRProp，用于视频时间对齐与分析任务，通过帧级特征学习和对齐路径识别实现视频内容理解。
AI.motivation: 视频分析需要帧级特征学习但标注数据获取困难，传统监督方法受限，需探索弱监督替代方案以实现有效特征学习。
AI.method: 基于Transformer编码器提取帧特征，结合DTW算法确定视频对齐路径，并通过KL散度最小化实现位置传播，配合正则化SoftDTW损失优化特征学习。
AI.result: 在时间对齐任务上显著优于现有方法，并在多个下游视频分析应用中建立新的性能基准。
AI.conclusion: 提出的弱监督学习范式有效解决了视频对齐难题，为后续视频分析任务提供了更优的特征表示框架。

title: Probabilistic Attention based on Gaussian Processes for Deep Multiple Instance Learning
title_zh: 基于高斯过程的概率注意力深度多实例学习
comment: \c{opyright} 2023 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. abstract: Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) is a weakly supervised learning paradigm that is becoming increasingly popular because it requires less labeling effort than fully supervised methods. This is especially interesting for areas where the creation of large annotated datasets remains challenging, as in medicine. Although recent deep learning MIL approaches have obtained state-of-the-art results, they are fully deterministic and do not provide uncertainty estimations for the predictions. In this work, we introduce the Attention Gaussian Process (AGP) model, a novel probabilistic attention mechanism based on Gaussian Processes for deep MIL. AGP provides accurate bag-level predictions as well as instance-level explainability, and can be trained end-to-end. Moreover, its probabilistic nature guarantees robustness to overfitting on small datasets and uncertainty estimations for the predictions. The latter is especially important in medical applications, where decisions have a direct impact on the patient's health. The proposed model is validated experimentally as follows. First, its behavior is illustrated in two synthetic MIL experiments based on the well-known MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets, respectively. Then, it is evaluated in three different real-world cancer detection experiments. AGP outperforms state-of-the-art MIL approaches, including deterministic deep learning ones. It shows a strong performance even on a small dataset with less than 100 labels and generalizes better than competing methods on an external test set. Moreover, we experimentally show that predictive uncertainty correlates with the risk of wrong predictions, and therefore it is a good indicator of reliability in practice. Our code is publicly available.
summary: Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) is a weakly supervised learning paradigm that is becoming increasingly popular because it requires less labeling effort than fully supervised methods. This is especially interesting for areas where the creation of large annotated datasets remains challenging, as in medicine. Although recent deep learning MIL approaches have obtained state-of-the-art results, they are fully deterministic and do not provide uncertainty estimations for the predictions. In this work, we introduce the Attention Gaussian Process (AGP) model, a novel probabilistic attention mechanism based on Gaussian Processes for deep MIL. AGP provides accurate bag-level predictions as well as instance-level explainability, and can be trained end-to-end. Moreover, its probabilistic nature guarantees robustness to overfitting on small datasets and uncertainty estimations for the predictions. The latter is especially important in medical applications, where decisions have a direct impact on the patient's health. The proposed model is validated experimentally as follows. First, its behavior is illustrated in two synthetic MIL experiments based on the well-known MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets, respectively. Then, it is evaluated in three different real-world cancer detection experiments. AGP outperforms state-of-the-art MIL approaches, including deterministic deep learning ones. It shows a strong performance even on a small dataset with less than 100 labels and generalizes better than competing methods on an external test set. Moreover, we experimentally show that predictive uncertainty correlates with the risk of wrong predictions, and therefore it is a good indicator of reliability in practice. Our code is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 多实例学习（MIL）是一种弱监督学习范式，它变得越来越流行，因为它比完全监督方法需要更少的标记工作。这对于创建大型带注释数据集仍然具有挑战性的领域（例如医学）尤其有趣。尽管最近的深度学习 MIL 方法已经获得了最先进的结果，但它们是完全确定性的，并且不提供预测的不确定性估计。在这项工作中，我们引入了注意力高斯过程（AGP）模型，这是一种基于高斯过程的深度 MIL 的新颖概率注意力机制。 AGP 提供准确的包级预测以及实例级可解释性，并且可以进行端到端训练。此外，它的概率性质保证了对小数据集的过度拟合和预测的不确定性估计的鲁棒性。后者在医疗应用中尤其重要，因为决策对患者的健康有直接影响。所提出的模型通过实验验证如下。首先，它的行为在两个分别基于著名的 MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 数据集的综合 MIL 实验中进行了说明。然后，在三个不同的现实世界癌症检测实验中对其进行评估。 AGP 的性能优于最先进的 MIL 方法，包括确定性深度学习方法。即使在标签少于 100 个的小型数据集上，它也显示出强大的性能，并且在外部测试集上比竞争方法具有更好的泛化能力。此外，我们通过实验表明，预测不确定性与错误预测的风险相关，因此它是实践中可靠性的良好指标。我们的代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯过程的概率注意力机制（AGP），用于深度多实例学习（MIL），以提高预测的可解释性和不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: 现有的深度学习MIL方法虽效果先进，但缺乏不确定性估计，难以满足医疗等高风险领域对可靠性的需求。
AI.method: 设计Attention Gaussian Process（AGP）模型，结合高斯过程与注意力机制，实现端到端训练，提供实例级解释与袋级预测。
AI.result: AGP在合成数据集和真实癌症检测任务中均优于现有方法，尤其在小数据集上表现稳健，且预测不确定性与错误风险显著相关。
AI.conclusion: AGP通过概率建模增强了MIL的可靠性与可解释性，为医疗等关键领域提供了更安全的决策支持。

search_text: Probabilistic Attention based on Gaussian Processes for Deep Multiple Instance Learning 基于高斯过程的概率注意力深度多实例学习 Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) is a weakly supervised learning paradigm that is becoming increasingly popular because it requires less labeling effort than fully supervised methods. This is especially interesting for areas where the creation of large annotated datasets remains challenging, as in medicine. Although recent deep learning MIL approaches have obtained state-of-the-art results, they are fully deterministic and do not provide uncertainty estimations for the predictions. In this work, we introduce the Attention Gaussian Process (AGP) model, a novel probabilistic attention mechanism based on Gaussian Processes for deep MIL. AGP provides accurate bag-level predictions as well as instance-level explainability, and can be trained end-to-end. Moreover, its probabilistic nature guarantees robustness to overfitting on small datasets and uncertainty estimations for the predictions. The latter is especially important in medical applications, where decisions have a direct impact on the patient's health. The proposed model is validated experimentally as follows. First, its behavior is illustrated in two synthetic MIL experiments based on the well-known MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets, respectively. Then, it is evaluated in three different real-world cancer detection experiments. AGP outperforms state-of-the-art MIL approaches, including deterministic deep learning ones. It shows a strong performance even on a small dataset with less than 100 labels and generalizes better than competing methods on an external test set. Moreover, we experimentally show that predictive uncertainty correlates with the risk of wrong predictions, and therefore it is a good indicator of reliability in practice. Our code is publicly available. 多实例学习（MIL）是一种弱监督学习范式，它变得越来越流行，因为它比完全监督方法需要更少的标记工作。这对于创建大型带注释数据集仍然具有挑战性的领域（例如医学）尤其有趣。尽管最近的深度学习 MIL 方法已经获得了最先进的结果，但它们是完全确定性的，并且不提供预测的不确定性估计。在这项工作中，我们引入了注意力高斯过程（AGP）模型，这是一种基于高斯过程的深度 MIL 的新颖概率注意力机制。 AGP 提供准确的包级预测以及实例级可解释性，并且可以进行端到端训练。此外，它的概率性质保证了对小数据集的过度拟合和预测的不确定性估计的鲁棒性。后者在医疗应用中尤其重要，因为决策对患者的健康有直接影响。所提出的模型通过实验验证如下。首先，它的行为在两个分别基于著名的 MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 数据集的综合 MIL 实验中进行了说明。然后，在三个不同的现实世界癌症检测实验中对其进行评估。 AGP 的性能优于最先进的 MIL 方法，包括确定性深度学习方法。即使在标签少于 100 个的小型数据集上，它也显示出强大的性能，并且在外部测试集上比竞争方法具有更好的泛化能力。此外，我们通过实验表明，预测不确定性与错误预测的风险相关，因此它是实践中可靠性的良好指标。我们的代码是公开的。 本文提出了一种基于高斯过程的概率注意力机制（AGP），用于深度多实例学习（MIL），以提高预测的可解释性和不确定性估计。 Arne Schmidt,Pablo Morales-Álvarez,Rafael Molina cs.LG,cs.AI

title: A Systematic Evaluation and Benchmark for Embedding-Aware Generative Models: Features, Models, and Any-shot Scenarios
title_zh: 嵌入感知生成模型的系统评估和基准：特征、模型和任意场景场景
abstract: Embedding-aware generative model (EAGM) addresses the data insufficiency problem for zero-shot learning (ZSL) by constructing a generator between semantic and visual feature spaces. Thanks to the predefined benchmark and protocols, the number of proposed EAGMs for ZSL is increasing rapidly. We argue that it is time to take a step back and reconsider the embedding-aware generative paradigm. The main work of this paper is two-fold. First, the embedding features in benchmark datasets are somehow overlooked, which potentially limits the performance of EAGMs, while most researchers focus on how to improve EAGMs. Therefore, we conduct a systematic evaluation of ten representative EAGMs and prove that even embarrassedly simple modifications on the embedding features can improve the performance of EAGMs for ZSL remarkably. So it's time to pay more attention to the current embedding features in benchmark datasets. Second, based on five benchmark datasets, each with six any-shot learning scenarios, we systematically compare the performance of ten typical EAGMs for the first time, and we give a strong baseline for zero-shot learning (ZSL) and few-shot learning (FSL). Meanwhile, a comprehensive generative model repository, namely, generative any-shot learning (GASL) repository, is provided, which contains the models, features, parameters, and scenarios of EAGMs for ZSL and FSL. Any results in this paper can be readily reproduced with only one command line based on GASL.
summary: Embedding-aware generative model (EAGM) addresses the data insufficiency problem for zero-shot learning (ZSL) by constructing a generator between semantic and visual feature spaces. Thanks to the predefined benchmark and protocols, the number of proposed EAGMs for ZSL is increasing rapidly. We argue that it is time to take a step back and reconsider the embedding-aware generative paradigm. The main work of this paper is two-fold. First, the embedding features in benchmark datasets are somehow overlooked, which potentially limits the performance of EAGMs, while most researchers focus on how to improve EAGMs. Therefore, we conduct a systematic evaluation of ten representative EAGMs and prove that even embarrassedly simple modifications on the embedding features can improve the performance of EAGMs for ZSL remarkably. So it's time to pay more attention to the current embedding features in benchmark datasets. Second, based on five benchmark datasets, each with six any-shot learning scenarios, we systematically compare the performance of ten typical EAGMs for the first time, and we give a strong baseline for zero-shot learning (ZSL) and few-shot learning (FSL). Meanwhile, a comprehensive generative model repository, namely, generative any-shot learning (GASL) repository, is provided, which contains the models, features, parameters, and scenarios of EAGMs for ZSL and FSL. Any results in this paper can be readily reproduced with only one command line based on GASL.
abstract_zh: 嵌入感知生成模型（EAGM）通过在语义和视觉特征空间之间构建生成器来解决零样本学习（ZSL）的数据不足问题。由于预定义的基准和协议，为 ZSL 提议的 EAGM 数量正在迅速增加。我们认为，现在是退后一步并重新考虑嵌入感知生成范式的时候了。本文的主要工作有两个方面。首先，基准数据集中的嵌入特征在某种程度上被忽视了，这可能限制了 EAGM 的性能，而大多数研究人员关注的是如何改进 EAGM。因此，我们对十个代表性的 EAGM 进行了系统评估，并证明即使对嵌入特征进行极其简单的修改也可以显着提高 ZSL 的 EAGM 的性能。因此，是时候更加关注基准数据集中当前的嵌入特征了。其次，基于五个基准数据集，每个数据集有六个任意样本学习场景，我们首次系统地比较了十种典型 EAGM 的性能，并为零样本学习（ZSL）和少样本学习（FSL）提供了强有力的基线。同时，提供了一个全面的生成模型存储库，即生成任意镜头学习（GASL）存储库，其中包含ZSL和FSL的EAGM的模型、特征、参数和场景。仅使用一个基于 GASL 的命令行即可轻松重现本文中的任何结果。

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了嵌入感知生成模型（EAGM）在零样本学习（ZSL）和少样本学习（FSL）中的性能，并构建了首个涵盖多种任一样本场景的基准测试框架。
AI.motivation: 现有研究过度关注模型改进而忽视了基准数据集中嵌入特征的潜在影响，且缺乏对EAGM在任一样本场景下的系统性比较。
AI.method: 对10种代表性EAGM进行系统评估，通过简单修改嵌入特征显著提升性能；基于5个基准数据集构建包含6种任一样本场景的GASL基准库，提供模型、特征和参数的完整仓库。
AI.result: 证明嵌入特征优化可大幅提升ZSL/FSL性能，建立首个跨场景的EAGM性能基线，并实现一键复现所有实验结果。
AI.conclusion: 应重新审视基准数据集中嵌入特征的重要性，GASL基准库为后续研究提供了标准化评估框架和可复现的实验环境。

title: Towards Inferential Reproducibility of Machine Learning Research
title_zh: 迈向机器学习研究的推理再现性
abstract: Reliability of machine learning evaluation -- the consistency of observed evaluation scores across replicated model training runs -- is affected by several sources of nondeterminism which can be regarded as measurement noise. Current tendencies to remove noise in order to enforce reproducibility of research results neglect inherent nondeterminism at the implementation level and disregard crucial interaction effects between algorithmic noise factors and data properties. This limits the scope of conclusions that can be drawn from such experiments. Instead of removing noise, we propose to incorporate several sources of variance, including their interaction with data properties, into an analysis of significance and reliability of machine learning evaluation, with the aim to draw inferences beyond particular instances of trained models. We show how to use linear mixed effects models (LMEMs) to analyze performance evaluation scores, and to conduct statistical inference with a generalized likelihood ratio test (GLRT). This allows us to incorporate arbitrary sources of noise like meta-parameter variations into statistical significance testing, and to assess performance differences conditional on data properties. Furthermore, a variance component analysis (VCA) enables the analysis of the contribution of noise sources to overall variance and the computation of a reliability coefficient by the ratio of substantial to total variance.
summary: Reliability of machine learning evaluation -- the consistency of observed evaluation scores across replicated model training runs -- is affected by several sources of nondeterminism which can be regarded as measurement noise. Current tendencies to remove noise in order to enforce reproducibility of research results neglect inherent nondeterminism at the implementation level and disregard crucial interaction effects between algorithmic noise factors and data properties. This limits the scope of conclusions that can be drawn from such experiments. Instead of removing noise, we propose to incorporate several sources of variance, including their interaction with data properties, into an analysis of significance and reliability of machine learning evaluation, with the aim to draw inferences beyond particular instances of trained models. We show how to use linear mixed effects models (LMEMs) to analyze performance evaluation scores, and to conduct statistical inference with a generalized likelihood ratio test (GLRT). This allows us to incorporate arbitrary sources of noise like meta-parameter variations into statistical significance testing, and to assess performance differences conditional on data properties. Furthermore, a variance component analysis (VCA) enables the analysis of the contribution of noise sources to overall variance and the computation of a reliability coefficient by the ratio of substantial to total variance.
abstract_zh: 机器学习评估的可靠性——重复模型训练运行中观察到的评估分数的一致性——受到多种不确定性来源的影响，这些不确定性来源可被视为测量噪声。当前为了增强研究结果的可重复性而消除噪声的趋势忽略了实现层面固有的不确定性，并且忽视了算法噪声因素和数据属性之间的关键相互作用效应。这限制了从此类实验中得出的结论的范围。我们建议将多个方差来源（包括它们与数据属性的相互作用）合并到机器学习评估的重要性和可靠性的分析中，而不是消除噪声，目的是在训练模型的特定实例之外得出推论。我们展示了如何使用线性混合效应模型（LMEM）来分析绩效评估分数，并通过广义似然比检验（GLRT）进行统计推断。这使我们能够将元参数变化等任意噪声源纳入统计显着性测试中，并根据数据属性评估性能差异。此外，方差分量分析（VCA）能够分析噪声源对总体方差的贡献，并通过实质方差与总方差的比率计算可靠性系数。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过考虑机器学习评估中的多种噪声源及其与数据属性的交互作用，提升机器学习研究的推断可重复性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究为消除噪声以确保结果可重复性，但忽视了实现层面的固有随机性及算法噪声与数据属性的交互影响，导致实验结论的适用范围受限。
AI.method: 提出采用线性混合效应模型（LMEMs）结合广义似然比检验（GLRT）分析评估分数，并通过方差成分分析（VCA）量化噪声源对总方差的贡献。
AI.result: 方法能够整合任意噪声源（如超参数变化），并基于数据属性条件评估性能差异，计算可靠性系数以衡量实质性方差占比。
AI.conclusion: 通过纳入噪声源的交互作用，可更准确地进行统计推断，从而提升机器学习实验结论的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

search_text: Towards Inferential Reproducibility of Machine Learning Research 迈向机器学习研究的推理再现性 Reliability of machine learning evaluation -- the consistency of observed evaluation scores across replicated model training runs -- is affected by several sources of nondeterminism which can be regarded as measurement noise. Current tendencies to remove noise in order to enforce reproducibility of research results neglect inherent nondeterminism at the implementation level and disregard crucial interaction effects between algorithmic noise factors and data properties. This limits the scope of conclusions that can be drawn from such experiments. Instead of removing noise, we propose to incorporate several sources of variance, including their interaction with data properties, into an analysis of significance and reliability of machine learning evaluation, with the aim to draw inferences beyond particular instances of trained models. We show how to use linear mixed effects models (LMEMs) to analyze performance evaluation scores, and to conduct statistical inference with a generalized likelihood ratio test (GLRT). This allows us to incorporate arbitrary sources of noise like meta-parameter variations into statistical significance testing, and to assess performance differences conditional on data properties. Furthermore, a variance component analysis (VCA) enables the analysis of the contribution of noise sources to overall variance and the computation of a reliability coefficient by the ratio of substantial to total variance. 机器学习评估的可靠性——重复模型训练运行中观察到的评估分数的一致性——受到多种不确定性来源的影响，这些不确定性来源可被视为测量噪声。当前为了增强研究结果的可重复性而消除噪声的趋势忽略了实现层面固有的不确定性，并且忽视了算法噪声因素和数据属性之间的关键相互作用效应。这限制了从此类实验中得出的结论的范围。我们建议将多个方差来源（包括它们与数据属性的相互作用）合并到机器学习评估的重要性和可靠性的分析中，而不是消除噪声，目的是在训练模型的特定实例之外得出推论。我们展示了如何使用线性混合效应模型（LMEM）来分析绩效评估分数，并通过广义似然比检验（GLRT）进行统计推断。这使我们能够将元参数变化等任意噪声源纳入统计显着性测试中，并根据数据属性评估性能差异。此外，方差分量分析（VCA）能够分析噪声源对总体方差的贡献，并通过实质方差与总方差的比率计算可靠性系数。 本文旨在通过考虑机器学习评估中的多种噪声源及其与数据属性的交互作用，提升机器学习研究的推断可重复性。 Michael Hagmann,Philipp Meier,Stefan Riezler cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,stat.AP,stat.ML

title: Adaptive Massively Parallel Connectivity in Optimal Space
title_zh: 最优空间中的自适应大规模并行连接
comment: ACM Symposium on Parallelism in Algorithms and Architectures (SPAA) 2023
comments: ACM Symposium on Parallelism in Algorithms and Architectures (SPAA) 2023
abstract: We study the problem of finding connected components in the Adaptive Massively Parallel Computation (AMPC) model. We show that when we require the total space to be linear in the size of the input graph the problem can be solved in $O(\log^* n)$ rounds in forests (with high probability) and $2^{O(\log^* n)}$ expected rounds in general graphs. This improves upon an existing $O(\log \log_{m/n} n)$ round algorithm. For the case when the desired number of rounds is constant we show that both problems can be solved using $Θ(m + n \log^{(k)} n)$ total space in expectation (in each round), where $k$ is an arbitrarily large constant and $\log^{(k)}$ is the $k$-th iterate of the $\log_2$ function. This improves upon existing algorithms requiring $Ω(m + n \log n)$ total space.
summary: We study the problem of finding connected components in the Adaptive Massively Parallel Computation (AMPC) model. We show that when we require the total space to be linear in the size of the input graph the problem can be solved in $O(\log^* n)$ rounds in forests (with high probability) and $2^{O(\log^* n)}$ expected rounds in general graphs. This improves upon an existing $O(\log \log_{m/n} n)$ round algorithm. For the case when the desired number of rounds is constant we show that both problems can be solved using $Θ(m + n \log^{(k)} n)$ total space in expectation (in each round), where $k$ is an arbitrarily large constant and $\log^{(k)}$ is the $k$-th iterate of the $\log_2$ function. This improves upon existing algorithms requiring $Ω(m + n \log n)$ total space.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了在自适应大规模并行计算（AMPC）模型中寻找连通分量的问题。我们证明，当我们要求总空间与输入图的大小呈线性关系时，问题可以在森林中的 $O(\log^* n)$ 轮中得到解决（概率很高），在一般图中的 $2^{O(\log^* n)}$ 预期轮中得到解决。这改进了现有的 $O(\log \log_{m/n} n)$ 轮算法。对于所需轮数恒定的情况，我们证明这两个问题都可以使用 $ θ(m + n \log^{(k)} n)$ 期望总空间（每轮）来解决，其中 $k$ 是任意大的常数，$\log^{(k)}$ 是 $\log_2$ 函数的第 $k$ 次迭代。这改进了需要 $Ω(m + n \log n)$ 总空间的现有算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在自适应大规模并行计算（AMPC）模型中，如何以最优空间复杂度高效求解图的连通分量问题。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理大规模图连通性问题时，存在空间复杂度高或轮数复杂度不佳的局限，需设计更优的并行计算方案。
AI.method: 提出基于线性总空间的AMPC算法，结合森林与一般图的不同特性，通过迭代对数函数优化空间分配与计算轮数。
AI.result: 在森林中以$O(\\log^* n)$轮数解决连通性问题，一般图中轮数降至$2^{O(\\log^* n)}$；当轮数为常数时，总空间需求从$Ω(m + n \\log n)$优化为$Θ(m + n \\log^{(k)} n)$。
AI.conclusion: 本文改进了AMPC模型下连通分量问题的时空效率，为大规模图计算提供了更优的并行算法框架。

authors_text: Gustav Grund Pihlgren,Konstantina Nikolaidou,Prakash Chandra Chhipa,Nosheen Abid,Rajkumar Saini,Fredrik Sandin,Marcus Liwicki
title: A Systematic Performance Analysis of Deep Perceptual Loss Networks: Breaking Transfer Learning Conventions
title_zh: 深度感知损失网络的系统性能分析：打破迁移学习惯例
abstract: In recent years, deep perceptual loss has been widely and successfully used to train machine learning models for many computer vision tasks, including image synthesis, segmentation, and autoencoding. Deep perceptual loss is a type of loss function for images that computes the error between two images as the distance between deep features extracted from a neural network. Most applications of the loss use pretrained networks called loss networks for deep feature extraction. However, despite increasingly widespread use, the effects of loss network implementation on the trained models have not been studied. This work rectifies this through a systematic evaluation of the effect of different pretrained loss networks on four different application areas. Specifically, the work evaluates 14 different pretrained architectures with four different feature extraction layers. The evaluation reveals that VGG networks without batch normalization have the best performance and that the choice of feature extraction layer is at least as important as the choice of architecture. The analysis also reveals that deep perceptual loss does not adhere to the transfer learning conventions that better ImageNet accuracy implies better downstream performance and that feature extraction from the later layers provides better performance.
summary: In recent years, deep perceptual loss has been widely and successfully used to train machine learning models for many computer vision tasks, including image synthesis, segmentation, and autoencoding. Deep perceptual loss is a type of loss function for images that computes the error between two images as the distance between deep features extracted from a neural network. Most applications of the loss use pretrained networks called loss networks for deep feature extraction. However, despite increasingly widespread use, the effects of loss network implementation on the trained models have not been studied. This work rectifies this through a systematic evaluation of the effect of different pretrained loss networks on four different application areas. Specifically, the work evaluates 14 different pretrained architectures with four different feature extraction layers. The evaluation reveals that VGG networks without batch normalization have the best performance and that the choice of feature extraction layer is at least as important as the choice of architecture. The analysis also reveals that deep perceptual loss does not adhere to the transfer learning conventions that better ImageNet accuracy implies better downstream performance and that feature extraction from the later layers provides better performance.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度感知损失已被广泛并成功地用于训练许多计算机视觉任务的机器学习模型，包括图像合成、分割和自动编码。深度感知损失是一种图像损失函数，它将两幅图像之间的误差计算为从神经网络提取的深度特征之间的距离。损失的大多数应用都使用称为损失网络的预训练网络来进行深度特征提取。然而，尽管使用日益广泛，但损失网络实施对训练模型的影响尚未得到研究。这项工作通过系统评估不同预训练损失网络对四个不同应用领域的影响来纠正这一问题。具体来说，该工作评估了具有四个不同特征提取层的 14 种不同的预训练架构。评估表明，没有批量归一化的 VGG 网络具有最佳性能，并且特征提取层的选择至少与架构的选择一样重要。分析还表明，深度感知损失不符合迁移学习约定，即更好的 ImageNet 准确性意味着更好的下游性能，并且从后面的层提取特征可以提供更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 系统评估不同预训练损失网络对深度感知损失模型性能的影响
AI.motivation: 尽管深度感知损失广泛应用，但其损失网络实现对模型性能的影响尚未被系统研究
AI.method: 评估14种预训练架构与四个特征提取层组合在四个应用领域的性能
AI.result: VGG无批量归一化网络表现最佳，特征层选择重要性不低于架构选择，传统迁移学习假设被推翻
AI.conclusion: 特征提取层选择需根据任务定制，ImageNet准确率与下游性能无必然关联
