result: VGG无批量归一化网络表现最佳，特征层选择重要性不低于架构选择，传统迁移学习假设被推翻
conclusion: 特征提取层选择需根据任务定制，ImageNet准确率与下游性能无必然关联
search_text: A Systematic Performance Analysis of Deep Perceptual Loss Networks: Breaking Transfer Learning Conventions 深度感知损失网络的系统性能分析：打破迁移学习惯例 In recent years, deep perceptual loss has been widely and successfully used to train machine learning models for many computer vision tasks, including image synthesis, segmentation, and autoencoding. Deep perceptual loss is a type of loss function for images that computes the error between two images as the distance between deep features extracted from a neural network. Most applications of the loss use pretrained networks called loss networks for deep feature extraction. However, despite increasingly widespread use, the effects of loss network implementation on the trained models have not been studied. This work rectifies this through a systematic evaluation of the effect of different pretrained loss networks on four different application areas. Specifically, the work evaluates 14 different pretrained architectures with four different feature extraction layers. The evaluation reveals that VGG networks without batch normalization have the best performance and that the choice of feature extraction layer is at least as important as the choice of architecture. The analysis also reveals that deep perceptual loss does not adhere to the transfer learning conventions that better ImageNet accuracy implies better downstream performance and that feature extraction from the later layers provides better performance. 近年来，深度感知损失已被广泛并成功地用于训练许多计算机视觉任务的机器学习模型，包括图像合成、分割和自动编码。深度感知损失是一种图像损失函数，它将两幅图像之间的误差计算为从神经网络提取的深度特征之间的距离。损失的大多数应用都使用称为损失网络的预训练网络来进行深度特征提取。然而，尽管使用日益广泛，但损失网络实施对训练模型的影响尚未得到研究。这项工作通过系统评估不同预训练损失网络对四个不同应用领域的影响来纠正这一问题。具体来说，该工作评估了具有四个不同特征提取层的 14 种不同的预训练架构。评估表明，没有批量归一化的 VGG 网络具有最佳性能，并且特征提取层的选择至少与架构的选择一样重要。分析还表明，深度感知损失不符合迁移学习约定，即更好的 ImageNet 准确性意味着更好的下游性能，并且从后面的层提取特征可以提供更好的性能。 系统评估不同预训练损失网络对深度感知损失模型性能的影响 Gustav Grund Pihlgren,Konstantina Nikolaidou,Prakash Chandra Chhipa,Nosheen Abid,Rajkumar Saini,Fredrik Sandin,Marcus Liwicki cs.CV,cs.LG

title: FR-LIO: Fast and Robust Lidar-Inertial Odometry by Tightly-Coupled Iterated Kalman Smoother and Robocentric Voxels
title_zh: FR-LIO：通过紧耦合迭代卡尔曼平滑器和机器人中心体素实现快速、鲁棒的激光雷达惯性里程计
abstract: This paper presents a fast lidar-inertial odometry (LIO) that is robust to aggressive motion. To achieve robust tracking in aggressive motion scenes, we exploit the continuous scanning property of lidar to adaptively divide the full scan into multiple partial scans (named sub-frames) according to the motion intensity. And to avoid the degradation of sub-frames resulting from insufficient constraints, we propose a robust state estimation method based on a tightly-coupled iterated error state Kalman smoother (ESKS) framework. Furthermore, we propose a robocentric voxel map (RC-Vox) to improve the system's efficiency. The RC-Vox allows efficient maintenance of map points and k nearest neighbor (k-NN) queries by mapping local map points into a fixed-size, two-layer 3D array structure. Extensive experiments are conducted on 27 sequences from 4 public datasets and our own dataset. The results show that our system can achieve stable tracking in aggressive motion scenes (angular velocity up to 21.8 rad/s) that cannot be handled by other state-of-the-art methods, while our system can achieve competitive performance with these methods in general scenes. Furthermore, thanks to the RC-Vox, our system is much faster than the most efficient LIO system currently published.
summary: This paper presents a fast lidar-inertial odometry (LIO) that is robust to aggressive motion. To achieve robust tracking in aggressive motion scenes, we exploit the continuous scanning property of lidar to adaptively divide the full scan into multiple partial scans (named sub-frames) according to the motion intensity. And to avoid the degradation of sub-frames resulting from insufficient constraints, we propose a robust state estimation method based on a tightly-coupled iterated error state Kalman smoother (ESKS) framework. Furthermore, we propose a robocentric voxel map (RC-Vox) to improve the system's efficiency. The RC-Vox allows efficient maintenance of map points and k nearest neighbor (k-NN) queries by mapping local map points into a fixed-size, two-layer 3D array structure. Extensive experiments are conducted on 27 sequences from 4 public datasets and our own dataset. The results show that our system can achieve stable tracking in aggressive motion scenes (angular velocity up to 21.8 rad/s) that cannot be handled by other state-of-the-art methods, while our system can achieve competitive performance with these methods in general scenes. Furthermore, thanks to the RC-Vox, our system is much faster than the most efficient LIO system currently published.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种对剧烈运动具有鲁棒性的快速激光雷达惯性里程计（LIO）。为了在剧烈的运动场景中实现鲁棒的跟踪，我们利用激光雷达的连续扫描特性，根据运动强度自适应地将全扫描划分为多个部分扫描（称为子帧）。为了避免由于约束不足而导致子帧退化，我们提出了一种基于紧耦合迭代误差状态卡尔曼平滑器（ESKS）框架的鲁棒状态估计方法。此外，我们提出了一种以机器人为中心的体素图（RC-Vox）来提高系统的效率。 RC-Vox 通过将本地地图点映射到固定大小的两层 3D 数组结构中，可以有效维护地图点和 k 最近邻 (k-NN) 查询。对来自 4 个公共数据集和我们自己的数据集的 27 个序列进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，我们的系统可以在其他最先进的方法无法处理的剧烈运动场景（角速度高达 21.8 rad/s）中实现稳定的跟踪，而我们的系统可以在一般场景中实现与这些方法竞争的性能。此外，得益于 RC-Vox，我们的系统比目前发布的最高效的 LIO 系统要快得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种快速且鲁棒的激光雷达惯性里程计（LIO）方法FR-LIO，用于处理剧烈运动场景下的定位问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LIO方法在剧烈运动场景下容易失效，且效率不足，需提升系统在高动态环境中的鲁棒性和计算效率。
AI.method: 通过激光雷达连续扫描特性将完整扫描分割为多个子帧，结合紧耦合迭代误差状态卡尔曼平滑器（ESKS）进行状态估计，并引入基于机器人坐标系的体素地图（RC-Vox）优化地图点维护与近邻查询效率。
AI.result: 在4个公开数据集及自建数据集的27个序列测试中，系统在角速度高达21.8 rad/s的剧烈运动场景下实现稳定跟踪，且效率优于现有最高效LIO方法。
AI.conclusion: FR-LIO通过子帧分割与RC-Vox设计，在保证鲁棒性的同时显著提升计算效率，适用于高动态环境下的实时定位需求。

title: CrossCodeBench: Benchmarking Cross-Task Generalization of Source Code Models
title_zh: CrossCodeBench：源代码模型的跨任务泛化基准测试
abstract: Despite the recent advances showing that a model pre-trained on large-scale source code data is able to gain appreciable generalization capability, it still requires a sizeable amount of data on the target task for fine-tuning. And the effectiveness of the model generalization is largely affected by the size and quality of the fine-tuning data, which is detrimental for target tasks with limited or unavailable resources. Therefore, cross-task generalization, with the goal of improving the generalization of the model to unseen tasks that have not been seen before, is of strong research and application value. In this paper, we propose a large-scale benchmark that includes 216 existing code-related tasks. Then, we annotate each task with the corresponding meta information such as task description and instruction, which contains detailed information about the task and a solution guide. This also helps us to easily create a wide variety of ``training/evaluation'' task splits to evaluate the various cross-task generalization capabilities of the model. Then we perform some preliminary experiments to demonstrate that the cross-task generalization of models can be largely improved by in-context learning methods such as few-shot learning and learning from task instructions, which shows the promising prospects of conducting cross-task learning research on our benchmark. We hope that the collection of the datasets and our benchmark will facilitate future work that is not limited to cross-task generalization.
summary: Despite the recent advances showing that a model pre-trained on large-scale source code data is able to gain appreciable generalization capability, it still requires a sizeable amount of data on the target task for fine-tuning. And the effectiveness of the model generalization is largely affected by the size and quality of the fine-tuning data, which is detrimental for target tasks with limited or unavailable resources. Therefore, cross-task generalization, with the goal of improving the generalization of the model to unseen tasks that have not been seen before, is of strong research and application value. In this paper, we propose a large-scale benchmark that includes 216 existing code-related tasks. Then, we annotate each task with the corresponding meta information such as task description and instruction, which contains detailed information about the task and a solution guide. This also helps us to easily create a wide variety of ``training/evaluation'' task splits to evaluate the various cross-task generalization capabilities of the model. Then we perform some preliminary experiments to demonstrate that the cross-task generalization of models can be largely improved by in-context learning methods such as few-shot learning and learning from task instructions, which shows the promising prospects of conducting cross-task learning research on our benchmark. We hope that the collection of the datasets and our benchmark will facilitate future work that is not limited to cross-task generalization.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近的进展表明，在大规模源代码数据上预训练的模型能够获得可观的泛化能力，但它仍然需要目标任务的大量数据进行微调。并且模型泛化的有效性很大程度上受到微调数据的大小和质量的影响，这对于资源有限或不可用的目标任务是不利的。因此，跨任务泛化，以提高模型对以前未见过的任务的泛化能力为目标，具有很强的研究和应用价值。在本文中，我们提出了一个大规模基准测试，其中包括 216 个现有的代码相关任务。然后，我们用相应的元信息（例如任务描述和说明）来注释每个任务，其中包含有关任务的详细信息和解决方案指南。这也有助于我们轻松创建各种“训练/评估”任务分割，以评估模型的各种跨任务泛化能力。然后我们进行了一些初步实验，证明模型的跨任务泛化能力可以通过上下文学习方法（例如少样本学习和从任务指令学习）来大大提高，这表明在我们的基准上进行跨任务学习研究的前景良好。我们希望数据集和基准的收集将有助于未来的工作，而不仅仅是跨任务泛化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CrossCodeBench基准，用于评估源代码模型在未见过的任务上的跨任务泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模型微调依赖大量目标任务数据，而资源有限的任务难以有效利用，需提升模型对新任务的泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建包含216个代码任务的基准，标注任务元信息并生成多种训练/评估分割，通过少样本学习和任务指令学习进行初步验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，上下文学习方法显著提升模型跨任务泛化能力，验证了基准的有效性和研究潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该基准和数据集将推动跨任务泛化及代码模型相关研究的进一步发展。

This also helps us to easily create a wide variety of ``training/evaluation'' task splits to evaluate the various cross-task generalization capabilities of the model. Then we perform some preliminary experiments to demonstrate that the cross-task generalization of models can be largely improved by in-context learning methods such as few-shot learning and learning from task instructions, which shows the promising prospects of conducting cross-task learning research on our benchmark. We hope that the collection of the datasets and our benchmark will facilitate future work that is not limited to cross-task generalization. 尽管最近的进展表明，在大规模源代码数据上预训练的模型能够获得可观的泛化能力，但它仍然需要目标任务的大量数据进行微调。并且模型泛化的有效性很大程度上受到微调数据的大小和质量的影响，这对于资源有限或不可用的目标任务是不利的。因此，跨任务泛化，以提高模型对以前未见过的任务的泛化能力为目标，具有很强的研究和应用价值。在本文中，我们提出了一个大规模基准测试，其中包括 216 个现有的代码相关任务。然后，我们用相应的元信息（例如任务描述和说明）来注释每个任务，其中包含有关任务的详细信息和解决方案指南。这也有助于我们轻松创建各种“训练/评估”任务分割，以评估模型的各种跨任务泛化能力。然后我们进行了一些初步实验，证明模型的跨任务泛化能力可以通过上下文学习方法（例如少样本学习和从任务指令学习）来大大提高，这表明在我们的基准上进行跨任务学习研究的前景良好。我们希望数据集和基准的收集将有助于未来的工作，而不仅仅是跨任务泛化。 本文提出CrossCodeBench基准，用于评估源代码模型在未见过的任务上的跨任务泛化能力。 Changan Niu,Chuanyi Li,Vincent Ng,Bin Luo cs.SE,cs.AI

authors_text: Yejin Bang,Samuel Cahyawijaya,Nayeon Lee,Wenliang Dai,Dan Su,Bryan Wilie,Holy Lovenia,Ziwei Ji,Tiezheng Yu,Willy Chung,Quyet V. Do,Yan Xu,Pascale Fung
title: A Multitask, Multilingual, Multimodal Evaluation of ChatGPT on Reasoning, Hallucination, and Interactivity
title_zh: ChatGPT 推理、幻觉和交互性的多任务、多语言、多模态评估
abstract: This paper proposes a framework for quantitatively evaluating interactive LLMs such as ChatGPT using publicly available data sets. We carry out an extensive technical evaluation of ChatGPT using 23 data sets covering 8 different common NLP application tasks. We evaluate the multitask, multilingual and multi-modal aspects of ChatGPT based on these data sets and a newly designed multimodal dataset. We find that ChatGPT outperforms LLMs with zero-shot learning on most tasks and even outperforms fine-tuned models on some tasks. We find that it is better at understanding non-Latin script languages than generating them. It is able to generate multimodal content from textual prompts, via an intermediate code generation step. Moreover, we find that ChatGPT is 63.41% accurate on average in 10 different reasoning categories under logical reasoning, non-textual reasoning, and commonsense reasoning, hence making it an unreliable reasoner. It is, for example, better at deductive than inductive reasoning. ChatGPT suffers from hallucination problems like other LLMs and it generates more extrinsic hallucinations from its parametric memory as it does not have access to an external knowledge base. Finally, the interactive feature of ChatGPT enables human collaboration with the underlying LLM to improve its performance, i.e, 8% ROUGE-1 on summarization and 2% ChrF++ on machine translation, in a multi-turn "prompt engineering" fashion. We also release codebase for evaluation set extraction.
summary: This paper proposes a framework for quantitatively evaluating interactive LLMs such as ChatGPT using publicly available data sets. We carry out an extensive technical evaluation of ChatGPT using 23 data sets covering 8 different common NLP application tasks. We evaluate the multitask, multilingual and multi-modal aspects of ChatGPT based on these data sets and a newly designed multimodal dataset. We find that ChatGPT outperforms LLMs with zero-shot learning on most tasks and even outperforms fine-tuned models on some tasks. We find that it is better at understanding non-Latin script languages than generating them. It is able to generate multimodal content from textual prompts, via an intermediate code generation step. Moreover, we find that ChatGPT is 63.41% accurate on average in 10 different reasoning categories under logical reasoning, non-textual reasoning, and commonsense reasoning, hence making it an unreliable reasoner. It is, for example, better at deductive than inductive reasoning. ChatGPT suffers from hallucination problems like other LLMs and it generates more extrinsic hallucinations from its parametric memory as it does not have access to an external knowledge base. Finally, the interactive feature of ChatGPT enables human collaboration with the underlying LLM to improve its performance, i.e, 8% ROUGE-1 on summarization and 2% ChrF++ on machine translation, in a multi-turn "prompt engineering" fashion. We also release codebase for evaluation set extraction.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个使用公开数据集定量评估交互式法学硕士（例如 ChatGPT）的框架。我们使用涵盖 8 种不同常见 NLP 应用任务的 23 个数据集对 ChatGPT 进行了广泛的技术评估。我们根据这些数据集和新设计的多模态数据集评估 ChatGPT 的多任务、多语言和多模态方面。我们发现 ChatGPT 在大多数任务上都优于零样本学习的法学硕士，甚至在某些任务上优于微调模型。我们发现它比生成非拉丁脚本语言更能理解它们。它能够通过中间代码生成步骤从文本提示生成多模式内容。此外，我们发现ChatGPT在逻辑推理、非文本推理和常识推理下的10个不同推理类别中平均准确率为63.41%，因此使其成为不可靠的推理器。例如，它比归纳推理更擅长演绎推理。 ChatGPT 与其他法学硕士一样存在幻觉问题，并且由于无法访问外部知识库，它会从其参数内存中产生更多外在幻觉。最后，ChatGPT 的交互功能使人类能够与底层 LLM 协作，以多轮“即时工程”方式提高其性能，即摘要上的 ROUGE-1 为 8%，机器翻译上的 ChrF++ 为 2%。我们还发布了用于评估集提取的代码库。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一个框架，用于使用公开数据集量化评估交互式大语言模型（如ChatGPT）在推理、幻觉和交互性方面的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对交互式大语言模型在多任务、多语言和多模态场景下的系统性评估，需通过量化方法全面分析其能力与局限。
AI.method: 基于23个涵盖8类NLP任务的数据集及新设计的多模态数据集，从多任务、多语言、多模态角度评估ChatGPT，并分析其推理准确性、幻觉问题及交互性提升效果。
AI.result: ChatGPT在多数任务上优于零样本模型，甚至超越部分微调模型；在非拉丁语系理解上表现较好，但生成能力较弱；推理准确率为63.41%，存在显著幻觉问题；交互功能通过多轮提示工程提升性能（如摘要ROUGE-1+8%、翻译ChrF+++2%）。
AI.conclusion: ChatGPT在多任务和交互性方面表现突出，但推理可靠性不足且存在幻觉风险，需进一步优化模型的推理能力与知识存储机制。

title: A Survey on Event Prediction Methods from a Systems Perspective: Bringing Together Disparate Research Areas
title_zh: 从系统角度对事件预测方法进行的调查：汇集不同的研究领域
abstract: Event prediction is the ability of anticipating future events, i.e., future real-world occurrences, and aims to support the user in deciding on actions that change future events towards a desired state. An event prediction method learns the relation between features of past events and future events. It is applied to newly observed events to predict corresponding future events that are evaluated with respect to the user's desired future state. If the predicted future events do not comply with this state, actions are taken towards achieving desirable future states. Evidently, event prediction is valuable in many application domains such as business and natural disasters. The diversity of application domains results in a diverse range of methods that are scattered across various research areas which, in turn, use different terminology for event prediction methods. Consequently, sharing methods and knowledge for developing future event prediction methods is restricted. To facilitate knowledge sharing on account of a comprehensive integration and assessment of event prediction methods, we take a systems perspective to integrate event prediction methods into a single system, elicit requirements, and assess existing work with respect to the requirements. Based on the assessment, we identify open challenges and discuss future research directions.
summary: Event prediction is the ability of anticipating future events, i.e., future real-world occurrences, and aims to support the user in deciding on actions that change future events towards a desired state. An event prediction method learns the relation between features of past events and future events. It is applied to newly observed events to predict corresponding future events that are evaluated with respect to the user's desired future state. If the predicted future events do not comply with this state, actions are taken towards achieving desirable future states. Evidently, event prediction is valuable in many application domains such as business and natural disasters. The diversity of application domains results in a diverse range of methods that are scattered across various research areas which, in turn, use different terminology for event prediction methods. Consequently, sharing methods and knowledge for developing future event prediction methods is restricted. To facilitate knowledge sharing on account of a comprehensive integration and assessment of event prediction methods, we take a systems perspective to integrate event prediction methods into a single system, elicit requirements, and assess existing work with respect to the requirements. Based on the assessment, we identify open challenges and discuss future research directions.
abstract_zh: 事件预测是预测未来事件（即未来现实世界发生的事件）的能力，旨在支持用户决定将未来事件改变为期望状态的操作。事件预测方法学习过去事件和未来事件的特征之间的关系。它应用于新观察到的事件来预测相应的未来事件，这些事件是根据用户期望的未来状态进行评估的。如果预测的未来事件不符合该状态，则采取行动以实现理想的未来状态。显然，事件预测在商业和自然灾害等许多应用领域都很有价值。应用领域的多样性导致了分散在各个研究领域的各种方法，而这些研究领域又使用不同的术语来进行事件预测方法。因此，用于开发未来事件预测方法的共享方法和知识受到限制。为了促进事件预测方法的全面集成和评估的知识共享，我们从系统的角度将事件预测方法集成到单个系统中，引出需求，并根据需求评估现有工作。根据评估，我们确定开放的挑战并讨论未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文从系统视角综述事件预测方法，整合不同研究领域的技术以促进知识共享。
AI.motivation: 事件预测方法因应用领域多样导致术语和方法分散，限制了跨领域知识共享与方法复用。
AI.method: 通过系统化视角构建统一框架，提取需求并评估现有方法，分析其与需求的匹配度。
AI.result: 识别出现有方法的不足与开放性挑战，提出未来研究方向如动态环境适应性与跨领域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 整合事件预测方法需统一评价标准，未来应聚焦于可解释性、实时性及多模态数据融合等方向。

authors_text: Buddhika Laknath Semage,Thommen George Karimpanal,Santu Rana,Svetha Venkatesh
title: Zero-shot Sim2Real Adaptation Across Environments
title_zh: 跨环境的零样本 Sim2Real 适应
abstract: Simulation based learning often provides a cost-efficient recourse to reinforcement learning applications in robotics. However, simulators are generally incapable of accurately replicating real-world dynamics, and thus bridging the sim2real gap is an important problem in simulation based learning. Current solutions to bridge the sim2real gap involve hybrid simulators that are augmented with neural residual models. Unfortunately, they require a separate residual model for each individual environment configuration (i.e., a fixed setting of environment variables such as mass, friction etc.), and thus are not transferable to new environments quickly. To address this issue, we propose a Reverse Action Transformation (RAT) policy which learns to imitate simulated policies in the real-world. Once learnt from a single environment, RAT can then be deployed on top of a Universal Policy Network to achieve zero-shot adaptation to new environments. We empirically evaluate our approach in a set of continuous control tasks and observe its advantage as a few-shot and zero-shot learner over competing baselines.

Unfortunately, they require a separate residual model for each individual environment configuration (i.e., a fixed setting of environment variables such as mass, friction etc.), and thus are not transferable to new environments quickly. To address this issue, we propose a Reverse Action Transformation (RAT) policy which learns to imitate simulated policies in the real-world. Once learnt from a single environment, RAT can then be deployed on top of a Universal Policy Network to achieve zero-shot adaptation to new environments. We empirically evaluate our approach in a set of continuous control tasks and observe its advantage as a few-shot and zero-shot learner over competing baselines.
abstract_zh: 基于模拟的学习通常为机器人技术中的强化学习应用提供经济高效的资源。然而，模拟器通常无法准确地复制现实世界的动态，因此弥合 sim2real 差距是基于模拟的学习中的一个重要问题。当前弥合 sim2real 差距的解决方案涉及使用神经残差模型增强的混合模拟器。不幸的是，它们需要针对每个单独的环境配置（即质量、摩擦力等环境变量的固定设置）使用单独的残差模型，因此无法快速转移到新环境。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种反向动作转换（RAT）策略，它可以学习模仿现实世界中的模拟策略。一旦从单一环境中学习，RAT 就可以部署在通用策略网络之上，以实现对新环境的零样本适应。我们在一组连续控制任务中凭经验评估我们的方法，并观察其作为少数样本和零样本学习器相对于竞争基线的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种零样本模拟到现实环境适应方法，解决传统方法需为每个环境配置单独残差模型的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有sim2real方法依赖环境特定的残差模型，难以快速迁移至新环境，阻碍了模拟学习在现实场景中的应用。
AI.method: 提出Reverse Action Transformation (RAT)策略，通过模仿模拟策略在真实世界中学习，并结合通用策略网络实现跨环境零样本适应。
AI.result: 在连续控制任务实验中，RAT在零样本和少样本场景下均优于现有基线方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: RAT方法无需环境特定残差模型，通过通用策略网络实现快速跨环境适应，为sim2real问题提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Hossein Hajipour,Keno Hassler,Thorsten Holz,Lea Schönherr,Mario Fritz
title: CodeLMSec Benchmark: Systematically Evaluating and Finding Security Vulnerabilities in Black-Box Code Language Models
title_zh: CodeLMSec 基准：系统评估和查找黑盒代码语言模型中的安全漏洞
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) for automatic code generation have achieved breakthroughs in several programming tasks. Their advances in competition-level programming problems have made them an essential pillar of AI-assisted pair programming, and tools such as GitHub Copilot have emerged as part of the daily programming workflow used by millions of developers. The training data for these models is usually collected from the Internet (e.g., from open-source repositories) and is likely to contain faults and security vulnerabilities. This unsanitized training data can cause the language models to learn these vulnerabilities and propagate them during the code generation procedure. While these models have been extensively assessed for their ability to produce functionally correct programs, there remains a lack of comprehensive investigations and benchmarks addressing the security aspects of these models. In this work, we propose a method to systematically study the security issues of code language models to assess their susceptibility to generating vulnerable code. To this end, we introduce the first approach to automatically find generated code that contains vulnerabilities in black-box code generation models. To achieve this, we present an approach to approximate inversion of the black-box code generation models based on few-shot prompting. We evaluate the effectiveness of our approach by examining code language models in generating high-risk security weaknesses. Furthermore, we establish a collection of diverse non-secure prompts for various vulnerability scenarios using our method. This dataset forms a benchmark for evaluating and comparing the security weaknesses in code language models.

This unsanitized training data can cause the language models to learn these vulnerabilities and propagate them during the code generation procedure. While these models have been extensively assessed for their ability to produce functionally correct programs, there remains a lack of comprehensive investigations and benchmarks addressing the security aspects of these models. In this work, we propose a method to systematically study the security issues of code language models to assess their susceptibility to generating vulnerable code. To this end, we introduce the first approach to automatically find generated code that contains vulnerabilities in black-box code generation models. To achieve this, we present an approach to approximate inversion of the black-box code generation models based on few-shot prompting. We evaluate the effectiveness of our approach by examining code language models in generating high-risk security weaknesses. Furthermore, we establish a collection of diverse non-secure prompts for various vulnerability scenarios using our method. This dataset forms a benchmark for evaluating and comparing the security weaknesses in code language models.
abstract_zh: 用于自动代码生成的大型语言模型（LLM）在多项编程任务中取得了突破。它们在竞赛级编程问题上的进步使它们成为人工智能辅助结对编程的重要支柱，而 GitHub Copilot 等工具已成为数百万开发人员使用的日常编程工作流程的一部分。这些模型的训练数据通常是从互联网（例如，从开源存储库）收集的，并且可能包含故障和安全漏洞。这种未经处理的训练数据可能会导致语言模型学习这些漏洞并在代码生成过程中传播它们。虽然这些模型生成功能正确的程序的能力已被广泛评估，但仍然缺乏解决这些模型安全方面的全面调查和基准。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种系统地研究代码语言模型的安全问题的方法，以评估它们生成易受攻击代码的敏感性。为此，我们引入第一种方法来自动查找黑盒​​代码生成模型中包含漏洞的生成代码。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种基于少样本提示的黑盒代码生成模型的近似反转方法。我们通过检查代码语言模型在生成高风险安全漏洞方面的有效性来评估我们的方法的有效性。此外，我们使用我们的方法为各种漏洞场景建立了一系列不同的非安全提示。该数据集形成了评估和比较代码语言模型中的安全弱点的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CodeLMSec基准，系统评估黑盒代码语言模型的安全漏洞生成能力。
AI.motivation: 现有代码生成模型评估侧重功能正确性，缺乏针对安全漏洞的系统性研究，而训练数据中的漏洞可能被模型传播。
AI.method: 基于少样本提示的黑盒模型逆向逼近方法，构建包含多种漏洞场景的非安全提示数据集。
AI.result: 验证了主流代码语言模型生成高风险漏洞的倾向性，建立了首个代码模型安全评估基准。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效识别模型安全缺陷，为后续安全评估研究提供标准化基准数据集。

authors_text: Jun Cen,Di Luan,Shiwei Zhang,Yixuan Pei,Yingya Zhang,Deli Zhao,Shaojie Shen,Qifeng Chen
title: The Devil is in the Wrongly-classified Samples: Towards Unified Open-set Recognition
title_zh: 问题在于错误分类的样本：迈向统一的开放集识别
abstract: Open-set Recognition (OSR) aims to identify test samples whose classes are not seen during the training process. Recently, Unified Open-set Recognition (UOSR) has been proposed to reject not only unknown samples but also known but wrongly classified samples, which tends to be more practical in real-world applications. The UOSR draws little attention since it is proposed, but we find sometimes it is even more practical than OSR in the real world applications, as evaluation results of known but wrongly classified samples are also wrong like unknown samples. In this paper, we deeply analyze the UOSR task under different training and evaluation settings to shed light on this promising research direction. For this purpose, we first evaluate the UOSR performance of several OSR methods and show a significant finding that the UOSR performance consistently surpasses the OSR performance by a large margin for the same method. We show that the reason lies in the known but wrongly classified samples, as their uncertainty distribution is extremely close to unknown samples rather than known and correctly classified samples. Second, we analyze how the two training settings of OSR (i.e., pre-training and outlier exposure) influence the UOSR. We find although they are both beneficial for distinguishing known and correctly classified samples from unknown samples, pre-training is also helpful for identifying known but wrongly classified samples while outlier exposure is not. In addition to different training settings, we also formulate a new evaluation setting for UOSR which is called few-shot UOSR, where only one or five samples per unknown class are available during evaluation to help identify unknown samples. We propose FS-KNNS for the few-shot UOSR to achieve state-of-the-art performance under all settings.
summary: Open-set Recognition (OSR) aims to identify test samples whose classes are not seen during the training process. Recently, Unified Open-set Recognition (UOSR) has been proposed to reject not only unknown samples but also known but wrongly classified samples, which tends to be more practical in real-world applications. The UOSR draws little attention since it is proposed, but we find sometimes it is even more practical than OSR in the real world applications, as evaluation results of known but wrongly classified samples are also wrong like unknown samples. In this paper, we deeply analyze the UOSR task under different training and evaluation settings to shed light on this promising research direction. For this purpose, we first evaluate the UOSR performance of several OSR methods and show a significant finding that the UOSR performance consistently surpasses the OSR performance by a large margin for the same method. We show that the reason lies in the known but wrongly classified samples, as their uncertainty distribution is extremely close to unknown samples rather than known and correctly classified samples. Second, we analyze how the two training settings of OSR (i.e., pre-training and outlier exposure) influence the UOSR. We find although they are both beneficial for distinguishing known and correctly classified samples from unknown samples, pre-training is also helpful for identifying known but wrongly classified samples while outlier exposure is not. In addition to different training settings, we also formulate a new evaluation setting for UOSR which is called few-shot UOSR, where only one or five samples per unknown class are available during evaluation to help identify unknown samples. We propose FS-KNNS for the few-shot UOSR to achieve state-of-the-art performance under all settings.
abstract_zh: 开放集识别（OSR）旨在识别在训练过程中未看到类别的测试样本。最近，统一开放集识别（UOSR）被提出，不仅可以拒绝未知样本，还可以拒绝已知但错误分类的样本，这在实际应用中往往更实用。 UOSR 自从提出以来就很少受到关注，但我们发现有时它在现实世界的应用中比 OSR 更实用，因为已知但错误分类的样本的评估结果也像未知样本一样是错误的。在本文中，我们深入分析了不同训练和评估设置下的 UOSR 任务，以阐明这一有前途的研究方向。为此，我们首先评估了几种 OSR 方法的 UOSR 性能，并显示了一个重要发现，即 UOSR 性能始终大幅超过同一方法的 OSR 性能。我们表明，原因在于已知但错误分类的样本，因为它们的不确定性分布非常接近未知样本，而不是已知且正确分类的样本。其次，我们分析 OSR 的两种训练设置（即预训练和异常值暴露）如何影响 UOSR。我们发现，虽然它们都有利于区分已知且正确分类的样本与未知样本，但预训练也有助于识别已知但错误分类的样本，而异常值暴露则不然。除了不同的训练设置之外，我们还为UOSR制定了一种新的评估设置，称为few-shot UOSR，其中在评估过程中每个未知类只有一个或五个样本可用，以帮助识别未知样本。我们为小样本 UOSR 提出 FS-KNNS，以在所有设置下实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究统一开放集识别（UOSR）任务，分析其在不同训练和评估设置下的性能，并提出新的评估方法和算法以提升实际应用效果。
AI.motivation: 传统开放集识别（OSR）仅关注未知样本，而实际应用中已知但错误分类的样本同样需要被拒绝。然而，UOSR研究不足，且其有效性尚未充分验证。
AI.method: 评估多种OSR方法的UOSR性能，分析预训练与异常暴露两种训练设置对UOSR的影响，并提出few-shot UOSR评估设置及对应算法FS-KNNS。
AI.result: UOSR性能显著优于OSR；预训练有助于识别错误分类样本，而异常暴露无此效果；FS-KNNS在所有设置下均达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: UOSR比OSR更具实际价值，需进一步研究其训练与评估方法，未来应关注错误分类样本的不确定性分布特性。

search_text: The Devil is in the Wrongly-classified Samples: Towards Unified Open-set Recognition 问题在于错误分类的样本：迈向统一的开放集识别 Open-set Recognition (OSR) aims to identify test samples whose classes are not seen during the training process. Recently, Unified Open-set Recognition (UOSR) has been proposed to reject not only unknown samples but also known but wrongly classified samples, which tends to be more practical in real-world applications. The UOSR draws little attention since it is proposed, but we find sometimes it is even more practical than OSR in the real world applications, as evaluation results of known but wrongly classified samples are also wrong like unknown samples. In this paper, we deeply analyze the UOSR task under different training and evaluation settings to shed light on this promising research direction. For this purpose, we first evaluate the UOSR performance of several OSR methods and show a significant finding that the UOSR performance consistently surpasses the OSR performance by a large margin for the same method. We show that the reason lies in the known but wrongly classified samples, as their uncertainty distribution is extremely close to unknown samples rather than known and correctly classified samples. Second, we analyze how the two training settings of OSR (i.e., pre-training and outlier exposure) influence the UOSR. We find although they are both beneficial for distinguishing known and correctly classified samples from unknown samples, pre-training is also helpful for identifying known but wrongly classified samples while outlier exposure is not. In addition to different training settings, we also formulate a new evaluation setting for UOSR which is called few-shot UOSR, where only one or five samples per unknown class are available during evaluation to help identify unknown samples. We propose FS-KNNS for the few-shot UOSR to achieve state-of-the-art performance under all settings. 开放集识别（OSR）旨在识别在训练过程中未看到类别的测试样本。最近，统一开放集识别（UOSR）被提出，不仅可以拒绝未知样本，还可以拒绝已知但错误分类的样本，这在实际应用中往往更实用。 UOSR 自从提出以来就很少受到关注，但我们发现有时它在现实世界的应用中比 OSR 更实用，因为已知但错误分类的样本的评估结果也像未知样本一样是错误的。在本文中，我们深入分析了不同训练和评估设置下的 UOSR 任务，以阐明这一有前途的研究方向。为此，我们首先评估了几种 OSR 方法的 UOSR 性能，并显示了一个重要发现，即 UOSR 性能始终大幅超过同一方法的 OSR 性能。我们表明，原因在于已知但错误分类的样本，因为它们的不确定性分布非常接近未知样本，而不是已知且正确分类的样本。其次，我们分析 OSR 的两种训练设置（即预训练和异常值暴露）如何影响 UOSR。我们发现，虽然它们都有利于区分已知且正确分类的样本与未知样本，但预训练也有助于识别已知但错误分类的样本，而异常值暴露则不然。除了不同的训练设置之外，我们还为UOSR制定了一种新的评估设置，称为few-shot UOSR，其中在评估过程中每个未知类只有一个或五个样本可用，以帮助识别未知样本。我们为小样本 UOSR 提出 FS-KNNS，以在所有设置下实现最先进的性能。 本文研究统一开放集识别（UOSR）任务，分析其在不同训练和评估设置下的性能，并提出新的评估方法和算法以提升实际应用效果。 Jun Cen,Di Luan,Shiwei Zhang,Yixuan Pei,Yingya Zhang,Deli Zhao,Shaojie Shen,Qifeng Chen cs.CV

title: Leveraging Summary Guidance on Medical Report Summarization
title_zh: 利用医疗报告摘要的摘要指南
abstract: This study presents three deidentified large medical text datasets, named DISCHARGE, ECHO and RADIOLOGY, which contain 50K, 16K and 378K pairs of report and summary that are derived from MIMIC-III, respectively. We implement convincing baselines of automated abstractive summarization on the proposed datasets with pre-trained encoder-decoder language models, including BERT2BERT, T5-large and BART. Further, based on the BART model, we leverage the sampled summaries from the train set as prior knowledge guidance, for encoding additional contextual representations of the guidance with the encoder and enhancing the decoding representations in the decoder. The experimental results confirm the improvement of ROUGE scores and BERTScore made by the proposed method, outperforming the larger model T5-large.
summary: This study presents three deidentified large medical text datasets, named DISCHARGE, ECHO and RADIOLOGY, which contain 50K, 16K and 378K pairs of report and summary that are derived from MIMIC-III, respectively. We implement convincing baselines of automated abstractive summarization on the proposed datasets with pre-trained encoder-decoder language models, including BERT2BERT, T5-large and BART. Further, based on the BART model, we leverage the sampled summaries from the train set as prior knowledge guidance, for encoding additional contextual representations of the guidance with the encoder and enhancing the decoding representations in the decoder. The experimental results confirm the improvement of ROUGE scores and BERTScore made by the proposed method, outperforming the larger model T5-large.
abstract_zh: 本研究提出了三个去识别的大型医学文本数据集，分别名为 DISCHARGE、ECHO 和 RADIOLOGY，其中​​分别包含源自 MIMIC-III 的 50K、16K 和 378K 对报告和摘要。我们使用预训练的编码器-解码器语言模型（包括 BERT2BERT、T5-large 和 BART）在所提出的数据集上实现了令人信服的自动抽象摘要基线。此外，基于 BART 模型，我们利用训练集中的采样摘要作为先验知识指导，用于使用编码器对指导的附加上下文表示进行编码，并增强解码器中的解码表示。实验结果证实了所提出的方法在ROUGE分数和BERTScore上的改进，优于更大的模型T5-large。

AI.tldr: 本研究提出利用摘要指导改进医疗报告的自动摘要生成方法，并构建了三个大型医疗文本数据集进行实验验证。
AI.motivation: 医疗报告摘要生成需要准确捕捉专业信息，而现有模型在复杂医学文本上的表现仍有不足，需探索更有效的上下文引导方法。
AI.method: 构建DISCHARGE、ECHO和RADIOLOGY数据集，基于BART模型引入训练集摘要作为先验知识，通过编码器增强上下文表示并优化解码器生成过程。
AI.result: 提出的方法在ROUGE和BERTScore指标上优于T5-large等基线模型，验证了摘要指导的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 利用摘要作为先验知识可显著提升医疗文本摘要质量，为医学自然语言处理提供新思路。

authors_text: Yuan Cao,Xudong Zhang,Fan Zhang,Feifei Kou,Josiah Poon,Xiongnan Jin,Yongheng Wang,Jinpeng Chen
title: SimCGNN: Simple Contrastive Graph Neural Network for Session-based Recommendation
title_zh: SimCGNN：用于基于会话的推荐的简单对比图神经网络
abstract: Session-based recommendation (SBR) problem, which focuses on next-item prediction for anonymous users, has received increasingly more attention from researchers. Existing graph-based SBR methods all lack the ability to differentiate between sessions with the same last item, and suffer from severe popularity bias. Inspired by nowadays emerging contrastive learning methods, this paper presents a Simple Contrastive Graph Neural Network for Session-based Recommendation (SimCGNN). In SimCGNN, we first obtain normalized session embeddings on constructed session graphs. We next construct positive and negative samples of the sessions by two forward propagation and a novel negative sample selection strategy, and then calculate the constructive loss. Finally, session embeddings are used to give prediction. Extensive experiments conducted on two real-word datasets show our SimCGNN achieves a significant improvement over state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Session-based recommendation (SBR) problem, which focuses on next-item prediction for anonymous users, has received increasingly more attention from researchers. Existing graph-based SBR methods all lack the ability to differentiate between sessions with the same last item, and suffer from severe popularity bias. Inspired by nowadays emerging contrastive learning methods, this paper presents a Simple Contrastive Graph Neural Network for Session-based Recommendation (SimCGNN). In SimCGNN, we first obtain normalized session embeddings on constructed session graphs. We next construct positive and negative samples of the sessions by two forward propagation and a novel negative sample selection strategy, and then calculate the constructive loss. Finally, session embeddings are used to give prediction. Extensive experiments conducted on two real-word datasets show our SimCGNN achieves a significant improvement over state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 基于会话的推荐（SBR）问题专注于匿名用户的下一项预测，越来越受到研究人员的关注。现有的基于图的 SBR 方法都缺乏区分具有相同最后一项的会话的能力，并且存在严重的流行度偏差。受当今新兴的对比学习方法的启发，本文提出了一种用于基于会话的推荐的简单对比图神经网络（SimCGNN）。在 SimCGNN 中，我们首先在构建的会话图上获得标准化会话嵌入。接下来，我们通过两个前向传播和新颖的负样本选择策略构建会话的正样本和负样本，然后计算建设性损失。最后，会话嵌入用于给出预测。对两个真实数据集进行的大量实验表明，我们的 SimCGNN 比最先进的方法取得了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 提出SimCGNN模型以改进基于会话的推荐系统，解决现有方法在区分相同最后物品会话和流行度偏差的问题
AI.motivation: 现有基于图的会话推荐方法无法区分相同最后一个物品的会话，且存在严重流行度偏差，需通过对比学习提升区分能力
AI.method: 构建会话图获取归一化嵌入，采用双向传播和负样本选择策略生成正负样本，通过对比损失优化嵌入表示
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上显著优于现有先进方法
AI.conclusion: SimCGNN有效解决了会话推荐中的区分度与流行度偏差问题，具有实际应用价值

search_text: SimCGNN: Simple Contrastive Graph Neural Network for Session-based Recommendation SimCGNN：用于基于会话的推荐的简单对比图神经网络 Session-based recommendation (SBR) problem, which focuses on next-item prediction for anonymous users, has received increasingly more attention from researchers. Existing graph-based SBR methods all lack the ability to differentiate between sessions with the same last item, and suffer from severe popularity bias. Inspired by nowadays emerging contrastive learning methods, this paper presents a Simple Contrastive Graph Neural Network for Session-based Recommendation (SimCGNN). In SimCGNN, we first obtain normalized session embeddings on constructed session graphs. We next construct positive and negative samples of the sessions by two forward propagation and a novel negative sample selection strategy, and then calculate the constructive loss. Finally, session embeddings are used to give prediction. Extensive experiments conducted on two real-word datasets show our SimCGNN achieves a significant improvement over state-of-the-art methods. 基于会话的推荐（SBR）问题专注于匿名用户的下一项预测，越来越受到研究人员的关注。现有的基于图的 SBR 方法都缺乏区分具有相同最后一项的会话的能力，并且存在严重的流行度偏差。受当今新兴的对比学习方法的启发，本文提出了一种用于基于会话的推荐的简单对比图神经网络（SimCGNN）。在 SimCGNN 中，我们首先在构建的会话图上获得标准化会话嵌入。接下来，我们通过两个前向传播和新颖的负样本选择策略构建会话的正样本和负样本，然后计算建设性损失。最后，会话嵌入用于给出预测。对两个真实数据集进行的大量实验表明，我们的 SimCGNN 比最先进的方法取得了显着改进。 提出SimCGNN模型以改进基于会话的推荐系统，解决现有方法在区分相同最后物品会话和流行度偏差的问题 Yuan Cao,Xudong Zhang,Fan Zhang,Feifei Kou,Josiah Poon,Xiongnan Jin,Yongheng Wang,Jinpeng Chen cs.IR,cs.AI

title: Fully-Dynamic Approximate Decision Trees With Worst-Case Update Time Guarantees
title_zh: 具有最坏情况更新时间保证的全动态近似决策树
abstract: We give the first algorithm that maintains an approximate decision tree over an arbitrary sequence of insertions and deletions of labeled examples, with strong guarantees on the worst-case running time per update request. For instance, we show how to maintain a decision tree where every vertex has Gini gain within an additive $α$ of the optimum by performing $O\Big(\frac{d\,(\log n)^4}{α^3}\Big)$ elementary operations per update, where $d$ is the number of features and $n$ the maximum size of the active set (the net result of the update requests). We give similar bounds for the information gain and the variance gain. In fact, all these bounds are corollaries of a more general result, stated in terms of decision rules -- functions that, given a set $S$ of labeled examples, decide whether to split $S$ or predict a label. Decision rules give a unified view of greedy decision tree algorithms regardless of the example and label domains, and lead to a general notion of $ε$-approximate decision trees that, for natural decision rules such as those used by ID3 or C4.5, implies the gain approximation guarantees above. The heart of our work provides a deterministic algorithm that, given any decision rule and any $ε> 0$, maintains an $ε$-approximate tree using $O\!\left(\frac{d\, f(n)}{n} \operatorname{poly}\frac{h}ε\right)$ operations per update, where $f(n)$ is the complexity of evaluating the rule over a set of $n$ examples and $h$ is the maximum height of the maintained tree.
summary: We give the first algorithm that maintains an approximate decision tree over an arbitrary sequence of insertions and deletions of labeled examples, with strong guarantees on the worst-case running time per update request. For instance, we show how to maintain a decision tree where every vertex has Gini gain within an additive $α$ of the optimum by performing $O\Big(\frac{d\,(\log n)^4}{α^3}\Big)$ elementary operations per update, where $d$ is the number of features and $n$ the maximum size of the active set (the net result of the update requests). We give similar bounds for the information gain and the variance gain. In fact, all these bounds are corollaries of a more general result, stated in terms of decision rules -- functions that, given a set $S$ of labeled examples, decide whether to split $S$ or predict a label. Decision rules give a unified view of greedy decision tree algorithms regardless of the example and label domains, and lead to a general notion of $ε$-approximate decision trees that, for natural decision rules such as those used by ID3 or C4.5, implies the gain approximation guarantees above. The heart of our work provides a deterministic algorithm that, given any decision rule and any $ε> 0$, maintains an $ε$-approximate tree using $O\!\left(\frac{d\, f(n)}{n} \operatorname{poly}\frac{h}ε\right)$ operations per update, where $f(n)$ is the complexity of evaluating the rule over a set of $n$ examples and $h$ is the maximum height of the maintained tree.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了第一个算法，该算法在标记示例的任意插入和删除序列上维护近似决策树，并强有力地保证每个更新请求的最坏情况运行时间。例如，我们展示了如何通过每次更新执行 $O\Big(\frac{d\,(\log n)^4}{α^3}\Big)$ 基本操作来维护决策树，其中每个顶点的基尼增益在最优值的加性 $α$ 内，其中 $d$ 是特征数量，$n$ 是活动集的最大大小（更新请求的最终结果）。我们为信息增益和方差增益给出了类似的界限。事实上，所有这些界限都是更一般结果的推论，以决策规则的形式表述——给定一组 $S$ 标记示例的函数，决定是分割 $S$ 还是预测标签。决策规则给出了贪婪决策树算法的统一视图，无论示例和标签域如何，并得出 $ε$ 近似决策树的一般概念，对于 ID3 或 C4.5 使用的自然决策规则，意味着上面的增益近似保证。我们工作的核心提供了一种确定性算法，给定任何决策规则和任何 $ε> 0$，每次更新使用 $O\!\left(\frac{d\, f(n)}{n} \operatorname{poly}\frac{h}ε\right)$ 操作维护一个 $ε$ 近似树，其中 $f(n)$ 是在一组 $n$ 示例上评估规则的复杂度，$h$ 是维护的树的最大高度。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种维护近似决策树的动态算法，能够在任意插入和删除操作下保证最坏情况下的更新时间复杂度。
AI.motivation: 传统决策树算法难以高效处理动态变化的数据集，且缺乏对最坏情况更新时间的严格理论保证，需要设计适应动态场景的近似决策树维护方法。
AI.method: 基于决策规则的通用框架，设计确定性算法维护ε近似决策树，通过控制特征数、数据规模、树高及精度参数，实现每次更新操作的严格时间复杂度上界。
AI.result: 首次实现动态维护近似决策树，证明对于基尼增益、信息增益等指标，每次更新操作的时间复杂度为O(d(log n)^4 / α^3)，并推广至通用决策规则场景。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为动态决策树学习提供了理论保证，通过统一框架支持多种决策规则，为实际应用中动态数据处理提供了高效且可靠的解决方案。

title: Convolutional Neural Networks Trained to Identify Words Provide a Surprisingly Good Account of Visual Form Priming Effects
title_zh: 经过训练来识别单词的卷积神经网络对视觉形式启动效应提供了令人惊讶的良好解释
abstract: A wide variety of orthographic coding schemes and models of visual word identification have been developed to account for masked priming data that provide a measure of orthographic similarity between letter strings. These models tend to include hand-coded orthographic representations with single unit coding for specific forms of knowledge (e.g., units coding for a letter in a given position). Here we assess how well a range of these coding schemes and models account for the pattern of form priming effects taken from the Form Priming Project and compare these findings to results observed with 11 standard deep neural network models (DNNs) developed in computer science. We find that deep convolutional networks (CNNs) perform as well or better than the coding schemes and word recognition models, whereas transformer networks did less well. The success of CNNs is remarkable as their architectures were not developed to support word recognition (they were designed to perform well on object recognition), they classify pixel images of words (rather than artificial encodings of letter strings), and their training was highly simplified (not respecting many key aspects of human experience). In addition to these form priming effects, we find that the DNNs can account for visual similarity effects on priming that are beyond all current psychological models of priming. The findings add to the recent work of (Hannagan et al., 2021) and suggest that CNNs should be given more attention in psychology as models of human visual word recognition.
summary: A wide variety of orthographic coding schemes and models of visual word identification have been developed to account for masked priming data that provide a measure of orthographic similarity between letter strings. These models tend to include hand-coded orthographic representations with single unit coding for specific forms of knowledge (e.g., units coding for a letter in a given position). Here we assess how well a range of these coding schemes and models account for the pattern of form priming effects taken from the Form Priming Project and compare these findings to results observed with 11 standard deep neural network models (DNNs) developed in computer science. We find that deep convolutional networks (CNNs) perform as well or better than the coding schemes and word recognition models, whereas transformer networks did less well. The success of CNNs is remarkable as their architectures were not developed to support word recognition (they were designed to perform well on object recognition), they classify pixel images of words (rather than artificial encodings of letter strings), and their training was highly simplified (not respecting many key aspects of human experience). In addition to these form priming effects, we find that the DNNs can account for visual similarity effects on priming that are beyond all current psychological models of priming. The findings add to the recent work of (Hannagan et al., 2021) and suggest that CNNs should be given more attention in psychology as models of human visual word recognition.
abstract_zh: 已经开发了各种各样的视觉单词识别的正字法编码方案和模型来解释屏蔽启动数据，这些数据提供了字母串之间的正字法相似性的测量。这些模型往往包括手工编码的正字法表示，以及针对特定形式的知识的单个单元编码（例如，给定位置的字母的单元编码）。在这里，我们评估了一系列编码方案和模型对形式启动项目中形式启动效应模式的解释程度，并将这些发现与计算机科学中开发的 11 个标准深度神经网络模型 (DNN) 观察到的结果进行比较。我们发现深度卷积网络（CNN）的性能与编码方案和单词识别模型一样好甚至更好，而 Transformer 网络则表现较差。 CNN 的成功是引人注目的，因为它们的架构并不是为了支持单词识别而开发的（它们被设计为在对象识别上表现良好），它们对单词的像素图像进行分类（而不是字母串的人工编码），并且它们的训练被高度简化（不尊重人类经验的许多关键方面）。除了这些形式启动效应之外，我们发现 DNN 还可以解释视觉相似性对启动的影响，这超出了当前所有启动的心理模型。这些发现补充了（Hannagan 等人，2021）最近的工作，并表明 CNN 作为人类视觉单词识别的模型应该在心理学中受到更多关注。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了卷积神经网络（CNN）及其他深度神经网络（DNN）在解释视觉形式启动效应方面的表现，并与传统正字法编码方案和单词识别模型进行比较。
AI.motivation: 传统正字法模型依赖人工编码的正字法表征，而深度神经网络（尤其是CNN）在物体识别中表现优异，但其在单词识别中的潜力尚未充分验证。
AI.method: 通过分析'形式启动项目'的数据，比较了多种正字法编码方案、单词识别模型及11种DNN（包括CNN和Transformer）对形式启动效应和视觉相似性效应的解释能力。
AI.result: CNN在形式启动效应上表现优于传统模型，且能解释超越现有心理模型的视觉相似性效应；Transformer表现较差。
AI.conclusion: CNN作为非专门设计的单词识别模型，其性能优于传统方法，应被心理学领域更广泛地作为人类视觉单词识别的模型进行研究。

search_text: Convolutional Neural Networks Trained to Identify Words Provide a Surprisingly Good Account of Visual Form Priming Effects 经过训练来识别单词的卷积神经网络对视觉形式启动效应提供了令人惊讶的良好解释 A wide variety of orthographic coding schemes and models of visual word identification have been developed to account for masked priming data that provide a measure of orthographic similarity between letter strings. These models tend to include hand-coded orthographic representations with single unit coding for specific forms of knowledge (e.g., units coding for a letter in a given position). Here we assess how well a range of these coding schemes and models account for the pattern of form priming effects taken from the Form Priming Project and compare these findings to results observed with 11 standard deep neural network models (DNNs) developed in computer science. We find that deep convolutional networks (CNNs) perform as well or better than the coding schemes and word recognition models, whereas transformer networks did less well. The success of CNNs is remarkable as their architectures were not developed to support word recognition (they were designed to perform well on object recognition), they classify pixel images of words (rather than artificial encodings of letter strings), and their training was highly simplified (not respecting many key aspects of human experience). In addition to these form priming effects, we find that the DNNs can account for visual similarity effects on priming that are beyond all current psychological models of priming. The findings add to the recent work of (Hannagan et al., 2021) and suggest that CNNs should be given more attention in psychology as models of human visual word recognition. 已经开发了各种各样的视觉单词识别的正字法编码方案和模型来解释屏蔽启动数据，这些数据提供了字母串之间的正字法相似性的测量。这些模型往往包括手工编码的正字法表示，以及针对特定形式的知识的单个单元编码（例如，给定位置的字母的单元编码）。在这里，我们评估了一系列编码方案和模型对形式启动项目中形式启动效应模式的解释程度，并将这些发现与计算机科学中开发的 11 个标准深度神经网络模型 (DNN) 观察到的结果进行比较。我们发现深度卷积网络（CNN）的性能与编码方案和单词识别模型一样好甚至更好，而 Transformer 网络则表现较差。 CNN 的成功是引人注目的，因为它们的架构并不是为了支持单词识别而开发的（它们被设计为在对象识别上表现良好），它们对单词的像素图像进行分类（而不是字母串的人工编码），并且它们的训练被高度简化（不尊重人类经验的许多关键方面）。除了这些形式启动效应之外，我们发现 DNN 还可以解释视觉相似性对启动的影响，这超出了当前所有启动的心理模型。这些发现补充了（Hannagan 等人，2021）最近的工作，并表明 CNN 作为人类视觉单词识别的模型应该在心理学中受到更多关注。 本文评估了卷积神经网络（CNN）及其他深度神经网络（DNN）在解释视觉形式启动效应方面的表现，并与传统正字法编码方案和单词识别模型进行比较。 Dong Yin,Valerio Biscione,Jeffrey Bowers cs.CV

title: Prediction approaches for partly missing multi-omics covariate data: A literature review and an empirical comparison study
title_zh: 部分缺失多组学协变量数据的预测方法：文献综述和实证比较研究
abstract: As the availability of omics data has increased in the last few years, more multi-omics data have been generated, that is, high-dimensional molecular data consisting of several types such as genomic, transcriptomic, or proteomic data, all obtained from the same patients. Such data lend themselves to being used as covariates in automatic outcome prediction because each omics type may contribute unique information, possibly improving predictions compared to using only one omics data type. Frequently, however, in the training data and the data to which automatic prediction rules should be applied, the test data, the different omics data types are not available for all patients. We refer to this type of data as block-wise missing multi-omics data. First, we provide a literature review on existing prediction methods applicable to such data. Subsequently, using a collection of 13 publicly available multi-omics data sets, we compare the predictive performances of several of these approaches for different block-wise missingness patterns. Finally, we discuss the results of this empirical comparison study and draw some tentative conclusions.
summary: As the availability of omics data has increased in the last few years, more multi-omics data have been generated, that is, high-dimensional molecular data consisting of several types such as genomic, transcriptomic, or proteomic data, all obtained from the same patients. Such data lend themselves to being used as covariates in automatic outcome prediction because each omics type may contribute unique information, possibly improving predictions compared to using only one omics data type. Frequently, however, in the training data and the data to which automatic prediction rules should be applied, the test data, the different omics data types are not available for all patients. We refer to this type of data as block-wise missing multi-omics data. First, we provide a literature review on existing prediction methods applicable to such data. Subsequently, using a collection of 13 publicly available multi-omics data sets, we compare the predictive performances of several of these approaches for different block-wise missingness patterns. Finally, we discuss the results of this empirical comparison study and draw some tentative conclusions.
abstract_zh: 随着过去几年组学数据可用性的增加，产生了更多的多组学数据，即由基因组、转录组或蛋白质组数据等多种类型组成的高维分子数据，这些数据均来自同一患者。此类数据适合在自动结果预测中用作协变量，因为每种组学类型可能提供独特的信息，与仅使用一种组学数据类型相比，可能会改进预测。然而，通常在训练数据和应应用自动预测规则的数据、测试数据中，不同的组学数据类型并不适用于所有患者。我们将这种类型的数据称为逐块缺失的多组学数据。首先，我们对适用于此类数据的现有预测方法进行了文献综述。随后，使用 13 个公开可用的多组学数据集，我们比较了其中几种方法对不同块缺失模式的预测性能。最后，我们讨论了实证比较研究的结果并得出了一些初步结论。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在回顾现有处理部分缺失多组学协变量数据的预测方法，并通过实证比较研究评估其性能。
AI.motivation: 随着多组学数据在预测中的应用增加，数据常存在块状缺失，传统方法可能不适用，需评估不同方法在处理此类数据时的有效性。
AI.method: 通过文献综述总结现有方法，并使用13个公开多组学数据集进行实证比较，分析不同块状缺失模式下的预测性能。
AI.result: 实证结果表明，部分方法在特定缺失模式下表现更优，但性能受数据特征和缺失模式显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 结论指出应根据数据特征选择预测方法，并建议未来研究关注缺失机制和方法改进，以提升多组学数据的预测效果。

title: Multiview Representation Learning from Crowdsourced Triplet Comparisons
title_zh: 从众包三元组比较中学习多视图表示
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, 7 tables, Accepted for WWW 2023
comments: 10 pages, 3 figures, 7 tables, Accepted for WWW 2023
abstract: Crowdsourcing has been used to collect data at scale in numerous fields. Triplet similarity comparison is a type of crowdsourcing task, in which crowd workers are asked the question ``among three given objects, which two are more similar?'', which is relatively easy for humans to answer. However, the comparison can be sometimes based on multiple views, i.e., different independent attributes such as color and shape. Each view may lead to different results for the same three objects. Although an algorithm was proposed in prior work to produce multiview embeddings, it involves at least two problems: (1) the existing algorithm cannot independently predict multiview embeddings for a new sample, and (2) different people may prefer different views. In this study, we propose an end-to-end inductive deep learning framework to solve the multiview representation learning problem. The results show that our proposed method can obtain multiview embeddings of any object, in which each view corresponds to an independent attribute of the object. We collected two datasets from a crowdsourcing platform to experimentally investigate the performance of our proposed approach compared to conventional baseline methods.
summary: Crowdsourcing has been used to collect data at scale in numerous fields. Triplet similarity comparison is a type of crowdsourcing task, in which crowd workers are asked the question ``among three given objects, which two are more similar?'', which is relatively easy for humans to answer. However, the comparison can be sometimes based on multiple views, i.e., different independent attributes such as color and shape. Each view may lead to different results for the same three objects. Although an algorithm was proposed in prior work to produce multiview embeddings, it involves at least two problems: (1) the existing algorithm cannot independently predict multiview embeddings for a new sample, and (2) different people may prefer different views. In this study, we propose an end-to-end inductive deep learning framework to solve the multiview representation learning problem. The results show that our proposed method can obtain multiview embeddings of any object, in which each view corresponds to an independent attribute of the object. We collected two datasets from a crowdsourcing platform to experimentally investigate the performance of our proposed approach compared to conventional baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 众包已被用于在许多领域大规模收集数据。三元组相似性比较是一种众包任务，众包工作人员被问到“在三个给定的对象中，哪两个更相似？”这个问题对于人类来说相对容易回答。然而，比较有时可以基于多个视图，即不同的独立属性，例如颜色和形状。对于相同的三个对象，每种视图可能会导致不同的结果。尽管之前的工作中提出了一种生成多视图嵌入的算法，但它至少涉及两个问题：（1）现有算法无法独立预测新样本的多视图嵌入，（2）不同的人可能更喜欢不同的视图。在本研究中，我们提出了一种端到端归纳深度学习框架来解决多视图表示学习问题。结果表明，我们提出的方法可以获得任何对象的多视图嵌入，其中每个视图对应于对象的独立属性。我们从众包平台收集了两个数据集，以实验研究我们提出的方法与传统基线方法相比的性能。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种端到端的深度学习框架，用于从众包三元组比较中进行多视图表示学习，以解决现有算法在独立预测多视图嵌入和处理不同用户视图偏好上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有算法无法独立预测新样本的多视图嵌入，且不同用户可能偏好不同视图，导致多视图表示学习效果受限。
AI.method: 设计端到端归纳深度学习框架，为任意对象生成多视图嵌入，每个视图对应独立属性，并通过两个众包数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在两个众包数据集上优于传统基线方法，能有效生成多视图嵌入并适应不同用户的视图偏好。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法解决了多视图表示学习中独立预测与用户偏好差异问题，为众包三元组比较任务提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Yanwen Fang,Yuxi Cai,Jintai Chen,Jingyu Zhao,Guangjian Tian,Guodong Li
title: Cross-Layer Retrospective Retrieving via Layer Attention
title_zh: 通过层注意力进行跨层回顾性检索
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: More and more evidence has shown that strengthening layer interactions can enhance the representation power of a deep neural network, while self-attention excels at learning interdependencies by retrieving query-activated information. Motivated by this, we devise a cross-layer attention mechanism, called multi-head recurrent layer attention (MRLA), that sends a query representation of the current layer to all previous layers to retrieve query-related information from different levels of receptive fields. A light-weighted version of MRLA is also proposed to reduce the quadratic computation cost. The proposed layer attention mechanism can enrich the representation power of many state-of-the-art vision networks, including CNNs and vision transformers. Its effectiveness has been extensively evaluated in image classification, object detection and instance segmentation tasks, where improvements can be consistently observed. For example, our MRLA can improve 1.6% Top-1 accuracy on ResNet-50, while only introducing 0.16M parameters and 0.07B FLOPs. Surprisingly, it can boost the performances by a large margin of 3-4% box AP and mask AP in dense prediction tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/joyfang1106/MRLA.
summary: More and more evidence has shown that strengthening layer interactions can enhance the representation power of a deep neural network, while self-attention excels at learning interdependencies by retrieving query-activated information. Motivated by this, we devise a cross-layer attention mechanism, called multi-head recurrent layer attention (MRLA), that sends a query representation of the current layer to all previous layers to retrieve query-related information from different levels of receptive fields. A light-weighted version of MRLA is also proposed to reduce the quadratic computation cost. The proposed layer attention mechanism can enrich the representation power of many state-of-the-art vision networks, including CNNs and vision transformers. Its effectiveness has been extensively evaluated in image classification, object detection and instance segmentation tasks, where improvements can be consistently observed. For example, our MRLA can improve 1.6% Top-1 accuracy on ResNet-50, while only introducing 0.16M parameters and 0.07B FLOPs. Surprisingly, it can boost the performances by a large margin of 3-4% box AP and mask AP in dense prediction tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/joyfang1106/MRLA.
abstract_zh: 越来越多的证据表明，加强层交互可以增强深度神经网络的表示能力，而自注意力则擅长通过检索查询激活的信息来学习相互依赖性。受此启发，我们设计了一种跨层注意力机制，称为多头循环层注意力（MRLA），它将当前层的查询表示发送到所有先前层，以从不同级别的感受野检索与查询相关的信息。还提出了 MRLA 的轻量级版本来减少二次计算成本。所提出的层注意力机制可以丰富许多最先进的视觉网络的表示能力，包括 CNN 和视觉 Transformer。其有效性已在图像分类、对象检测和实例分割任务中得到广泛评估，可以持续观察到其改进。例如，我们的 MRLA 可以在 ResNet-50 上提高 1.6% Top-1 精度，同时仅引入 0.16M 参数和 0.07B FLOP。令人惊讶的是，在密集预测任务中，它可以将 box AP 和 mask AP 的性能大幅提升 3-4%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/joyfang1106/MRLA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨层注意机制MRLA，通过让当前层向所有前层检索相关信息来增强深度神经网络的表示能力，并在多个视觉任务中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明加强层间交互可提升网络表示能力，而自注意机制擅长学习依赖关系。受此启发，作者旨在通过跨层检索机制提升视觉网络性能。
AI.method: 设计多头循环层注意机制(MRLA)，使当前层查询表示向所有前层检索信息，并提出轻量版以降低二次计算成本，适用于CNN和视觉Transformer。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类中ResNet-50提升1.6% Top-1精度，仅增加0.16M参数和0.07B FLOPs；密集预测任务中box AP和mask AP提升3-4%。
AI.conclusion: MRLA通过跨层信息检索有效增强了主流视觉网络的表示能力，在多种任务中取得显著性能提升且计算开销可控。

search_text: Cross-Layer Retrospective Retrieving via Layer Attention 通过层注意力进行跨层回顾性检索 More and more evidence has shown that strengthening layer interactions can enhance the representation power of a deep neural network, while self-attention excels at learning interdependencies by retrieving query-activated information. Motivated by this, we devise a cross-layer attention mechanism, called multi-head recurrent layer attention (MRLA), that sends a query representation of the current layer to all previous layers to retrieve query-related information from different levels of receptive fields. A light-weighted version of MRLA is also proposed to reduce the quadratic computation cost. The proposed layer attention mechanism can enrich the representation power of many state-of-the-art vision networks, including CNNs and vision transformers. Its effectiveness has been extensively evaluated in image classification, object detection and instance segmentation tasks, where improvements can be consistently observed. For example, our MRLA can improve 1.6% Top-1 accuracy on ResNet-50, while only introducing 0.16M parameters and 0.07B FLOPs. Surprisingly, it can boost the performances by a large margin of 3-4% box AP and mask AP in dense prediction tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/joyfang1106/MRLA. 越来越多的证据表明，加强层交互可以增强深度神经网络的表示能力，而自注意力则擅长通过检索查询激活的信息来学习相互依赖性。受此启发，我们设计了一种跨层注意力机制，称为多头循环层注意力（MRLA），它将当前层的查询表示发送到所有先前层，以从不同级别的感受野检索与查询相关的信息。还提出了 MRLA 的轻量级版本来减少二次计算成本。所提出的层注意力机制可以丰富许多最先进的视觉网络的表示能力，包括 CNN 和视觉 Transformer。其有效性已在图像分类、对象检测和实例分割任务中得到广泛评估，可以持续观察到其改进。例如，我们的 MRLA 可以在 ResNet-50 上提高 1.6% Top-1 精度，同时仅引入 0.16M 参数和 0.07B FLOP。令人惊讶的是，在密集预测任务中，它可以将 box AP 和 mask AP 的性能大幅提升 3-4%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/joyfang1106/MRLA 获取。 本文提出一种跨层注意机制MRLA，通过让当前层向所有前层检索相关信息来增强深度神经网络的表示能力，并在多个视觉任务中验证其有效性。 Yanwen Fang,Yuxi Cai,Jintai Chen,Jingyu Zhao,Guangjian Tian,Guodong Li cs.CV

authors_text: Andrew Adamatzky,Giuseppe Tarabella,Neil Phillips,Alessandro Chiolerio,Passquale D'Angelo,Anna Nicolaidou,Georgios Ch. Sirakoulis
title: Kombucha electronics
title_zh: 康普茶电子产品
abstract: A kombucha is a tea and sugar fermented by over sixty kinds of yeasts and bacteria. This symbiotic community produces kombucha mats, which are cellulose-based hydrogels. The kombucha mats can be used as an alternative to animal leather in industry and fashion once they have been dried and cured. Prior to this study, we demonstrated that living kombucha mats display dynamic electrical activity and distinct stimulating responses. For use in organic textiles, cured mats of kombucha are inert. To make kombucha wearables functional, it is necessary to incorporate electrical circuits. We demonstrate that creating electrical conductors on kombucha mats is possible. After repeated bending and stretching, the circuits maintain their functionality. In addition, the abilities and electronic properties of the proposed kombucha, such as being lighter, less expensive, and more flexible than conventional electronic systems, pave the way for their use in a diverse range of applications.
summary: A kombucha is a tea and sugar fermented by over sixty kinds of yeasts and bacteria. This symbiotic community produces kombucha mats, which are cellulose-based hydrogels. The kombucha mats can be used as an alternative to animal leather in industry and fashion once they have been dried and cured. Prior to this study, we demonstrated that living kombucha mats display dynamic electrical activity and distinct stimulating responses. For use in organic textiles, cured mats of kombucha are inert. To make kombucha wearables functional, it is necessary to incorporate electrical circuits. We demonstrate that creating electrical conductors on kombucha mats is possible. After repeated bending and stretching, the circuits maintain their functionality. In addition, the abilities and electronic properties of the proposed kombucha, such as being lighter, less expensive, and more flexible than conventional electronic systems, pave the way for their use in a diverse range of applications.
abstract_zh: 康普茶是一种由六十多种酵母和细菌发酵的茶和糖。这个共生群落生产康普茶垫，这是一种基于纤维素的水凝胶。康普茶垫经过干燥和固化后，可以在工业和时尚领域用作动物皮革的替代品。在这项研究之前，我们证明了活的康普茶垫表现出动态电活动和独特的刺激反应。对于有机纺织品的使用，康普茶的固化垫是惰性的。为了使康普茶可穿戴设备发挥功能，有必要整合电路。我们证明了在康普茶垫上创建电导体是可能的。经过反复弯曲和拉伸后，电路仍保持其功能。此外，所提出的康普茶的能力和电子特性，例如比传统电子系统更轻、更便宜、更灵活，为它们在各种应用中的使用铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在康普茶菌膜上构建导电电路的方法，以实现柔性可穿戴电子设备的开发。
AI.motivation: 传统电子系统存在重量、成本及灵活性限制，而康普茶菌膜作为生物来源的柔性材料，具有轻质、低成本特性，但需解决其导电性问题以实现功能性应用。
AI.method: 通过在干燥后的康普茶菌膜表面构建导电电路，并测试其在反复弯曲和拉伸后的导电性能稳定性。
AI.result: 成功在菌膜上制造出可保持功能的导电电路，证明其具备优于传统电子系统的轻量化、经济性和柔韧性特点。
AI.conclusion: 康普茶电子材料为可穿戴设备及其他柔性电子应用提供了新型生物基解决方案，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: G. Bassi,L. Giambastiani,K. Hennessy,F. Lazzari,M. J. Morello,T. Pajero,A. Fernandez Prieto,G. Punzi
title: A FPGA-based architecture for real-time cluster finding in the LHCb silicon pixel detector
title_zh: 基于 FPGA 的架构，用于 LHCb 硅像素探测器中的实时簇查找
comment: 13 pages, 22 figures. This work has been published on IEEE Transactions on Nuclear Science under a Creative Commons License
comments: 13 pages, 22 figures. This work has been published on IEEE Transactions on Nuclear Science under a Creative Commons License
abstract: This article describes a custom VHDL firmware implementation of a two-dimensional cluster-finder architecture for reconstructing hit positions in the new vertex pixel detector (VELO) that is part of the LHCb Upgrade. This firmware has been deployed to the existing FPGA cards that perform the readout of the VELO, as a further enhancement of the DAQ system, and will run in real time during physics data taking, reconstructing VELO hits coordinates on-the-fly at the LHC collision rate. This pre-processing allows the first level of the software trigger to accept a 11% higher rate of events, as the ready-made hits coordinates accelerate the track reconstruction and consumes significantly less electrical power. It additionally allows the raw pixel data to be dropped at the readout level, thus saving approximately 14% of the DAQ bandwidth. Detailed simulation studies have shown that the use of this real-time cluster finding does not introduce any appreciable degradation in the tracking performance in comparison to a full-fledged software implementation. This work is part of a wider effort aimed at boosting the real-time processing capability of HEP experiments by delegating intensive tasks to dedicated computing accelerators deployed at the earliest stages of the data acquisition chain.
summary: This article describes a custom VHDL firmware implementation of a two-dimensional cluster-finder architecture for reconstructing hit positions in the new vertex pixel detector (VELO) that is part of the LHCb Upgrade. This firmware has been deployed to the existing FPGA cards that perform the readout of the VELO, as a further enhancement of the DAQ system, and will run in real time during physics data taking, reconstructing VELO hits coordinates on-the-fly at the LHC collision rate. This pre-processing allows the first level of the software trigger to accept a 11% higher rate of events, as the ready-made hits coordinates accelerate the track reconstruction and consumes significantly less electrical power. It additionally allows the raw pixel data to be dropped at the readout level, thus saving approximately 14% of the DAQ bandwidth. Detailed simulation studies have shown that the use of this real-time cluster finding does not introduce any appreciable degradation in the tracking performance in comparison to a full-fledged software implementation. This work is part of a wider effort aimed at boosting the real-time processing capability of HEP experiments by delegating intensive tasks to dedicated computing accelerators deployed at the earliest stages of the data acquisition chain.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了二维簇查找器架构的自定义 VHDL 固件实现，用于重建新顶点像素检测器 (VELO) 中的命中位置，该检测器是 LHCb 升级的一部分。该固件已部署到执行 VELO 读出的现有 FPGA 卡中，作为 DAQ 系统的进一步增强，并将在物理数据采集期间实时运行，以 LHC 碰撞率即时重建 VELO 命中坐标。这种预处理使软件触发器的第一级能够接受高出 11% 的事件率，因为现成的命中坐标可加速轨道重建并显着减少电力消耗。它还允许在读出级别丢弃原始像素数据，从而节省大约 14% 的 DAQ 带宽。详细的模拟研究表明，与成熟的软件实现相比，使用这种实时集群发现不会导致跟踪性能出现任何明显的下降。这项工作是更广泛努力的一部分，旨在通过将密集型任务委托给部署在数据采集链最早阶段的专用计算加速器来提高 HEP 实验的实时处理能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于FPGA的实时聚类寻找架构，用于LHCb升级中的VELO硅像素探测器，以提升数据处理效率。
AI.motivation: LHCb实验需处理更高碰撞率数据，传统软件处理速度不足，需通过硬件加速实现实时坐标重建，降低带宽与功耗。
AI.method: 采用VHDL开发二维聚类算法固件，部署于现有FPGA读出卡，实时生成像素击中坐标并丢弃原始数据。
AI.result: 处理能力提升11%，节省14% DAQ带宽，功耗降低，且跟踪性能与软件实现无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 该架构验证了硬件加速在实时数据处理中的有效性，为高能物理实验提供了可扩展的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于FPGA的实时聚类寻找架构，用于LHCb升级中的VELO硅像素探测器，以提升数据处理效率。
ai_content.motivation: LHCb实验需处理更高碰撞率数据，传统软件处理速度不足，需通过硬件加速实现实时坐标重建，降低带宽与功耗。

search_text: A FPGA-based architecture for real-time cluster finding in the LHCb silicon pixel detector 基于 FPGA 的架构，用于 LHCb 硅像素探测器中的实时簇查找 This article describes a custom VHDL firmware implementation of a two-dimensional cluster-finder architecture for reconstructing hit positions in the new vertex pixel detector (VELO) that is part of the LHCb Upgrade. This firmware has been deployed to the existing FPGA cards that perform the readout of the VELO, as a further enhancement of the DAQ system, and will run in real time during physics data taking, reconstructing VELO hits coordinates on-the-fly at the LHC collision rate. This pre-processing allows the first level of the software trigger to accept a 11% higher rate of events, as the ready-made hits coordinates accelerate the track reconstruction and consumes significantly less electrical power. It additionally allows the raw pixel data to be dropped at the readout level, thus saving approximately 14% of the DAQ bandwidth. Detailed simulation studies have shown that the use of this real-time cluster finding does not introduce any appreciable degradation in the tracking performance in comparison to a full-fledged software implementation. This work is part of a wider effort aimed at boosting the real-time processing capability of HEP experiments by delegating intensive tasks to dedicated computing accelerators deployed at the earliest stages of the data acquisition chain. 本文介绍了二维簇查找器架构的自定义 VHDL 固件实现，用于重建新顶点像素检测器 (VELO) 中的命中位置，该检测器是 LHCb 升级的一部分。该固件已部署到执行 VELO 读出的现有 FPGA 卡中，作为 DAQ 系统的进一步增强，并将在物理数据采集期间实时运行，以 LHC 碰撞率即时重建 VELO 命中坐标。这种预处理使软件触发器的第一级能够接受高出 11% 的事件率，因为现成的命中坐标可加速轨道重建并显着减少电力消耗。它还允许在读出级别丢弃原始像素数据，从而节省大约 14% 的 DAQ 带宽。详细的模拟研究表明，与成熟的软件实现相比，使用这种实时集群发现不会导致跟踪性能出现任何明显的下降。这项工作是更广泛努力的一部分，旨在通过将密集型任务委托给部署在数据采集链最早阶段的专用计算加速器来提高 HEP 实验的实时处理能力。 本文提出一种基于FPGA的实时聚类寻找架构，用于LHCb升级中的VELO硅像素探测器，以提升数据处理效率。 G. Bassi,L. Giambastiani,K. Hennessy,F. Lazzari,M. J. Morello,T. Pajero,A. Fernandez Prieto,G. Punzi physics.ins-det,cs.AR,cs.CV,hep-ex

title: Communicative Robot Signals: Presenting a New Typology for Human-Robot Interaction
title_zh: 通信机器人信号：提出人机交互的新类型
comment: Full paper at HRI '23, March 13-16, 2023, Stockholm, Sweden
comments: Full paper at HRI '23, March 13-16, 2023, Stockholm, Sweden
abstract: We present a new typology for classifying signals from robots when they communicate with humans. For inspiration, we use ethology, the study of animal behaviour and previous efforts from literature as guides in defining the typology. The typology is based on communicative signals that consist of five properties: the origin where the signal comes from, the deliberateness of the signal, the signal's reference, the genuineness of the signal, and its clarity (i.e., how implicit or explicit it is). Using the accompanying worksheet, the typology is straightforward to use to examine communicative signals from previous human-robot interactions and provides guidance for designers to use the typology when designing new robot behaviours.
summary: We present a new typology for classifying signals from robots when they communicate with humans. For inspiration, we use ethology, the study of animal behaviour and previous efforts from literature as guides in defining the typology. The typology is based on communicative signals that consist of five properties: the origin where the signal comes from, the deliberateness of the signal, the signal's reference, the genuineness of the signal, and its clarity (i.e., how implicit or explicit it is). Using the accompanying worksheet, the typology is straightforward to use to examine communicative signals from previous human-robot interactions and provides guidance for designers to use the typology when designing new robot behaviours.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的类型学，用于对机器人与人类通信时发出的信号进行分类。为了获得灵感，我们使用行为学、动物行为研究和之前文献中的努力作为定义类型学的指南。该类型学基于由五个属性组成的通信信号：信号的来源、信号的故意性、信号的参考、信号的真实性以及信号的清晰度（即，信号的隐式或显式程度）。使用随附的工作表，该类型可以直接用于检查先前人机交互的通信信号，并为设计人员在设计新的机器人行为时使用该类型提供指导。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的分类体系，用于对人机交互中的机器人通信信号进行分类。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对机器人通信信号的系统性分类框架，需借鉴动物行为学和文献成果以建立更全面的分类标准。
AI.method: 基于动物行为学理论及文献综述，定义包含信号来源、刻意性、指涉性、真实性及清晰度五个属性的分类体系，并提供配套分析工具。
AI.result: 构建了一个可操作的分类框架，既可分析过往人机交互案例，又能为机器人行为设计提供指导。
AI.conclusion: 该分类体系为人机交互中机器人信号的分析与设计提供了理论工具和实践指南。

title: Non-zero-sum Game Control for Multi-vehicle Driving via Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过强化学习实现多车辆驾驶的非零和博弈控制
abstract: When a vehicle drives on the road, its behaviors will be affected by surrounding vehicles. Prediction and decision should not be considered as two separate stages because all vehicles make decisions interactively. This paper constructs the multi-vehicle driving scenario as a non-zero-sum game and proposes a novel game control framework, which consider prediction, decision and control as a whole. The mutual influence of interactions between vehicles is considered in this framework because decisions are made by Nash equilibrium strategy. To efficiently obtain the strategy, ADP, a model-based reinforcement learning method, is used to solve coupled Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equations. Driving performance is evaluated by tracking, efficiency, safety and comfort indices. Experiments show that our algorithm could drive perfectly by directly controlling acceleration and steering angle. Vehicles could learn interactive behaviors such as overtaking and pass. In summary, we propose a non-zero-sum game framework for modeling multi-vehicle driving, provide an effective way to solve the Nash equilibrium driving strategy, and validate at non-signalized intersections.
summary: When a vehicle drives on the road, its behaviors will be affected by surrounding vehicles. Prediction and decision should not be considered as two separate stages because all vehicles make decisions interactively. This paper constructs the multi-vehicle driving scenario as a non-zero-sum game and proposes a novel game control framework, which consider prediction, decision and control as a whole. The mutual influence of interactions between vehicles is considered in this framework because decisions are made by Nash equilibrium strategy. To efficiently obtain the strategy, ADP, a model-based reinforcement learning method, is used to solve coupled Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equations. Driving performance is evaluated by tracking, efficiency, safety and comfort indices. Experiments show that our algorithm could drive perfectly by directly controlling acceleration and steering angle. Vehicles could learn interactive behaviors such as overtaking and pass. In summary, we propose a non-zero-sum game framework for modeling multi-vehicle driving, provide an effective way to solve the Nash equilibrium driving strategy, and validate at non-signalized intersections.
abstract_zh: 当车辆在道路上行驶时，其行为会受到周围车辆的影响。预测和决策不应被视为两个独立的阶段，因为所有车辆都是交互做出决策的。本文将多车辆驾驶场景构建为非零和博弈，并提出一种新颖的博弈控制框架，将预测、决策和控制视为一个整体。该框架考虑了车辆之间相互作用的相互影响，因为决策是通过纳什均衡策略做出的。为了有效地获得策略，ADP（一种基于模型的强化学习方法）被用来求解耦合的 Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman 方程。驾驶性能通过跟踪、效率、安全和舒适指数来评估。实验表明，我们的算法可以通过直接控制加速度和转向角来实现完美的驾驶。车辆可以学习超车和超车等交互行为。综上所述，我们提出了一种用于建模多车辆驾驶的非零和博弈框架，提供了解决纳什均衡驾驶策略的有效方法，并在非信号交叉口进行了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非零和博弈的多车辆驾驶控制框架，通过强化学习实现车辆间的协同决策与控制。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将预测与决策分离，无法有效处理多车辆交互场景中的动态博弈关系，需建立统一框架建模车辆间相互影响。
AI.method: 构建非零和博弈模型，采用纳什均衡策略进行决策，并利用基于模型的强化学习方法ADP求解耦合的哈密顿-雅可比-贝尔曼方程。
AI.result: 实验表明算法能直接控制加速度和转向角，实现超车、通过等交互行为，在无信号交叉口验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出非零和博弈框架有效建模多车辆驾驶，提供求解纳什均衡策略的新途径，并在实际场景中验证了算法性能。

title: A Perceptual Study of Sound Ecology in Peripheral Sonification
title_zh: 周边可听化中声音生态的感性研究
comment: ef:19th Sound and Music Computing Conference (smc22), Jun 2022, Saint-Etienne, France. pp.62--69
comments: ef:19th Sound and Music Computing Conference (smc22), Jun 2022, Saint-Etienne, France. pp.62--69
abstract: Based on a case study on 3D printing, we have been experimenting on the sonification of multidimensional data for peripheral process monitoring. In a previous paper, we tested the effectiveness of a soundscape which combined intentionally incongruous natural and musical sounds. This was based on the hypothesis that auditory stimuli could better stand out from one another if they were less ecologically coherent, thus allowing for better reaction rates to various notifications. In this paper, we follow up on that hypothesis by testing two new acoustic ecologies, each exclusively consisting of either musical or natural sounds. We then run those ecologies through the same dual-task evaluation process as the previous one in order to compare them. The results seem to favor our hypothesis, as the new ecologies were not detected as accurately as the original. Though, the set of natural sounds seemed to be considered less intrusive by testers, and to allow for a better performance at an external primary task. We hope to see this work become part of a much larger corpus of studies, which may eventually provide a more definite answer on the effect of ecological coherence in peripheral soundscape design.
summary: Based on a case study on 3D printing, we have been experimenting on the sonification of multidimensional data for peripheral process monitoring. In a previous paper, we tested the effectiveness of a soundscape which combined intentionally incongruous natural and musical sounds. This was based on the hypothesis that auditory stimuli could better stand out from one another if they were less ecologically coherent, thus allowing for better reaction rates to various notifications. In this paper, we follow up on that hypothesis by testing two new acoustic ecologies, each exclusively consisting of either musical or natural sounds. We then run those ecologies through the same dual-task evaluation process as the previous one in order to compare them. The results seem to favor our hypothesis, as the new ecologies were not detected as accurately as the original. Though, the set of natural sounds seemed to be considered less intrusive by testers, and to allow for a better performance at an external primary task. We hope to see this work become part of a much larger corpus of studies, which may eventually provide a more definite answer on the effect of ecological coherence in peripheral soundscape design.
abstract_zh: 基于3D打印的案例研究，我们一直在尝试将多维数据进行超声处理以用于外围过程监控。在之前的一篇论文中，我们测试了将故意不协调的自然声音和音乐声音结合在一起的音景的有效性。这是基于这样一种假设：如果听觉刺激在生态上不太一致，那么它们可以更好地脱颖而出，从而对各种通知有更好的反应率。在本文中，我们通过测试两种新的声学生态学来跟进该假设，每种生态学仅由音乐或自然声音组成。然后，我们通过与前一个相同的双任务评估流程来运行这些生态系统，以便对它们进行比较。结果似乎支持我们的假设，因为新生态的检测不如原始生态准确。不过，测试人员似乎认为这组自然声音的干扰较小，并且可以在外部主要任务中获得更好的表现。我们希望看到这项工作成为更大规模研究的一部分，最终可能为周边声景设计中生态连贯性的影响提供更明确的答案。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验研究了两种新的声学生态（纯音乐声和纯自然声）在周边声化中的感知效果，用于3D打印过程监控。
AI.motivation: 基于前人研究中使用不协调声音组合的假设，探讨生态一致性较低的声音是否能提高多任务处理中的反应效率。
AI.method: 设计两种纯生态声音场景（仅音乐或仅自然声），通过双任务评估实验对比其检测准确性和干扰性。
AI.result: 新声学生态的检测准确率低于原混合声景，但自然声组在外部任务表现更优且被认为更不侵入性。
AI.conclusion: 生态不一致性可能提升声音区分度，但自然声在实用性上表现更佳，需更多研究验证生态一致性对周边声景设计的影响。
